examples.chinese: 他用粉笔在黑板上勾划出一个图样。

examples.english: She rubbed the exercises off the blackboard after class.
examples.chinese: 下课后她把习题从黑板上擦掉。

chineseDefinition: n. 仆人，佣人；公务员；雇工

examples.english: Many young girls became domestic servants .
examples.chinese: 许多年轻姑娘成了家仆。

chineseDefinition: n. 嗜好；业余爱好

examples.english: What are your hobbies?
examples.chinese: 你有些什么爱好？

examples.english: Susan’s hobbies include reading, cooking, and drama.
examples.chinese: 苏珊的业余爱好包括阅读、烹饪和戏剧。

chineseDefinition: n. 冬季；年岁；萧条期

examples.english: Soon it will be winter.
examples.chinese: 很快要到冬天了。

chineseDefinition: n. 工厂，车间；植物；设备；庄稼

definitions.meaning: 工厂，车间；植物；设备；庄稼

examples.english: Don’t forget to water the plants.
examples.chinese: 别忘记给植物浇水。

chineseDefinition: adj. 巨大的；庞大的；无限的

examples.english: a huge dog
examples.chinese: 一条大狗

examples.english: huge crowds
examples.chinese: 大群大群的人

chineseDefinition: adj. 高的；长的；过分的；夸大的

definitions.meaning: 高的；长的；过分的；夸大的
(Tall)人名；(马里、阿拉伯)塔勒；(芬、罗、瑞典)塔尔；(英)托尔；(土)塔勒

examples.english: He was young and tall.
examples.chinese: 他年轻，身材高大。

examples.english: a house surrounded by tall trees
examples.chinese: 大树环绕的房子

chineseDefinition: adj. 富有的；肥沃的；昂贵的

definitions.meaning: (Rich)人名；(丹)里克；(捷)里赫；(英、西)里奇；(葡、法)里什

examples.english: Rich mineral deposits have been found in the sea bed.
examples.chinese: 海底发现有丰富的矿床。

examples.english: Red meat is a rich source of iron.
examples.chinese: 红肉含有大量铁质。

chineseDefinition: v. 使喜欢；使高兴，使满意

examples.english: a business that wants to please its customers
examples.chinese: 希望让顾客满意的一家公司

examples.english: She did everything she could to please him.
examples.chinese: 她千方百计讨好他。

chineseDefinition: v. 油漆；绘画；装饰；涂色于；描绘；（用语言，文字等）描写；擦脂粉等

definitions.meaning: 油漆；绘画；装饰；涂色于；描绘；（用语言，文字等）描写；擦脂粉等
油漆；颜料，涂料；绘画作品；胭脂等化妆品；色彩，装饰

examples.english: The ceiling needs painting.
examples.chinese: 天花板需要粉刷了。

examples.english: brightly paintedhouses
examples.chinese: 粉刷得很亮丽的房屋

chineseDefinition: n. 商业；[贸易] 生意；[贸易] 交易；事情

definitions.meaning: 商业；[贸易] 生意；[贸易] 交易；事情

examples.english: Students on the course learn about all aspects of business.
examples.chinese: 这门课程的学生要学习商业活动的各个方面。

examples.english: Carl began in the music business by running a recording studio.
examples.chinese: 卡尔是从经营录音棚开始干音乐这一行的。

chineseDefinition: adv. 已经，早已；先前

examples.english: The design of the new house is similar to those that have already been built.
examples.chinese: 新房的设计与那些已建好的房子相似。

examples.english: The performance had already started when we arrived.
examples.chinese: 我们到达时表演已经开始了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 勇敢的；华丽的

examples.english: brave soldiers
examples.chinese: 勇敢的士兵

examples.english: her brave fight against cancer
examples.chinese: 她与癌症的勇敢搏斗

chineseDefinition: v. 继续，延续；仍旧，连续

examples.english: He will be continuing his education in the US.
examples.chinese: 他将在美国继续求学。

examples.english: I felt too sick to continue.
examples.chinese: 我感觉很难受，无法继续下去了。

chineseDefinition: n. 猫，猫科动物

examples.english: The police played an elaborate game of cat and mouse to trap him.
examples.chinese: 警方跟他玩了一场精心布局的猫捉老鼠游戏，诱他落网。

chineseDefinition: v. 发现；发觉

examples.english: The body was discovered in a field.
examples.chinese: 尸体是在一块田地里找到的。

examples.english: Forest Service crews often discover campfires that have not been put out completely.
examples.chinese: 林务局工作人员常常发现未完全熄灭的营火。

chineseDefinition: n. 焦炭；可卡因；可口可乐（Coca-Cola）

examples.english: ...a coke-burning stove.
examples.chinese: …一个烧焦炭的炉子。

chineseDefinition: v. 转动，使旋转；转弯；翻过来；兑换

definitions.meaning: 转动，使旋转；转弯；翻过来；兑换
转弯；变化；(损害或有益于别人的)行为，举动，举止

examples.english: Ricky turned and walked away.
examples.chinese: 里基转身走了。

examples.english: She turned her head in surprise.
examples.chinese: 她惊讶地转过头来。

chineseDefinition: v. 蒸，散发；用蒸汽处理

examples.english: A pot was steaming on top of the cooker.
examples.chinese: 锅在炉子上冒着热气。

chineseDefinition: n. [电子] 视频；录像，录像机；电视

definitions.meaning: [电子] 视频；录像，录像机；电视

examples.english: Let’s stay at home and watch a video.
examples.chinese: 我们待在家里看录像吧。

examples.english: Rewind the video right to the beginning.
examples.chinese: 把录像倒退到开头部分。

chineseDefinition: adj. 愚蠢的；麻木的；乏味的

examples.english: stupid mistakes
examples.chinese: 愚蠢的错误

examples.english: That was a stupid thing to say.
examples.chinese: 那样说可真傻。

chineseDefinition: pron. 任何事

examples.english: You can buy anything you want.
examples.chinese: 你想要什么都可以买。

examples.english: He was prepared to do anything to make a bit of money.
examples.chinese: 只要能赚一点钱，他什么都愿意做。

chineseDefinition: n. 交谈，会话；社交；交往，交际；会谈；（人与计算机的）人机对话

definitions.meaning: 交谈，会话；社交；交往，交际；会谈；（人与计算机的）人机对话

examples.english: a telephone conversation
examples.chinese: 电话交谈

examples.english: Children quickly get bored by adult conversation.
examples.chinese: 儿童对成年人的谈话很快就会厌倦。

chineseDefinition: n. 部分；角色；零件；一些；片段

definitions.meaning: 部分；角色；零件；一些；片段

examples.english: For part of the day, you will be outside doing practical work.
examples.chinese: 你们每天将有一部分时间在户外实际操作。

chineseDefinition: n. 门；家，户；门口；通道

examples.english: Could you open the door for me?
examples.chinese: 请你帮我开门好吗？

examples.english: The door flew open and Ruth stormed in.
examples.chinese: 门一下子打开了，露丝气冲冲地跑了进来。

chineseDefinition: adj. 睡着的；麻木的；长眠的

examples.english: Quiet! The baby’s asleep.
examples.chinese: 安静！ 宝宝在睡觉。

chineseDefinition: n. 和平；平静；和睦；秩序

examples.english: The country is at peace with its neighbours for the first time in years.
examples.chinese: 这是多年来该国与其邻国第一次和平共处。

examples.english: By the end of the century, France had made peace with Britain.
examples.chinese: 到那个世纪末，法国和英国议和了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 单一的；单身的；单程的

examples.english: A single tree gave shade from the sun.
examples.chinese: 唯有一棵树遮阴。

examples.english: They won the game by a single point.
examples.chinese: 他们仅以一分的优势赢得比赛。

chineseDefinition: v. 证明；检验；显示

examples.english: You’re wrong, and I can prove it.
examples.chinese: 你错了，我可以证明。

examples.english: To prove his point (= show that he was right ) , he mentioned several other experiments which had produced similar results.
examples.chinese: 为了证明自己的观点，他提到了另外几个结果相似的实验。

chineseDefinition: n. 步行，走；散步

examples.english: It’s a long walk. Maybe we should get the bus.
examples.chinese: 走着去很远，或许我们应该乘公共汽车。

examples.english: Rosanna and Forbes walked in silence.
examples.chinese: 罗莎娜与福布斯默默地走着。

chineseDefinition: v. 搜寻；调查；探求

examples.english: It was too dark to search further.
examples.chinese: 天太暗，无法继续寻找。

examples.english: The area was thoroughly searched .
examples.chinese: 这一地区已被彻底搜查过。

chineseDefinition: n. 棉花；棉布；棉线

examples.english: a white cotton shirt
examples.chinese: 白色棉布衬衫

examples.english: Made from 100% cotton.
examples.chinese: 百分之百纯棉制作。

chineseDefinition: n. 胃；腹部；胃口

examples.english: I was so hungry my stomach hurt.
examples.chinese: 我饿得胃都痛了。

examples.english: His stomach was full of food.
examples.chinese: 他的胃里塞满了食物。

chineseDefinition: adj. 共同的；普通的；一般的；通常的

definitions.meaning: 共同的；普通的；一般的；通常的

examples.english: Heart disease is one of the commonest causes of death.
examples.chinese: 心脏病是最常见的死因之一。

chineseDefinition: v. 叫喊；哭出；大声说

examples.english: ‘Stop!’ she cried.
examples.chinese: “停下！”她喊道。

examples.english: It was painful, and made me cry aloud .
examples.chinese: 这很痛，痛得我大叫起来。

chineseDefinition: adv. 有时，间或

examples.english: I sometimes have to work late.
examples.chinese: 我有时得工作到很晚。

examples.english: Sometimes, Grandma would tell us stories about her childhood in Italy.
examples.chinese: 有时候，祖母会跟我们讲讲她儿时在意大利的经历。

chineseDefinition: n. 家乡；故乡

examples.english: Do you like your hometown?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢你的家乡吗？

examples.english: She expressed the wish to be interred in the graveyard of hometown.
examples.chinese: 她表达了死后葬在故乡的墓地上的愿望。

chineseDefinition: n. 标准；水准；旗；度量衡标准

definitions.meaning: 标准；水准；旗；度量衡标准
标准的；合规格的；公认为优秀的

examples.english: Students have to reach a certain standard or they won’t pass.
examples.chinese: 学生必须达到某一标准，否则无法通过。

examples.english: The airline has rigorous safety standards.
examples.chinese: 这家航空公司有严格的安全标准。

chineseDefinition: adj. 下雪的，多雪的；被雪覆盖的；洁白无瑕的

definitions.meaning: 下雪的，多雪的；被雪覆盖的；洁白无瑕的

examples.english: the snowy fields
examples.chinese: 被雪覆盖的田野

examples.english: one snowy January day
examples.chinese: 1月里大雪纷飞的一天

chineseDefinition: n. 座位；所在地；职位

definitions.meaning: 使…坐下；可容纳…的；使就职

examples.english: I was in the back seat and Jo was driving.
examples.chinese: 我在后座，乔开车。

examples.english: a 10,000-seat stadium
examples.chinese: 万人体育场

chineseDefinition: v. 击鼓；大力争取

examples.english: I could hear the rain drumming against the windows.
examples.chinese: 我听到雨滴有节奏地打在窗上的声音。

chineseDefinition: n. 首都，省会；资金；大写字母；资本家

definitions.meaning: 首都，省会；资金；大写字母；资本家

examples.english: Washington D.C., the capital of the United States
examples.chinese: 美国首都华盛顿特区

chineseDefinition: n. 军官，警官；公务员，政府官员；船长

definitions.meaning: 军官，警官；公务员，政府官员；船长

examples.english: a commanding officer of the SAS
examples.chinese: 英国空军特种部队的一名指挥官

chineseDefinition: n. 裙子

examples.english: She wore a white blouse and a plain black skirt.
examples.chinese: 她穿着白衬衣和纯黑的裙子。

chineseDefinition: v. 运送，乘船；以船运送

examples.english: We'll ship your order to the address we print on your cheques.
examples.chinese: 我们将把你预订的货物送到我们印在你单据上的地址。

chineseDefinition: n. 歌曲；歌唱；诗歌；鸣声

examples.english: the song of the lark
examples.chinese: 云雀的鸣唱

chineseDefinition: n. 特使，特派人员；特刊；特色菜；专车；特价商品

definitions.meaning: 特使，特派人员；特刊；特色菜；专车；特价商品

examples.english: a lunch special for $4.99
examples.chinese: 4.99 美元的特惠午餐

chineseDefinition: n. 绳，绳索

examples.english: They tied a rope around my waist and pulled me up.
examples.chinese: 他们在我腰间系了一根粗绳子，把我拉了上去。

examples.english: The man was coiling a length of rope.
examples.chinese: 那人正在卷一段绳子。

chineseDefinition: v. 收集；募捐

examples.english: After 25 years of collecting recipes, she has compiled them into a cookbook.
examples.chinese: 她搜集了25年食谱，把它们编成一本烹饪书。

examples.english: The company collects information about consumer trends.
examples.chinese: 这家公司搜集有关消费者趋向的信息。

chineseDefinition: n. 音乐会；一致；和谐

definitions.meaning: 音乐会用的；在音乐会上演出的

examples.english: a rock concert
examples.chinese: 摇滚音乐会

examples.english: a concert of French choral music
examples.chinese: 法国合唱音乐会

chineseDefinition: v. 欺骗；使变酸

examples.english: We were foxed by the problem.
examples.chinese: 我们被这个问题难住了。

chineseDefinition: v. 以…为中心

examples.english: The title isn’t quite centred on the page, is it?
examples.chinese: 标题并不在这页的正中间，是吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 奶牛，母牛；母兽

examples.english: a herd of cows
examples.chinese: 一群牛

chineseDefinition: n. 学生；[解剖] 瞳孔；未成年人

definitions.meaning: 学生；[解剖] 瞳孔；未成年人

examples.english: About 20 pupils study music here.
examples.chinese: 大约20名小学生在这里学习音乐。

examples.english: staff and pupils
examples.chinese: 教职员工和学生

chineseDefinition: adv. 几乎不，简直不；刚刚

examples.english: My parents divorced when I was six, and I hardly knew my father.
examples.chinese: 我六岁时父母离婚，我对父亲几乎一无所知。

examples.english: The children were so excited they could hardly speak.
examples.chinese: 孩子们兴奋得几乎连话都说不出来了。

chineseDefinition: n. 蛋糕；块状物；利益总额

examples.english: We had cake and ice cream.
examples.chinese: 我们吃了蛋糕和冰激凌。

examples.english: a chocolate cake
examples.chinese: 巧克力蛋糕

chineseDefinition: adj. 流行的，通俗的；受欢迎的；大众的；普及的

definitions.meaning: 流行的，通俗的；受欢迎的；大众的；普及的

examples.english: Hilary was popular at school.
examples.chinese: 希拉里在学校里很受欢迎。

examples.english: a popular holiday resort
examples.chinese: 人们喜欢的度假胜地

chineseDefinition: v. 欺骗；骗取

examples.english: He had cheated in the test by using a calculator.
examples.chinese: 他在考试时作弊，用了计算器。

examples.english: Don’t look at my cards - that’s cheating .
examples.chinese: 别看我的牌，那是作弊。

chineseDefinition: n. 驾驶员；驱动程序；起子；传动器

definitions.meaning: 驾驶员；驱动程序；起子；传动器

examples.english: a taxi driver
examples.chinese: 出租车司机

examples.english: Do you think you’re a good driver?
examples.chinese: 你认为自己是个好司机吗？

chineseDefinition: v. 管理；经营；控制；设法

examples.english: He was asked to manage a new department.
examples.chinese: 他被要求去管理一个新的部门。

examples.english: Managing a football team is harder than you think.
examples.chinese: 管理一支足球队比你想象的要难。

chineseDefinition: v. 涂黄油于；讨好

examples.english: buttered toast
examples.chinese: 涂了黄油的烤面包片

chineseDefinition: v. 煽动；刺激；吹拂

examples.english: Her resistance only fanned his desire.
examples.chinese: 她的反抗反而激起了他的欲望。

chineseDefinition: n. 高地；高度；身高；顶点

examples.english: Sam’s about the same height as his sister now.
examples.chinese: 萨姆现在身高和他姐姐差不多了。

examples.english: State your age, height, and weight.
examples.chinese: 说出你的年龄、身高和体重。

chineseDefinition: v. 复述；再讲；重述

examples.english: Lucilla often asks her sisters to retell the story.
examples.chinese: 陆希拉经常叫她的姐姐们重讲那个故事。

chineseDefinition: n. 欧洲

examples.english: eastern Europe
examples.chinese: 东欧

chineseDefinition: n. 假日；节日；休息日

examples.english: The school holidays start tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 学校假期从明天开始。

examples.english: Jose Nazario of Arbor Networks in Lexington noticed a stream of data directed at Georgian government sites containing the message: “win+love+in+Rusia.”
examples.chinese: 位于列克星敦的网络安全公司Arbor Networks的工作人员Jose Nazario曾发现一条含有“win+love+in+Rusia"字节信息的数据流向了格鲁吉亚政府网站。

chineseDefinition: n. 小孩；小山羊

definitions.meaning: 小山羊皮制的；较年幼的

examples.english: She’d always loved animals since she was a little kid.
examples.chinese: 她从小就喜爱动物。

examples.english: He’s married with three kids.
examples.chinese: 他已婚，有三个孩子。

chineseDefinition: adv. 差不多，几乎；密切地

examples.english: It took nearly two hours to get here.
examples.chinese: 到这里花了将近两小时。

examples.english: Michelle’s nearly twenty.
examples.chinese: 米歇尔年近二十。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在哪里

examples.english: Where are you going?
examples.chinese: 你要到哪儿去？

examples.english: Where do they live?
examples.chinese: 他们住在哪里？

chineseDefinition: adj. 慢的；减速的；迟钝的

examples.english: The car was travelling at a very slow speed.
examples.chinese: 汽车正以非常慢的速度行驶。

examples.english: a slow walker
examples.chinese: 慢慢走着的人

chineseDefinition: adj. 任何的；所有的；丝毫

examples.english: We should be prepared for any contingency.
examples.chinese: 我们应该对任何应急情况有所准备。

examples.english: We could not reason out which way the robbers escaped, because we were unable to find any trace of them.
examples.chinese: 我们推断不出这些强盗是从哪个方向逃走的，因为我们找不到他们的任何踪迹。

chineseDefinition: n. 前面；正面；前线

examples.english: He wore an old sweater with a coffee stain down the front.
examples.chinese: 他穿着一件旧毛衣，前面有一道咖啡渍。

chineseDefinition: prep. 超过；在……上面；在……之上

examples.english: Our office is above the hairdresser’s.
examples.chinese: 我们的办公室在理发店上面。

examples.english: He had a bruise just above his left eye.
examples.chinese: 就在他左眼上方有块瘀伤。

chineseDefinition: adj. 顺利的；光滑的；平稳的

definitions.meaning: 使光滑；消除（障碍等）；使优雅；缓和

examples.english: Her skin felt smooth and cool.
examples.chinese: 她的皮肤摸上去又滑又凉。

examples.english: a smooth pebble
examples.chinese: 光滑的卵石

chineseDefinition: n. 飞机

examples.english: The airplane cracked up in landing.
examples.chinese: 这架飞机在着陆时坠毁。

examples.english: The new airplane flies at twice the speed of sound.
examples.chinese: 这架新式飞机以两倍于音速的速度飞行。

chineseDefinition: n. 选择；选择权；精选品

examples.english: He has to make some important choices.
examples.chinese: 他得作出一些重要的抉择。

examples.english: They gave us no choice in the matter.
examples.chinese: 在这件事情上他们没给我们选择的余地。

chineseDefinition: adj. 活的；生动的；实况转播的；精力充沛的

definitions.meaning: 活的；生动的；实况转播的；精力充沛的

examples.english: experiments on live animals
examples.chinese: 动物活体实验

examples.english: Protesters want to stop the export of live sheep and cattle.
examples.chinese: 抗议者希望阻止出口活羊活牛。

chineseDefinition: n. 死；死亡；死神；毁灭

examples.chinese: 最近的炸弹爆炸事件使我们所有的希望都化为乌有。

examples.english: These regulations could spell the death (= lead to the end ) of the American car industry.
examples.chinese: 这些规定可能会毁掉美国的汽车工业。

chineseDefinition: n. 六月；琼（人名，来源于拉丁语，含义是“年轻气盛的六月”）

definitions.meaning: 六月；琼（人名，来源于拉丁语，含义是“年轻气盛的六月”）

examples.english: He spent two and a half weeks with us in June 1986.
examples.chinese: 1986年6月，他和我们呆了两个半星期。

chineseDefinition: n. 十七，十七个

definitions.meaning: 十七岁的；十七的，十七个的

examples.english: a group of seventeen American military officers
examples.chinese: 由17名美国军官组成的团体

examples.english: I left home when I was seventeen (= 17 years old ) .
examples.chinese: 我17岁时离开家。

chineseDefinition: adj. 自然的；物质的；天生的；不做作的

definitions.meaning: 自然的；物质的；天生的；不做作的
自然的事情；白痴；本位音

examples.english: the study of the natural world
examples.chinese: 对自然界的研究

examples.english: an area of spectacular natural beauty
examples.chinese: 自然风景秀丽的地区

chineseDefinition: n. 星期三

examples.english: Come and have supper with us on Wednesday, if you're free.
examples.chinese: 星期三过来和我们一起吃晚饭，如果有空的话。

chineseDefinition: n. 边缘；优势；刀刃；锋利

definitions.meaning: 使锐利；将…开刃；给…加上边

examples.english: Put the eggs in the centre of the dish, with the vegetables and herbs around the edge.
examples.chinese: 把鸡蛋放在盘子中间，盘边一圈放些蔬菜和香草。

examples.english: He stood at the water’s edge staring across the lake.
examples.chinese: 他站在水边，凝视着湖对面。

chineseDefinition: pron. 她（she的宾格）；她的（she的所有格）；她（指某个国家；一艘船）

definitions.meaning: 她（she的宾格）；她的（she的所有格）；她（指某个国家；一艘船）

examples.english: Jane? I don’t really know her.
examples.chinese: 简？我不太认识她。

examples.english: Margaret wants me to go with her.
examples.chinese: 玛格丽特想让我和她一起去。

chineseDefinition: n. 警察，警方；治安

definitions.meaning: 监督；管辖；维持治安；为…配备警察

examples.english: Police surrounded the courthouse.
examples.chinese: 警察围在法院大楼四周。

chineseDefinition: n. 小麦；小麦色

examples.english: a field of wheat
examples.chinese: 小麦地

chineseDefinition: pron. 他们；它们；她们

examples.english: Bob and Sue said they wouldn’t be able to come.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃和休说他们来不了。

examples.english: Ken gave me some flowers. Aren’t they beautiful?
examples.chinese: 肯送给我一些花。很漂亮吧？

chineseDefinition: n. 四十

examples.english: The place was built as a casino in the forties.
examples.chinese: 这个地方建于20世纪40年代，起初是一座赌场。

chineseDefinition: n. 周，星期

examples.english: I can’t see you this week.
examples.chinese: 我这星期不能见你。

chineseDefinition: n. 父亲（或母亲）；父母亲；根源

definitions.meaning: 父亲（或母亲）；父母亲；根源

examples.chinese: 14 岁以下儿童须由一位家长陪同。

examples.english: The eggs are guarded by both parents.
examples.chinese: 那些蛋由两只亲鸟共同守护着。

chineseDefinition: n. 咳嗽，咳嗽声；咳嗽病

examples.chinese: 他咳嗽得很厉害。

examples.english: Symptoms include a sore throat and dry cough.
examples.chinese: 症状是喉咙痛和干咳。

chineseDefinition: n. 大门；出入口；门道

examples.english: We went through the gate into the orchard.
examples.chinese: 我们穿过大门进了果园。

examples.english: the wrought-iron gates of the palace
examples.chinese: 宫殿的锻铁大门

chineseDefinition: n. 母亲；大娘；女修道院院长

definitions.meaning: 母亲；大娘；女修道院院长
生下；养育；像母亲般关怀或照管

examples.english: His mother and father are both doctors.
examples.chinese: 他的父母都是医生。

examples.english: the relationship between mother and child
examples.chinese: 母亲和孩子之间的关系

chineseDefinition: n. 声音；嗓音；发言权；愿望

examples.chinese: 他立刻听出了她的声音。

examples.english: I could hear angry voices.
examples.chinese: 我听到了愤怒的声音。

chineseDefinition: adj. 重要的，重大的；有地位的；有权力的

definitions.meaning: 重要的，重大的；有地位的；有权力的

examples.english: a very important meeting
examples.chinese: 很重要的会议

examples.english: The accident taught him an important lesson.
examples.chinese: 那次事故给了他很大的教训。

chineseDefinition: n. 最拥挤部分；活动最多部分；事物的粗大浓密部分

definitions.meaning: 最拥挤部分；活动最多部分；事物的粗大浓密部分

examples.english: Brown hopes to be back in the thick of the action as soon as possible.
examples.chinese: 布朗希望尽快回去，参与到最紧要的行动中。

chineseDefinition: n. 旅行者，观光客

examples.english: Cambridge is always full of tourists in the summer.
examples.chinese: 剑桥在夏季总是挤满了游客。

examples.english: The Statue of Liberty is a major tourist attraction .
examples.chinese: 自由女神像是主要的旅游景点。

chineseDefinition: n. 垃圾，废物；废话

examples.english: a rubbish bin
examples.chinese: 垃圾桶

chineseDefinition: v. 准备；使适合；装备；起草

examples.english: The prosecution wanted more time to prepare their case.
examples.chinese: 原告想要有更多的时间来准备诉讼。

chineseDefinition: n. 住宅；家庭；机构；议会；某种用途的建筑物

definitions.meaning: 住宅；家庭；机构；议会；某种用途的建筑物
覆盖；给…房子住；把…储藏在房内

examples.english: The president will address both houses of Congress.
examples.chinese: 总统将向参众两院发表讲话。

examples.english: the speaker of the house
examples.chinese: 议会议长

chineseDefinition: prep. 通过；穿过；凭借

examples.english: She smiled at him as he walked through the door.
examples.chinese: 他从门口进来时，她朝他笑了。

examples.english: Water will be pumped through a pipe.
examples.chinese: 水将通过管子抽上来。

chineseDefinition: adj. 疯狂的；发疯的；愚蠢的；着迷的

definitions.meaning: 疯狂的；发疯的；愚蠢的；着迷的

examples.english: He can’t possibly get that finished in time. He must be mad !
examples.chinese: 他不可能按时完成的。他一定是疯了！

examples.english: I’d go mad (= start to feel crazy ) if I was stuck at home all day.
examples.chinese: 如果我整天困在家里我会发疯的。

chineseDefinition: n. 女王，王后；（纸牌中的）皇后；（蜜蜂等的）蜂王

definitions.meaning: 女王，王后；（纸牌中的）皇后；（蜜蜂等的）蜂王

examples.english: the queen of diamonds
examples.chinese: 方块Q，方块王后

chineseDefinition: n. 湖；深红色颜料；胭脂红

examples.english: Lake Michigan
examples.chinese: 密歇根湖

chineseDefinition: n. 数学（等于mathematics）

examples.english: Tim’s good at math and science.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆的数学和自然科学很好。

examples.english: a set of simple math problems
examples.chinese: 一组简单的数学题

chineseDefinition: n. 家，住宅；产地；家乡；避难所

definitions.meaning: 家，住宅；产地；家乡；避难所

examples.english: They have a beautiful home in California.
examples.chinese: 他们在加州有个美丽的家。

examples.english: Good luck in your new home!
examples.chinese: 祝你在新家一切顺利！

chineseDefinition: adv. 常常，时常

examples.english: She often works at the weekend.
examples.chinese: 她周末经常要上班。

examples.english: If you wash your hair too often, it can get too dry.
examples.chinese: 如果洗头过勤，头发会变得干枯。

examples.english: She ate two boxes of chocolates.
examples.chinese: 她吃了两盒巧克力。

chineseDefinition: v. 说；谈话；讨论

examples.english: I could hear Sarah and Andy talking in the next room.
examples.chinese: 我听到萨拉和安迪在隔壁讲话。

examples.english: Sue and Bob still aren’t talking (= are refusing to talk to each other ) .
examples.chinese: 休和鲍勃仍然互不理睬。

chineseDefinition: n. 厨房；炊具；炊事人员

examples.chinese: 萨姆走进厨房去沏一壶茶。

examples.english: She is in the kitchen making a meal.
examples.chinese: 她在厨房里做饭。

chineseDefinition: v. 呼叫；拜访；叫牌

examples.english: I heard someone calling in the distance.
examples.chinese: 我听到远处有人在叫。

examples.english: ‘I’m coming!’ she called down the stairs.
examples.chinese: “来啦！”她朝楼下喊道。

chineseDefinition: n. 蜜蜂，蜂；勤劳的人

examples.english: a swarm of bees
examples.chinese: 一群蜜蜂

examples.english: a bee sting
examples.chinese: 蜜蜂蜇伤

chineseDefinition: n. 千克

examples.english: This kind of chocolate is retailed at one pound a kilo.
examples.chinese: 这种巧克力糖零售每公斤一英镑。

chineseDefinition: n. 周期，期间；时期；月经；课时；（语法学）句点，句号

definitions.meaning: 周期，期间；时期；月经；课时；（语法学）句点，句号

examples.english: Tomorrow’s weather will be dry with sunny periods.
examples.chinese: 明天天气干燥，间或晴朗。

examples.english: The drug was tested over a five-week period.
examples.chinese: 那种药品进行了为期五周的试验。

chineseDefinition: n. 蔬菜；植物；植物人

examples.english: fresh fruit and vegetables
examples.chinese: 新鲜果蔬

examples.english: organic methods of growing vegetables
examples.chinese: 蔬菜的有机种植方法

chineseDefinition: v. 拉；拔；拖

examples.english: Mom! Davey’s pulling my hair!
examples.chinese: 妈妈! 戴维拽我的头发！

chineseDefinition: n. 手套

examples.english: a pair of gloves
examples.chinese: 一副手套

examples.english: boxing gloves
examples.chinese: 拳击手套

definitions.meaning: (You)人名；(柬)尤；(东南亚国家华语)猷

examples.english: Hi, Kelly. How are you?
examples.chinese: 嗨，凯利，你好吗？

examples.english: You must all listen carefully.
examples.chinese: 你们大家都必须仔细听着。

examples.chinese: 我3月初飞到了密尔沃基。

definitions.meaning: 检查；调查； 检测；考试

examples.english: A team of divers was sent down to examine the wreck.
examples.chinese: 一组潜水员被送到水下检查沉船。

examples.english: Hegel’s philosophy will be examined in detail in Chapter 4.
examples.chinese: 黑格尔的哲学将在第4章作详细探讨。

definitions.meaning: 结果；成绩；答案；比赛结果

examples.chinese: 高失业率是经济衰退的直接后果。

examples.english: Growing plants from seed can produce disappointing results .
examples.chinese: 将种子培育成植株，有时会产生令人失望的结果。

definitions.meaning: 快乐；希望；娱乐；令人高兴的事

examples.english: the simple pleasures of life
examples.chinese: 生活中的简单乐趣

chineseDefinition: num. 四；四个

examples.english: She is married with four children.
examples.chinese: 她已婚，有四个孩子。

examples.english: They arrived just after four (= four o’clock ) .
examples.chinese: 刚过四点钟，他们就到了。

chineseDefinition: n. 先锋；拓荒者

examples.english: the early pioneers of the Dakota territory
examples.chinese: 达科他地区的早期拓荒者

chineseDefinition: n. 信息，资料；知识；情报；通知

definitions.meaning: 信息，资料；知识；情报；通知

examples.english: I need more information.
examples.chinese: 我需要更多信息。

examples.chinese: 科技及其对现代社会的影响

examples.english: Children are the most vulnerable members of society .
examples.chinese: 儿童是最脆弱的社会成员。

examples.chinese: 无与伦比的美丽与优雅

examples.english: Compare the two illustrations in Figure 60.
examples.chinese: 比较一下图60中的两个图示。

chineseDefinition: v. 提供；规定；准备；装备

examples.english: Tea and biscuits will be provided.
examples.chinese: 有茶水和饼干供应。

chineseDefinition: n. [经] 所有者；物主

examples.english: He was now the proud owner of a bright red sports car.
examples.chinese: 他现在拥有了一辆亮红色跑车，很是自豪。

chineseDefinition: n. 太阳

examples.english: The sky was blue and the sun was shining.
examples.chinese: 天空蔚蓝，阳光明媚。

chineseDefinition: adv. 永远，一直；总是；常常

examples.english: Always lock your bicycle to something secure.
examples.chinese: 每次都要把自行车锁在牢固的物体上。

examples.english: She’d always assumed that Gabriel was a girl’s name.
examples.chinese: 她一直认为加布里埃尔是个女孩名字。

examples.english: There are several different ways we can tackle this problem.
examples.chinese: 我们可以用几种不同的方法处理这个问题。

examples.english: There’s no way of knowing if the treatment will work.
examples.chinese: 没有办法知道这种治疗方法是否有效。

examples.english: I grew up in rather unusual circumstances.
examples.chinese: 我在相当不寻常的环境中长大。

examples.english: I'm afraid it's a rather long story.
examples.chinese: 我恐怕这是个相当长的故事。

definitions.meaning: 接受；承认；承担；承兑；容纳

examples.english: Rick accepted her offer of coffee.
examples.chinese: 她请里克喝咖啡，他接受了。

examples.english: He accepted the invitation to stay with us.
examples.chinese: 他接受了邀请来我们家住。

definitions.meaning: 封面，封皮；盖子；掩蔽物;幌子，借口

examples.english: a course covering business law
examples.chinese: 一门包括商业法的课程

examples.english: Are there any areas you feel are not covered adequately in the book?
examples.chinese: 书中是否有哪些方面你觉得论述得还不够详细？

chineseDefinition: n. 星期五

examples.chinese: 星期五黛安娜不来这里。

chineseDefinition: n. 原因；事业；目标

examples.english: It’s our job to establish the cause of the fire.
examples.chinese: 查明起火原因是我们的责任。

chineseDefinition: n. 访问者，参观者；视察者；候鸟

definitions.meaning: 访问者，参观者；视察者；候鸟

examples.english: Times Square attracts more than 30 million visitors annually.
examples.chinese: 时代广场每年吸引三千多万游客。

chineseDefinition: adj. 威严的；令人敬畏的

examples.english: The world premiere took place in August 1956.
examples.chinese: 全球首映是在1956年8月。

chineseDefinition: n. 报告；报道；成绩单

examples.english: According to recent news reports , two of the victims are Americans.
examples.chinese: 根据近期的新闻报道，受害者中有两名是美国人。

chineseDefinition: v. 借；借用；从其他语言中引入

definitions.meaning: 借；借用；从其他语言中引入

examples.english: Can I borrow your pen for a minute?
examples.chinese: 我可以借你的笔用一下吗？

examples.english: They borrowed heavily (=  borrowed a lot of money  ) from the bank to start their new business.
examples.chinese: 他们向银行贷了巨款来创办新公司。

chineseDefinition: adj. 遗憾的；对不起的，抱歉的

definitions.meaning: 遗憾的；对不起的，抱歉的
对不起，抱歉（表示委婉的拒绝等）

examples.english: She was very sorry about all the trouble she'd caused.
examples.chinese: 她对自己造成的麻烦感到很内疚。

chineseDefinition: n. 城镇，市镇；市内商业区

examples.english: an industrial town in the Midlands
examples.chinese: 英格兰中部的一座工业城镇

examples.english: I walked to the nearest town.
examples.chinese: 我走到最近的镇上。

chineseDefinition: v. 连接；联合；关连

examples.english: We’d like two rooms with connecting doors (= doors that join the rooms ) .
examples.chinese: 我们想要两个有门相通的房间。

chineseDefinition: adj. 甜的；悦耳的；芳香的；亲切的

definitions.meaning: 甜的；悦耳的；芳香的；亲切的

examples.english: This tea is too sweet.
examples.chinese: 这茶太甜了。

examples.english: sweet juicy peaches
examples.chinese: 味甜多汁的桃子

chineseDefinition: n. 石头；结石；[宝] 宝石

examples.english: a stone wall
examples.chinese: 石墙

examples.english: stone steps
examples.chinese: 石台阶

chineseDefinition: pron. 任何人；任何一个

examples.english: Anyone could win tonight.
examples.chinese: 今晚任何人都可能赢。

examples.english: They offer help and advice to anyone interested in becoming a teacher.
examples.chinese: 他们为任何有兴趣当老师的人提供帮助和咨询。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在这里；此时

examples.english: What are you doing here?
examples.chinese: 你们在这里干什么？

examples.english: Shall we eat here?
examples.chinese: 我们在这里吃好吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 后面；背部；靠背；足球等的后卫；书报等的末尾

definitions.meaning: 后面；背部；靠背；足球等的后卫；书报等的末尾
以前；向后地；来回地；上溯；回来；回原处

examples.english: a T-shirt with a picture of a snake on the back
examples.chinese: 后背印了一条蛇的T恤衫

examples.english: She stepped back from the door expectantly.
examples.chinese: 她充满期待地从门口往后退。

chineseDefinition: n. 糖；食糖；甜言蜜语

examples.english: Do you take sugar in your coffee?
examples.chinese: 你的咖啡加糖吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 纸；论文；文件；报纸

examples.english: I’ll get you a piece of paper so you can write the number down.
examples.chinese: 我给你找张纸，你好把号码写下来。

examples.english: Do you have a pen and paper?
examples.chinese: 你有笔和纸吗？

担任（会议的）主席；使…入座；使就任要职

examples.chinese: 昨天我在 A40 号干线公路上超速行驶被逮到。

examples.english: We’re so glad you came.

chineseDefinition: n. 翼；翅膀；飞翔；派别；侧厅，耳房，厢房

definitions.meaning: 翼；翅膀；飞翔；派别；侧厅，耳房，厢房
使飞；飞过；空运；增加…速度；装以翼

examples.english: The bird flapped its wings furiously.
examples.chinese: 那只鸟使劲地拍打着翅膀。

chineseDefinition: n. 数；（杂志等的）期；号码；数字；算术

definitions.meaning: 数；（杂志等的）期；号码；数字；算术

examples.english: They wrote various numbers on a large sheet of paper.
examples.chinese: 他们在一张大纸上写下了很多不同的数字。

examples.english: Add all the numbers together.
examples.chinese: 把所有数字加起来。

chineseDefinition: adj. 有礼貌的，客气的；文雅的；上流的；优雅的

definitions.meaning: 有礼貌的，客气的；文雅的；上流的；优雅的

examples.english: She’s always very polite.
examples.chinese: 她总是很有礼貌。

examples.english: polite, well-behaved children
examples.chinese: 懂礼貌、守规矩的孩子

chineseDefinition: v. 解散；解雇；开除；让离开；不予理会、不予考虑

definitions.meaning: 解散；解雇；开除；让离开；不予理会、不予考虑

examples.english: The government has dismissed criticisms that the country’s health policy is a mess.
examples.chinese: 有人认为国家医疗政策一塌糊涂，政府对这种批评持否认态度。

chineseDefinition: v. 修理；篡改，伪造；为…治病；授以博士学位

definitions.meaning: 修理；篡改，伪造；为…治病；授以博士学位

examples.english: He had doctored his passport to pass her off as his daughter.
examples.chinese: 他窜改了护照，谎称她是他的女儿。

examples.english: There are concerns that some players have been doctoring the ball.
examples.chinese: 有人担心说一些选手在球上做手脚。

chineseDefinition: adj. 疲倦的；厌倦的，厌烦的

definitions.meaning: 疲倦；对…腻烦（tire的过去分词形式）

examples.english: He looks tired out (= very tired ) .
examples.chinese: 他看起来累坏了。

examples.english: ‘No,’ Frank said in a tired voice.
examples.chinese: “不。”弗兰克语带疲倦地说。

chineseDefinition: n. 蜡笔，有色粉笔

definitions.meaning: 以蜡笔作画，用颜色粉笔画

examples.english: He coloured the picture with crayon.
examples.chinese: 他用蜡笔给画上色。

examples.english: They send letters — one time in crayon — detailing their rights and how I am violating some maritime treaty from the 1700s.
examples.chinese: 他们寄信，有一次甚至是蜡笔写的，详细的描述了他们的权利和我如何违反了某些1700年代的海上条约。

chineseDefinition: n. 兴趣，爱好；利息；趣味；同行

definitions.meaning: 兴趣，爱好；利息；趣味；同行
使……感兴趣；引起……的关心；使……参与

examples.english: I watched the first few episodes, but soon lost interest.
examples.chinese: 我看了前几集，但很快就失去了兴趣。

examples.english: The last round of bidding aroused considerable interest.
examples.chinese: 最后一轮竞价引起人们相当大的兴趣。

chineseDefinition: adj. 极好的，精彩的，绝妙的；奇妙的；美妙；胜；神妙

definitions.meaning: 极好的，精彩的，绝妙的；奇妙的；美妙；胜；神妙

examples.english: It’s wonderful what doctors can do nowadays.
examples.chinese: 如今医生的本领着实令人称奇。

chineseDefinition: n. 矿，矿藏；矿山，矿井；地雷，水雷

definitions.meaning: 矿，矿藏；矿山，矿井；地雷，水雷

examples.english: They learnt how to lay mines (= put them in place ) .
examples.chinese: 他们学习了如何布雷。

chineseDefinition: n. 风；呼吸；气味；卷绕

definitions.meaning: 缠绕；上发条；使弯曲；吹号角；绕住或缠住某人

examples.english: The wind blew from the northeast.
examples.chinese: 风从东北方向吹来。

examples.english: Planes were unable to take off because of high winds.
examples.chinese: 飞机因大风无法起飞。

chineseDefinition: pron. 一个人；任何人

examples.english: ‘Have you got a camera?’ ‘No.’ ‘You should buy one’ (= buy a camera ).
examples.chinese: “你有照相机吗？”“没有。”“你应该买一架。”

examples.english: The train was crowded so we decided to catch a later one (= catch a later train ).
examples.chinese: 火车很挤，于是我们决定乘坐下一班。

chineseDefinition: n. 手臂；武器；袖子；装备；部门

definitions.meaning: 手臂；武器；袖子；装备；部门

examples.english: Dave has a broken arm .
examples.chinese: 戴夫手臂断了。

examples.english: Tim’s mother put her arms around him.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆的母亲伸出双臂搂着他。

chineseDefinition: v. 不计；把…除外

examples.english: They were all there except me.
examples.chinese: 除了我以外他们都在那里。

examples.english: We all went except him.
examples.chinese: 除他以外， 我们都去了。

chineseDefinition: n. 信任，信赖；责任；托拉斯

examples.english: At first there was a lack of trust between them.
examples.chinese: 起初，他们之间缺乏信任。

examples.english: an agreement made on the basis of mutual trust
examples.chinese: 在相互信任的基础上达成的一项协议

chineseDefinition: n. 长时间；[语] 长音节；（服装的）长尺寸；长裤

definitions.meaning: 长时间；[语] 长音节；（服装的）长尺寸；长裤
长的；过长的；做多头的；长时间的；冗长的，长音

examples.english: a long table
examples.chinese: 一张长桌子

examples.english: the longest tunnel in the world
examples.chinese: 世界上最长的隧道

chineseDefinition: adj. 其他的，另外的

examples.english: They were just like any other young couple.
examples.chinese: 他们那时就和其他任何年轻夫妇一样。

chineseDefinition: n. 十二个，一打

examples.english: a dozen eggs
examples.chinese: 一打鸡蛋

examples.english: Chris, Helen, and half a dozen others went on holiday together.
examples.chinese: 克里斯、海伦和其他六个人一起去度假了。

chineseDefinition: n. 害怕；恐惧；敬畏；担心

examples.english: She finally ran away for fear that he would kill her.
examples.chinese: 她最后逃走了，唯恐他会杀她。

chineseDefinition: conj. 因为；随着；虽然；依照；当…时

definitions.meaning: 因为；随着；虽然；依照；当…时

examples.english: I saw Peter as I was getting off the bus.
examples.chinese: 我下公共汽车的时候看见了彼得。

examples.english: As time passed, things seemed to get worse.
examples.chinese: 随着时间的推移，情况似乎变得更加糟糕了。

chineseDefinition: prep. 在…之前，先于

examples.english: The new road should be completed before the end of the year.
examples.chinese: 这条新公路应该在年底前完工。

examples.english: Let’s meet at our house before the show.
examples.chinese: 看演出前在我们家碰头吧。

chineseDefinition: n. 溪流；流动；潮流；光线

examples.english: A stream of cold air rushed through the open door.
examples.chinese: 一股冷气穿过敞开的门直冲进来。

chineseDefinition: adv. 后来，以后

examples.english: Tomorrow. Or the day after.
examples.chinese: 明天。或者后天。

chineseDefinition: v. 使固定；修理；安装；准备

examples.english: He’s outside fixing the brakes on the car.
examples.chinese: 他在外面修理汽车的刹车。

examples.english: Ellis was able to quickly find and fix the problem.
examples.chinese: 埃利斯马上就找到并解决了问题。

chineseDefinition: n. 行为；习性；运行状况（=behavior）

examples.english: It is important to reward good behaviour.
examples.chinese: 表现好要给予奖励，这是很重要的。

chineseDefinition: n. 房间；空间；余地；机会；房间里所有的人

definitions.meaning: 房间；空间；余地；机会；房间里所有的人
为…提供住处；租房，合住；投宿，住宿；留…住宿

examples.english: I looked around the room.
examples.chinese: 我四下看了看房间。

examples.english: She nodded toward a man who was standing across the room (= on the other side of the room ) .
examples.chinese: 她朝站在屋子另一头的一个男人点点头。

chineseDefinition: v. 打扰；妨碍；使不安；弄乱；使恼怒

definitions.meaning: 打扰；妨碍；使不安；弄乱；使恼怒

examples.english: Sorry to disturb you, but I have an urgent message.
examples.chinese: 对不起打扰一下，我有个紧急消息。

examples.english: The thieves fled when they were disturbed by a neighbour.
examples.chinese: 窃贼们被一名邻居惊动后逃跑了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 俄国的；俄语的

examples.english: ...the Russian parliament.
examples.chinese: ...俄罗斯国会。

chineseDefinition: v. 微笑

examples.english: her smiling face
examples.chinese: 她的笑脸

chineseDefinition: adj. 严格的；绝对的；精确的；详细的

definitions.meaning: 严格的；绝对的；精确的；详细的

examples.english: a strict teacher
examples.chinese: 严格的老师

chineseDefinition: n. 国王；最有势力者；王棋

definitions.meaning: 主要的，最重要的，最大的

examples.english: On 2 December Henry VI was crowned king (= made the king at an official ceremony ).
examples.chinese: 12月2日，亨利六世加冕为王。

chineseDefinition: n. 通讯，[通信] 通信；交流；信函

definitions.meaning: 通讯，[通信] 通信；交流；信函

examples.english: Good communication is vital in a large organization.
examples.chinese: 在大机构里良好的沟通是极为重要的。

examples.english: Radio was the pilot’s only means of communication .
examples.chinese: 无线电是飞行员唯一的通信手段。

chineseDefinition: n. 牙膏

examples.english: Shaving supplies, toothpaste, and soap were found inside.
examples.chinese: 在里面找到了剃须用品、牙膏和肥皂。

chineseDefinition: pron. 他的

examples.english: That should be his mother.
examples.chinese: 那大概是他的母亲。

examples.english: He stated his views to me.
examples.chinese: 他向我说明了他的观点。

chineseDefinition: n. 值；价值；价格；重要性；确切涵义

definitions.meaning: 值；价值；价格；重要性；确切涵义

examples.english: the nutritional value of cereal
examples.chinese: 谷类食物的营养价值

chineseDefinition: v. 成功；继承；继任；兴旺

examples.english: She wanted to be the first woman to climb Mount Qomolangma, and she almost succeeded.
examples.chinese: 她本想成为第一位登上珠穆朗玛峰的女性，而且差一点就成功了。

chineseDefinition: n. 餐馆；[经] 饭店

examples.english: He took her out for a five-course dinner in a fancy restaurant.
examples.chinese: 他带她到一家豪华餐厅吃了一顿有五道菜的晚餐。

examples.english: The company runs a chain of restaurants.
examples.chinese: 公司经营连锁饭店。

chineseDefinition: n. 能力，能耐；才能

examples.english: The test measures your mathematical ability.
examples.chinese: 这种测试考查的是数学能力。

chineseDefinition: n. 匙，勺子；一杓的量

examples.english: He spooned instant coffee into two of the mugs.
examples.chinese: 他用勺把速溶咖啡舀进了两个杯子里。

chineseDefinition: n. 脸；表面；面子；面容；外观；威信

definitions.meaning: 脸；表面；面子；面容；外观；威信

examples.english: She had a beautiful face.
examples.chinese: 她面容秀美。

examples.english: Her face was white with fear.
examples.chinese: 她吓得脸煞白。

chineseDefinition: n. 鞋；蹄铁；外胎

examples.english: I sat down and took off my shoes and socks.
examples.chinese: 我坐下来脱掉鞋子和袜子。

examples.english: What size shoes do you take?
examples.chinese: 你穿几号的鞋子？

chineseDefinition: adj. 大的；重要的；量大的

examples.english: a big house
examples.chinese: 大房子

examples.english: I need a bigger desk.
examples.chinese: 我需要一张大一点的桌子。

chineseDefinition: v. 生产；引起；创作；生育，繁殖

definitions.meaning: 生产；引起；创作；生育，繁殖

examples.english: New drugs are producing remarkable results .
examples.chinese: 新药正在产生显著的效果。

examples.english: a rise in sea level produced by climatic change
examples.chinese: 由气候变化引起的海平面升高

chineseDefinition: n. 岛；岛屿；安全岛；岛状物

examples.english: The Cayman Islands
examples.chinese: 开曼群岛

examples.english: the Greek island of Crete
examples.chinese: 希腊克里特岛

chineseDefinition: adj. 沉重的；繁重的，巨大的；拥挤的；阴沉的

definitions.meaning: 沉重的；繁重的，巨大的；拥挤的；阴沉的

examples.english: The wardrobe was too heavy for me to move on my own.
examples.chinese: 衣橱太重，我一个人移不动。

examples.english: a heavy suitcase
examples.chinese: 沉重的手提箱

chineseDefinition: adj. 电的；电动的；发电的；导电的；令人震惊的

definitions.meaning: 电的；电动的；发电的；导电的；令人震惊的

examples.english: an electric blanket
examples.chinese: 电热毯

chineseDefinition: n. 行星

examples.english: The picture shows six of the nine planets in the solar system.
examples.chinese: 这张图片展示太阳系9个行星中的6个行星。

chineseDefinition: n. 天气；气象；气候；处境

definitions.meaning: 经受住；使风化；侵蚀；使受风吹雨打

examples.english: What’s the weather like today?
examples.chinese: 今天天气如何？

examples.english: The weather turned bitterly cold.
examples.chinese: 天气变得很冷了。

chineseDefinition: n. 客人，宾客；顾客

examples.english: a banquet for 250 distinguished guests
examples.chinese: 250位贵宾出席的宴会

examples.english: Among the invited guests were Jerry Brown and Elihu Harris.
examples.chinese: 受邀的嘉宾中有杰里·布朗和伊莱休·哈里斯。

chineseDefinition: pron. 谁（who的宾格）

examples.english: From whom shall I get comfort?
examples.chinese: 我从谁那儿能得到安慰呢?

examples.english: The dispute at the moment revolved about the question of whom to send.
examples.chinese: 当时的争论是围绕着派谁去好这一问题而进行的。

chineseDefinition: adj. 努力的；硬的；困难的；辛苦的；确实的；严厉的；猛烈的；冷酷无情的

definitions.meaning: 努力的；硬的；困难的；辛苦的；确实的；严厉的；猛烈的；冷酷无情的
努力地；困难地；辛苦地；接近地；猛烈地；牢固地

examples.english: a hard wooden chair
examples.chinese: 一把硬木椅

examples.english: the hardest substance known to man
examples.chinese: 已知的最硬物质

chineseDefinition: v. 鼓掌，拍手；啪地关上

examples.english: One man began to clap, and others joined in.
examples.chinese: 一个人鼓起了掌，其他人也跟着鼓掌。

examples.english: The couple were cheered and clapped on their arrival.
examples.chinese: 这对夫妇抵达时人群为他们欢呼鼓掌。

chineseDefinition: v. 取来；接来；到达；吸引

examples.english: This announcement fetched a huge cheer from the audience.
examples.chinese: 这一宣告博得听众极其热烈的欢呼声。

chineseDefinition: adj. 每；各自的

examples.english: They reviewed each aspect of the plan bit by bit.
examples.chinese: 他们对计划的各个方面逐一地进行了审核。

examples.english: The children were given one each, handed to them or placed on their plates.
examples.chinese: 孩子们每人给一个，递给他们或者放在他们的盘子里。

chineseDefinition: n. 希望；祝福；心愿

examples.english: Close your eyes and make a wish.
examples.chinese: 闭上眼睛许个愿。

chineseDefinition: n. 环境，外界

examples.english: Some of these chemicals are very damaging to the environment.
examples.chinese: 这些化学品中有些对环境非常有害。

examples.english: legislation to protect the environment
examples.chinese: 保护环境的法规

chineseDefinition: adj. 害羞的；畏缩的，胆怯的

examples.english: He was a quiet shy man.
examples.chinese: 他是个话不多、害羞的男人。

examples.english: a shy smile
examples.chinese: 羞怯的微笑

chineseDefinition: v. 谋杀，凶杀

examples.english: He was convicted of murdering a policeman.
examples.chinese: 他被判谋杀一名警察的罪名成立。

examples.english: Thousands of civilians were brutally murdered during the civil war.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的平民在内战中遭到残杀。

chineseDefinition: v. 给予，提供；买得起

examples.english: The room affords a beautiful view over the city.
examples.chinese: 这房间可以俯瞰城市美景。

examples.english: The new law will afford protection to employees.
examples.chinese: 新法律将为雇员提供保障。

chineseDefinition: adv. 表示否定，不

definitions.meaning: “非”（计算机中逻辑运算的一种）

examples.english: Most of the stores do not open until 10 am.
examples.chinese: 大多数商店要到上午10点才开始营业。

examples.english: She’s not a very nice person.
examples.chinese: 她为人不太好。

chineseDefinition: aux. 必须，一定；可以，应当；很可能

definitions.meaning: 必须，一定；可以，应当；很可能
绝对必要的事物；未发酵葡萄汁

examples.english: Warm clothes are a must in the mountains.
examples.chinese: 御寒衣物在山里是必不可少的。

chineseDefinition: n. 敌人，仇敌；敌军

examples.english: She’s a dangerous enemy to have.
examples.chinese: 与她为敌很危险。

examples.english: Cats and dogs have always been natural enemies.
examples.chinese: 猫和狗向来是天敌。

chineseDefinition: n. 自豪；骄傲；自尊心

examples.english: He wore his medals with pride.
examples.chinese: 他自豪地戴着奖章。

examples.english: The people have a sense of pride in their community.
examples.chinese: 人们对自己的社区有一种自豪感。

chineseDefinition: n. 烟；抽烟；无常的事物

examples.english: cigarette smoke
examples.chinese: 香烟的烟雾

examples.english: Smoke from burning fields drifted across nearby roads.
examples.chinese: 地里燃烧产生的烟雾飘到了附近的公路上。

chineseDefinition: v. 扮演；装作，举动像

definitions.meaning: 行为，行动；法令，法案；（戏剧，歌剧的）一幕，段；装腔作势

examples.english: I first started acting when I was 12 years old.
examples.chinese: 我12岁开始演戏。

examples.english: The movie is very well acted.
examples.chinese: 这部影片演得非常好。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在地下；秘密地

definitions.meaning: 地下的；秘密的；先锋派的
地下；地铁；地道；地下组织；秘密活动；先锋派团体

examples.english: This animal spends most of its life underground.
examples.chinese: 这种动物一生中的大部分时间都待在地下。

examples.english: nuclear waste buried deep underground
examples.chinese: 深埋在地下的核废物

chineseDefinition: v. 露营；扎营

examples.english: We’ll camp by the river for the night, and move on tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我们今晚在河边露营，明天继续前进。

chineseDefinition: adj. 全部的；完全的；整个的

examples.english: a total ban on cigarette advertising
examples.chinese: 香烟广告的全面禁止

examples.english: He looked at her with a total lack of comprehension.
examples.chinese: 他一头雾水地望着她。

chineseDefinition: n. 羽绒滑雪衫；西装短外套；短上衣，夹克；土豆皮；书籍的护封；文件套，公文夹

definitions.meaning: 羽绒滑雪衫；西装短外套；短上衣，夹克；土豆皮；书籍的护封；文件套，公文夹
给…穿夹克；给…装护套；给…包上护封；〈口〉打

examples.english: Gene has to wear a jacket and tie to work.
examples.chinese: 吉恩上班得穿西装打领带。

任一，两方，随便哪一个；两者中的一个或另一个

chineseDefinition: n. 十一月

examples.english: And again in November.
examples.chinese: 在十一月又一次。

examples.english: Too much snow in November.
examples.chinese: 太多的大雪在十一月。

chineseDefinition: adj. 日本（人）的；日语的

examples.english: a Japanese car
examples.chinese: 日本(汽)车

chineseDefinition: v. 签署；涂墨水于

examples.english: The two companies have inked a deal.
examples.chinese: 这两家公司签署了一项协议。

chineseDefinition: n. 指令，命令；指示；教导；用法说明

definitions.meaning: 指令，命令；指示；教导；用法说明

examples.english: Press ‘Enter’ and follow the on-screen instructions.
examples.chinese: 按回车键，然后按照电脑屏幕上的指示来操作。

chineseDefinition: n. 晚餐，晚饭；夜宵

examples.english: Why don’t you come over for supper on Friday?
examples.chinese: 周五为什么不过来吃晚饭呢？

examples.english: We had supper in a small Italian place.
examples.chinese: 我们在一家意大利小餐馆吃了晚饭。

chineseDefinition: n. 渔夫；渔人

examples.english: But there was a price below which they dared not go, for it had happened that a fisherman in despair had given his pearls to the church.
examples.chinese: 但是有一个价格底线，他们不敢低于这个价格了，因为曾有渔夫因为价格太低而绝望得宁愿把珍珠募捐给教堂。

chineseDefinition: n. 花；精华；开花植物

definitions.meaning: 成熟，发育；开花；繁荣；旺盛

examples.english: a lovely rose bush with delicate pink flowers
examples.chinese: 一簇开着娇嫩的粉红色花朵的美丽蔷薇

examples.english: fields full of beautiful wild flowers
examples.chinese: 开满美丽野花的田野

chineseDefinition: n. 份额；许多；命运；阄

definitions.meaning: （与形容词和副词连用）很，非常；（与动词连用）非常
分组，把…划分（常与out连用）；把（土地）划分成块

examples.english: We’ve spent a lot on the children’s education.
examples.chinese: 我们在孩子的教育上花费甚多。

examples.english: ‘How many CDs have you got?’ ‘Lots.’
examples.chinese: “你有多少张CD？”“多着呢。”

chineseDefinition: conj. 或，或者；还是

definitions.meaning: (Or)人名；(中)柯(广东话·威妥玛)；(柬)奥；(土、匈、土库、阿塞、瑞典)奥尔

examples.english: Shall we go out to the cinema or stay at home?
examples.chinese: 我们是出去看电影还是待在家里？

examples.english: You can have ham, cheese, or tuna.
examples.chinese: 你可以选择火腿、干酪或者金枪鱼。

chineseDefinition: adv. 也许；可能；大概

examples.english: Maybe it’s all just a big misunderstanding.
examples.chinese: 也许这只是一个很大的误会。

examples.english: ‘Do you think he’ll come back?’ ‘Maybe.’
examples.chinese: “你认为他会回来吗？”“也许会吧。”

chineseDefinition: n. 责任；[税收] 关税；职务

definitions.meaning: 责任；[税收] 关税；职务

examples.english: I promise I will do my duty .
examples.chinese: 我保证会尽到我的责任。

examples.english: We feel it is our duty to help her.
examples.chinese: 我们感到帮助她是我们的责任。

chineseDefinition: v. 计算；认为

examples.english: There are more than two thousand of us, not counting the crew.
examples.chinese: 我们有两千多人，不包括工作人员在内。

chineseDefinition: n. 三十年代

examples.english: In the thirties, air travel really began to take off.
examples.chinese: 在30年代，乘飞机旅行迅速流行了起来。

chineseDefinition: n. 目标；球门，得分数；终点

examples.english: Your goal as a parent is to help your child become an independent adult.
examples.chinese: 身为父母，你的目标就是要培养孩子成为独立的成年人。

chineseDefinition: n. 字典；词典

examples.english: a German-English dictionary
examples.chinese: 一本德英词典

chineseDefinition: n. 衬衫；汗衫，内衣

examples.english: I have to wear a shirt and tie to work.
examples.chinese: 我上班要穿衬衫打领带。

examples.english: a check shirt
examples.chinese: 格子衬衫

chineseDefinition: n. 会议；会见；集会；汇合点

examples.english: We’re having a meeting next week to discuss the matter.
examples.chinese: 我们下周将开会讨论此事。

chineseDefinition: n. 一半；半场；半学年

definitions.meaning: 一半的；不完全的；半途的

examples.english: Only half the guests had arrived by seven o’clock.
examples.chinese: 7点钟前只来了一半客人。

examples.english: If you look at our members, at least half are women.
examples.chinese: 看看我们的会员，至少有一半是女性。

chineseDefinition: adj. 短的；不足的；矮的，低的

examples.english: a short meeting
examples.chinese: 一个短会

examples.english: Morris gave a short laugh.
examples.chinese: 莫里斯笑了一声。

chineseDefinition: v. 系；约束；打结；与…成平局

definitions.meaning: 领带；平局；鞋带；领结；不分胜负

examples.english: He tied the ends of the plastic bag together.
examples.chinese: 他把塑料袋的两头系在一起。

chineseDefinition: n. 希望；期望；信心

examples.english: When I first arrived in New York, I was full of hope for the future.
examples.chinese: 我初到纽约时，对未来充满希望。

chineseDefinition: n. 八十；八十岁；八十年代

definitions.meaning: 八十的，八十个的；八十岁的

examples.english: The band was incredibly successful in the eighties.
examples.chinese: 这支乐队在80年代红透半边天。

chineseDefinition: adj. 私人的；私有的；私下的

examples.english: Morris has a private jet.
examples.chinese: 莫里斯拥有一架私人喷气式飞机。

examples.english: He made some notes for his private use.
examples.chinese: 他记了些笔记供自己所用。

chineseDefinition: n. 奖品；奖赏；战利品

examples.english: In this month’s competition you could win a prize worth £3,000.
examples.chinese: 在本月的竞赛中您可以赢得价值3,000英镑的奖品。

examples.english: The first prize has gone to Dr John Gentle.
examples.chinese: 获得一等奖的是约翰·金特尔博士。

chineseDefinition: n. 妻子，已婚妇女；夫人

examples.english: Have you met my wife?
examples.chinese: 你见过我的妻子吗？

examples.english: a refuge for battered wives
examples.chinese: 受虐待妻子庇护所

chineseDefinition: adj. 第十二的，第十二个的；十二分之一的

definitions.meaning: 第十二的，第十二个的；十二分之一的

examples.english: He poled his twelfth home run in the sixth inning.
examples.chinese: 在第六回合他打出了他的第十二次本垒打。

chineseDefinition: n. 短裤

examples.english: I like your shorts, Jake.
examples.chinese: 杰克， 我喜欢你的短裤。

examples.english: Where are my shorts?
examples.chinese: 我的短裤在哪里？

chineseDefinition: v. 写，写字；写作，作曲；写信

examples.english: I wrote her several letters , but she didn’t reply.
examples.chinese: 我给她写了几封信，可是她没有回复。

chineseDefinition: n. [物] 能量；精力；活力；精神

examples.english: The water is heated using energy from the sun.
examples.chinese: 水是利用太阳能加热的。

examples.english: The problem with nuclear energy is dealing with the waste.
examples.chinese: 核能的问题就是要处理核废料。

chineseDefinition: n. 先生；（用于姓名前）爵士；阁下；（中小学生对男教师的称呼）先生；老师

definitions.meaning: 先生；（用于姓名前）爵士；阁下；（中小学生对男教师的称呼）先生；老师

examples.english: ‘Report back to me in an hour, sergeant.’ ‘Yes, sir.’
examples.chinese: “一小时后向我报告，中士。”“是，长官。”

examples.english: Can I help you, sir?
examples.chinese: 我能为您效劳吗，先生？

chineseDefinition: n. 商店；储备，贮藏；仓库

examples.english: At Christmas the stores stay open late.
examples.chinese: 在圣诞节期间，商店营业到很晚。

chineseDefinition: n. 草；草地，草坪

examples.english: I walked across the grass.
examples.chinese: 我走在草地上。

examples.english: Keep off the grass.
examples.chinese: 请勿践踏草地。

chineseDefinition: n. 汤，羹；马力

examples.english: homemade tomato soup
examples.chinese: 自制的番茄汤

chineseDefinition: n. 街道

examples.english: We moved to Center Street when I was young.
examples.chinese: 在我小时候，我们搬到了中心大街。

examples.english: She lives just a few streets away.
examples.chinese: 她的住处就在几条街外。

chineseDefinition: n. 事实；实际；真相

examples.english: Our decision to build the museum in Hartlepool was influenced by the fact that there were no national museums in the North East.
examples.chinese: 我们之所以决定在哈特尔浦建造博物馆，是因为东北地区没有国家级的博物馆。

chineseDefinition: v. 帮助；促进；治疗；补救

definitions.meaning: 帮助；补救办法；帮忙者；有益的东西

examples.english: If there’s anything I can do to help, just give me a call.
examples.chinese: 如果需要我帮忙，就给我打个电话。

chineseDefinition: n. [地理][水文] 冰碛；放钱的抽屉；备用现金

definitions.meaning: [地理][水文] 冰碛；放钱的抽屉；备用现金

examples.english: You keep as much money as you need in the till to run your operations.
examples.chinese: 你做业务要储备足够的钱。

chineseDefinition: n. 故事；传说；叙述；流言蜚语

definitions.meaning: 故事；传说；叙述；流言蜚语

examples.english: a book of old Japanese folk tales
examples.chinese: 日本古老民间故事书

examples.english: a fairy tale by Hans Christian Andersen
examples.chinese: 安徒生的一则童话

chineseDefinition: adj. 活着的；活泼的；有生气的

definitions.meaning: 活着的；活泼的；有生气的

examples.english: It was a bad accident – they’re lucky to be alive.
examples.chinese: 这是一宗严重事故——他们能活着实属幸运。

examples.english: My grandparents are still alive .
examples.chinese: 我的祖父母和外祖父母都还健在。

chineseDefinition: n. 油；石油；油画颜料

examples.english: a rise in the price of oil
examples.chinese: 石油价格的上涨

examples.english: the importance of protecting our oil supplies
examples.chinese: 保护我们石油供应的重要性

chineseDefinition: adj. 可爱的；令人愉快的；爱恋的；秀丽的，优美的

definitions.meaning: 可爱的；令人愉快的；爱恋的；秀丽的，优美的

examples.english: She had a lovely face.
examples.chinese: 她有一张漂亮的脸蛋。

examples.english: What a lovely house!
examples.chinese: 多么漂亮的房子啊！

chineseDefinition: n. 角色；任务

examples.english: She has just landed the lead role in their latest production.
examples.chinese: 她刚在他们最新的作品中取得了主角。

chineseDefinition: adj. 安静的；安定的；不动的；温顺的

definitions.meaning: 安静的；安定的；不动的；温顺的

examples.english: We’ll have to be quiet so as not to wake the baby.
examples.chinese: 我们得安静点，免得吵醒宝宝。

examples.english: It’s a nice car. The engine’s really quiet.
examples.chinese: 这车真好，发动机声音很小。

chineseDefinition: n. 试验；检验

examples.english: Did you get a good mark in the test?
examples.chinese: 你这次测验成绩好吗？

chineseDefinition: v. 包含，包括

examples.english: Does the price include postage?
examples.chinese: 这个价格包含邮费吗？

examples.english: His job includes looking after under-21 teams.
examples.chinese: 他的职责包括照管21岁以下球队。

chineseDefinition: adj. 平的；简单的；朴素的；清晰的

definitions.meaning: 平的；简单的；朴素的；清晰的
平原；无格式；朴实无华的东西

examples.english: The document, written in plain English, tells you about your new policy.
examples.chinese: 这份文件用简明的英语写成，解释了你们的新政策。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在某处；到某处

examples.english: My wallet must be around here somewhere.
examples.chinese: 我的钱包肯定是在这里的什么地方。

examples.english: We could meet for dinner at Giorgio’s or somewhere (= or a similar place ) .
examples.chinese: 我们可以在乔治家或别的什么地方一起吃饭。

chineseDefinition: n. 精神；心灵；情绪；志气；烈酒

definitions.meaning: 精神；心灵；情绪；志气；烈酒

examples.english: His spirits were so low (= he was so sad ) that he refused to answer his phone.
examples.chinese: 他情绪非常低落，连电话也不愿接。

chineseDefinition: n. 办公室；政府机关；官职；营业处

definitions.meaning: 办公室；政府机关；官职；营业处

examples.english: the manager’s office
examples.chinese: 经理办公室

examples.english: Sorry, Ann’s not in her office right now.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉，安现在不在办公室里。

chineseDefinition: adj. 健康的，健全的；有益于健康的

definitions.meaning: 健康的，健全的；有益于健康的

examples.english: a healthy baby boy
examples.chinese: 健康的男婴

examples.english: I’ve always been perfectly healthy until now.
examples.chinese: 直到现在，我的身体一直非常健康。

chineseDefinition: n. 二十分之一

definitions.meaning: 第二十的；二十分之一的

examples.english: One twentieth of the total output was exported.
examples.chinese: 产量中有二十分之一出口。

chineseDefinition: n. [园艺] 梨树；梨子

examples.english: I took this apple for a pear until I tasted it.
examples.chinese: 我误将这个苹果当作梨子，直到我尝了才知道。

chineseDefinition: adj. 聪明的；巧妙的；敏捷的；厉害的；潇洒的；剧烈的；时髦的

definitions.meaning: 聪明的；巧妙的；敏捷的；厉害的；潇洒的；剧烈的；时髦的

examples.english: The smart kids get good grades and go off to college.
examples.chinese: 聪明的孩子成绩好，可以去上大学。

examples.english: I was smart enough to wait for a week.
examples.chinese: 我很明智，等了一个星期。

chineseDefinition: n. 熊猫；猫熊

examples.english: The caged panda chafed against the bars.
examples.chinese: 笼子里的大熊猫贴在栅栏上蹭它的身体。

examples.english: No. If the panda  has not quit by morning .
examples.chinese: 不，如果明天早上那熊猫还不走

chineseDefinition: n. 火车；行列；长队；裙裾

examples.english: We went all the way to Inverness by train.
examples.chinese: 我们一路坐火车到因弗内斯。

chineseDefinition: n. 公园；[交] 停车场

examples.english: Let’s go for a walk in the park.
examples.chinese: 我们去公园散步吧。

examples.english: a park bench
examples.chinese: 公园长椅

chineseDefinition: v. 出世（bear的过去分词）

definitions.meaning: (Born)人名；(柬)邦；(英、西、俄、捷、德、瑞典、匈)博恩

examples.english: Forty lambs were born this spring.
examples.chinese: 今年春天有40头小羊羔出生。

examples.english: I was born and raised (=  was born and grew up  ) in Alabama.
examples.chinese: 我是土生土长的亚拉巴马人。

chineseDefinition: n. 进步，发展；前进

examples.english: We made good progress despite the snow.
examples.chinese: 尽管下雪，我们的行程还是很顺利。

chineseDefinition: n. [脊椎] 斑马

examples.english: The neck of the zebra was nipped by a lion.
examples.chinese: 狮子咬断了那头斑马的脖子。

examples.english: But what if your horse suddenly grows zebra stripes?
examples.chinese: 可是如果那匹马突然长出了斑马的条纹呢？

chineseDefinition: v. 看护，护理；照顾；培养；给…喂奶

definitions.meaning: 看护，护理；照顾；培养；给…喂奶

examples.english: Shaw has been nursing an injury, and will not play on Sunday.
examples.chinese: 肖一直在养伤，星期天将不参加比赛。

chineseDefinition: n. 许诺，允诺；希望

definitions.meaning: 允诺，许诺；给人以…的指望或希望

examples.english: If you make a promise, you should keep it.
examples.chinese: 如果你许下一个诺言，你就应该遵守它。

examples.english: The post office has promised to resume first class mail delivery to the area on Friday.
examples.chinese: 邮局已承诺在星期五恢复该地区第一类邮件的递送。

chineseDefinition: n. 女孩；姑娘，未婚女子；女职员，女演员；（男人的）女朋友

definitions.meaning: 女孩；姑娘，未婚女子；女职员，女演员；（男人的）女朋友

examples.english: Both boys and girls can apply to join the choir.
examples.chinese: 男孩和女孩均可申请加入合唱团。

examples.english: Girls! Please be quiet.
examples.chinese: 姑娘们！请安静。

chineseDefinition: n. 交通；运输；贸易；[通信] 通信量

definitions.meaning: 交通；运输；贸易；[通信] 通信量

examples.english: There wasn’t much traffic on the roads.
examples.chinese: 路上车辆不多。

examples.english: The sound of the traffic kept me awake.
examples.chinese: 车辆来往的嘈杂声令我无法入睡。

chineseDefinition: v. 翻译；转化；解释；转变为；调动

definitions.meaning: 翻译；转化；解释；转变为；调动

examples.english: Poetry doesn’t usually translate well.
examples.chinese: 诗歌通常都译不好。

chineseDefinition: n. 风险；危险；冒险

examples.english: It was a risk, sending a letter to my house.
examples.chinese: 将信寄到我家是冒险。

chineseDefinition: n. 顶部，顶端；上部；首席；陀螺

definitions.meaning: 顶部，顶端；上部；首席；陀螺
高出，超越；结束；达到顶点

examples.english: a low wooden table with a glass top
examples.chinese: 玻璃桌面的矮木桌

chineseDefinition: v. 用糖煮；使结晶为砂糖；美化

definitions.meaning: 用糖煮；使结晶为砂糖；美化
糖果（等于sweets）；冰糖（等于sugar candy，rock candy）；毒品
新潮的（服饰）；甜言蜜语的

examples.english: ...a piece of candy.
examples.chinese: …一块糖果。

chineseDefinition: n. 西；西方；西部

examples.english: There’s a slight chance of some sunshine in the west.
examples.chinese: 西部地区见晴的可能性不大。

chineseDefinition: n. 肩，肩膀；肩部

examples.english: She tapped the driver on the shoulder.
examples.chinese: 她拍拍司机的肩。

examples.english: He put his arm around her shoulders.
examples.chinese: 他用手臂搂住她的肩。

chineseDefinition: adj. 成功的；一帆风顺的

examples.english: The operation was successful.
examples.chinese: 手术成功了。

examples.english: a highly successful (= very successful ) meeting
examples.chinese: 十分成功的会议

chineseDefinition: n. 晚餐，晚宴；宴会；正餐

examples.english: What time do you usually have dinner?
examples.chinese: 你通常什么时候吃饭？

examples.english: We’re having fish for dinner tonight.
examples.chinese: 我们今天晚饭吃鱼。

chineseDefinition: n. 陌生人；外地人；局外人

examples.english: Children must not talk to strangers.
examples.chinese: 小孩子千万不要同陌生人说话。

chineseDefinition: n. 教育；培养；教育学

examples.english: She also hopes her children will get a good education.
examples.chinese: 她也希望她的孩子可以受到良好的教育。

examples.english: efforts to improve girls’ access to education
examples.chinese: 为增加女孩受教育机会所作的努力

chineseDefinition: n. 战争，斗争；军事，战术；冲突，对抗，竞争

definitions.meaning: 战争，斗争；军事，战术；冲突，对抗，竞争

examples.english: the Vietnam War
examples.chinese: 越南战争

examples.english: He served as a pilot during the war.
examples.chinese: 他在战时担任飞行员。

chineseDefinition: n. 深处；深渊

examples.chinese: 很深的伤口

examples.english: She was sitting in a deep leather chair.
examples.chinese: 她坐在一张很深的皮椅子里。

chineseDefinition: n. 西瓜

examples.english: Oh, what a big watermelon!
examples.chinese: 喔唷， 这么大的西瓜!

examples.english: A watermelon is red inside and green outside.
examples.chinese: 西瓜内红外绿。

chineseDefinition: n. 鸭子；鸭肉；（英）宝贝儿；零分

definitions.meaning: 鸭子；鸭肉；（英）宝贝儿；零分

examples.english: roast duck with orange sauce
examples.chinese: 烤鸭配橘子酱

chineseDefinition: adj. 向前的；早的；迅速的

examples.chinese: 有军队的路障，不能继续前行了。

examples.english: Always enter or leave a helicopter from a forward direction.
examples.chinese: 一定要从正侧方上下直升机。

chineseDefinition: v. 爬；攀登；上升

examples.chinese: 哈里爬上楼梯。

examples.english: Boys were climbing trees along the river bank.
examples.chinese: 男孩们在河边爬树。

chineseDefinition: adv. 立即，立刻；直接地

examples.chinese: 拌入余下的食材，立即上桌。

examples.english: The telephone rang, and he answered it immediately.
examples.chinese: 电话铃响了，他马上去接。

chineseDefinition: n. 国际象棋，西洋棋

examples.english: They meet fairly often to play chess .
examples.chinese: 他们经常在一起下国际象棋。

chineseDefinition: n. 讨论，议论

examples.english: class discussions
examples.chinese: 课堂讨论

examples.english: the topics suggested for discussion
examples.chinese: 建议讨论的话题

chineseDefinition: n. 羔羊，小羊；羔羊肉

examples.english: roast lamb
examples.chinese: 烤羊肉

chineseDefinition: n. 丰富，大量；充足

examples.english: a land of plenty
examples.chinese: 一片富饶的土地

chineseDefinition: n. 汽车；车厢

examples.english: Dan got out of the car and locked the door.
examples.chinese: 丹下了车，锁上车门。

examples.english: He isn’t old enough to drive a car.
examples.chinese: 他还未到可以开车的年龄。

chineseDefinition: adj. 整齐的；相当大的

examples.english: a tidy desk
examples.chinese: 整洁的书桌

examples.english: I try to keep the garden tidy .
examples.chinese: 我尽量保持花园整洁。

chineseDefinition: n. 粉红色；化身，典范；石竹花；头面人物

definitions.meaning: 粉红色；化身，典范；石竹花；头面人物
扎，刺，戳；使…变粉红色；使…面红耳赤
粉红的；比较激进的；石竹科的；脸色发红的

examples.english: Her room was decorated in bright pinks and purples.
examples.chinese: 她的房间装饰成明亮的粉红色和紫色。

examples.english: She had arrived dressed in pink.
examples.chinese: 她穿着粉色的衣服来了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 某一；必然的；确信；无疑的；有把握的

definitions.meaning: 某一；必然的；确信；无疑的；有把握的

examples.english: I felt certain that I’d passed the test.
examples.chinese: 我感觉自己肯定通过这次测验了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 必要的；必需的；必然的

examples.english: The booklet provides all the necessary information about the college.
examples.chinese: 这本小册子提供了关于那所学院的所有必需信息。

examples.english: No further changes were considered necessary.
examples.chinese: 没有必要作出进一步改变。

chineseDefinition: n. 桥；桥牌；桥接器；船桥

examples.english: He walked back over the railway bridge.
examples.chinese: 他从铁路桥上走了回去。

chineseDefinition: n. 水平；标准；水平面

examples.english: Inflation fell to its lowest level in 30 years.
examples.chinese: 通货膨胀降至30年来最低点。

chineseDefinition: n. 儿子；孩子（对年轻人的称呼）；男性后裔

definitions.meaning: 儿子；孩子（对年轻人的称呼）；男性后裔

examples.english: Her son Sean was born in 1983.
examples.chinese: 她的儿子肖恩出生于 1983 年。

examples.english: They have three sons and a daughter.
examples.chinese: 他们有三个儿子和一个女儿。

chineseDefinition: adj. 可获得的；可购得的；可找到的；有空的

definitions.meaning: 可获得的；可购得的；可找到的；有空的

examples.english: Tickets are available from the box office.
examples.chinese: 售票处有票出售。

examples.english: Meetings were held to update employees as soon as new information became available .
examples.chinese: 一有新的信息就开会告诉员工。

chineseDefinition: n. 馅饼；饼图；爱说话的人

examples.english: I had a steak and kidney pie with chips.
examples.chinese: 我吃了一份牛肉腰子馅饼加薯条。

chineseDefinition: n. 人口；[生物] 种群，[生物] 群体；全体居民

definitions.meaning: 人口；[生物] 种群，[生物] 群体；全体居民

examples.english: Nearly 70 percent of the population still live in the countryside.
examples.chinese: 人口中差不多有70%仍住在乡村。

chineseDefinition: n. 关怀；照料；谨慎；忧虑

examples.chinese: 高水平的医疗护理

examples.english: They shared the care of the children.
examples.chinese: 他们共同照顾孩子。

chineseDefinition: adj. 丑陋的；邪恶的；令人厌恶的

definitions.meaning: 丑陋的；邪恶的；令人厌恶的

examples.english: a very ugly man
examples.chinese: 非常丑陋的男子

examples.english: the ugliest building in town
examples.chinese: 城里最难看的建筑

chineseDefinition: n. 运气；幸运；带来好运的东西

definitions.meaning: 运气；幸运；带来好运的东西

examples.english: You’re not having much luck today, are you?
examples.chinese: 你今天运气不太好，是不是？

examples.english: He’s had good luck with his roses this year.
examples.chinese: 今年他种玫瑰的运气不错。

chineseDefinition: adj. 紧密的；亲密的；亲近的

examples.english: If you need to buy bread or milk, the closest shop is about a mile away.
examples.chinese: 如果你需要买面包或牛奶，最近的商店大概有一英里远。

examples.english: His eyes were small and close together .
examples.chinese: 他眼睛很小，而且挨得很近。

chineseDefinition: n. 大学；综合性大学；大学校舍

definitions.meaning: 大学；综合性大学；大学校舍

chineseDefinition: adj. 漂亮的；可爱的；优美的

definitions.meaning: 有吸引力的事物（尤指饰品）；漂亮的人

examples.english: a pretty little girl
examples.chinese: 漂亮的小姑娘

examples.english: Maria looks much prettier with her hair cut short.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚把头发剪短好看多了。

chineseDefinition: v. 死亡；凋零；熄灭

examples.english: He died in 1985 at the age of 76.
examples.chinese: 他1985年去世，终年76岁。

examples.english: Her father died suddenly in an accident when she was only ten.
examples.chinese: 她年仅10岁时父亲突然死于一场意外事故。

chineseDefinition: n. 圆；循环；一回合；圆形物

definitions.meaning: 圆的；完全的；大概的；肥胖的
在周围；迂回地；朝反方向；挨个

examples.english: I played a round of golf on Sunday morning.
examples.chinese: 星期天早上我打了一场高尔夫球。

chineseDefinition: adj. 口渴的，口干的；渴望的，热望的

definitions.meaning: 口渴的，口干的；渴望的，热望的

examples.english: Can I have a glass of water? I’m really thirsty.
examples.chinese: 我能喝一杯水吗？ 我太渴了。

examples.english: He’d been working in the garden and was very hot and thirsty.
examples.chinese: 他一直在花园里干活，又热又渴。

chineseDefinition: adj. 免费的；自由的，不受约束的；[化学] 游离的

definitions.meaning: 免费的；自由的，不受约束的；[化学] 游离的

examples.english: Admission is free for children under 9.
examples.chinese: 九岁以下儿童免费入场。

examples.english: All students are offered free accommodation.
examples.chinese: 所有学生都免费住宿。

chineseDefinition: n. 大西洋

examples.english: They underlaid the Atlantic with a cable.
examples.chinese: 他们在大西洋海底铺设了一条电缆。

examples.english: The Straits of Gibraltar are the strategic passage between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic.
examples.chinese: 直布罗陀海峡是地中海通向大西洋的咽喉。

chineseDefinition: n. 火腿；业余无线电爱好者；蹩脚演员

definitions.meaning: 火腿；业余无线电爱好者；蹩脚演员

examples.english: a ham sandwich
examples.chinese: 火腿三明治

examples.english: a seven-pound ham
examples.chinese: 七磅重的火腿

chineseDefinition: adj. 舒适的，舒服的

examples.english: I was so comfortable and warm in bed I didn’t want to get up.
examples.chinese: 床上又舒服又暖和，我都不想起来。

chineseDefinition: n. 沉默；寂静；缄默；不谈；无声状态

definitions.meaning: 沉默；寂静；缄默；不谈；无声状态
使沉默；使安静；压制；消除噪音

examples.english: There was a brief silence before anyone answered.
examples.chinese: 沉默了片刻才有人回答。

examples.chinese: 失聪者和听力正常者之间的交流

examples.english: I think Mum’s going a bit deaf .
examples.chinese: 我觉得妈妈有点耳聋了。

chineseDefinition: n. 父亲，爸爸；神父；祖先；前辈

definitions.meaning: 父亲，爸爸；神父；祖先；前辈

examples.english: Ask your father to help you.
examples.chinese: 叫你父亲帮你。

examples.english: Andrew was very excited about becoming a father.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁初为人父，非常激动。

chineseDefinition: n. 循环，周期；圆；圈子；圆形物

definitions.meaning: 循环，周期；圆；圈子；圆形物

examples.english: Draw a circle 10cm in diameter.
examples.chinese: 画一个直径10厘米的圆形。

examples.english: Cut the pastry into circles.
examples.chinese: 将油酥面团切成圆形。

chineseDefinition: n. 财富；大量；富有
