examples.chinese: 这个国家的财富来自石油。

examples.english: the distribution of wealth
examples.chinese: 财富的分配

chineseDefinition: adv. 然后；那么；于是；当时；此外

definitions.meaning: 然后；那么；于是；当时；此外

examples.english: I wish I had known then what I know now.
examples.chinese: 我真希望那时我就知道现在所知道的一切。

examples.english: It was then that I realised she’d tricked me.
examples.chinese: 直到那时我才知道她骗了我。

chineseDefinition: n. 银行；岸；浅滩；储库

examples.english: the river bank
examples.chinese: 河岸

chineseDefinition: n. 狗；丑女人；卑鄙的人；(俚)朋友

definitions.meaning: 狗；丑女人；卑鄙的人；(俚)朋友

examples.english: I could hear a dog barking .
examples.chinese: 我听到了狗吠声。

examples.english: He’s taken the dog for a walk .
examples.chinese: 他去遛狗了。

chineseDefinition: n. 困难，困境

examples.english: If you have any difficulties, give me a call.
examples.chinese: 如果你遇到困难，就给我打电话。

chineseDefinition: n. 耳朵；穗；听觉；倾听

examples.english: She tucked her hair behind her ears.
examples.chinese: 她把头发拢到耳朵背后。

chineseDefinition: v. 踢；反冲，朝后座

examples.english: He kicked the door hard.
examples.chinese: 他用力踢门。

examples.english: He threw me to the ground and started to kick.
examples.chinese: 他把我摔在地上开始踢我。

chineseDefinition: adj. 独自的；单独的；孤独的

examples.english: She lives alone .
examples.chinese: 她一个人生活。

examples.english: You shouldn’t leave a child alone in the house.
examples.chinese: 你不应该把小孩独自留在家里。

chineseDefinition: adj. 适当的；本身的；特有的；正派的

definitions.meaning: 适当的；本身的；特有的；正派的

examples.english: Everything was in its proper place (= where it should be ) .
examples.chinese: 每样东西都放在恰当的位置。

examples.english: the proper way to clean your teeth
examples.chinese: 正确的刷牙方法

chineseDefinition: adj. 快速的，迅速的；紧的，稳固的

definitions.meaning: 快速的，迅速的；紧的，稳固的

examples.english: a fast car
examples.chinese: 速度很快的汽车

examples.english: He’s one of the fastest runners in the world.
examples.chinese: 他是世界上跑得最快的人之一。

chineseDefinition: n. 垃圾；轿，担架；一窝（动物的幼崽）；凌乱

definitions.meaning: 垃圾；轿，担架；一窝（动物的幼崽）；凌乱
乱丢；给…垫褥草；把…弄得乱七八糟

examples.english: People who drop litter can be fined in some cities.
examples.chinese: 在有些城市，乱扔垃圾的人会被罚款。

examples.english: a town with a litter problem
examples.chinese: 存在乱扔垃圾问题的一个小镇

chineseDefinition: n. 水；海水；雨水；海域，大片的水

definitions.meaning: 水；海水；雨水；海域，大片的水

examples.english: There’s water all over the bathroom floor.
examples.chinese: 浴室地面上都是水。

examples.english: Does anyone want a drink of water?
examples.chinese: 有谁想喝杯水吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 车站；驻地；地位；身份

examples.english: I want to get off at the next station.
examples.chinese: 我要在下一站下车。

examples.english: Grand Central Station
examples.chinese: 中央火车站

chineseDefinition: n. 草莓；草莓色

examples.english: ...strawberries and cream.
examples.chinese: …奶油草莓。

chineseDefinition: adj. 害怕的；恐怕；担心的

examples.english: There’s no need to be afraid.
examples.chinese: 没有必要害怕。

chineseDefinition: n. 头脑，智力；脑袋

examples.english: Messages from the brain are carried by the central nervous system.
examples.chinese: 大脑发出的信息是通过中枢神经系统传递的。

examples.english: the chemistry of the brain
examples.chinese: 大脑的化学性质

chineseDefinition: n. 外套

examples.english: Billy! Put your coat on , it’s cold outside!
examples.chinese: 比利！穿上外套，外面很冷！

examples.english: The kids took off their coats and threw them on the floor.
examples.chinese: 孩子们脱下外套扔在地板上。

chineseDefinition: pron. 没有人；一个也没有；没有任何东西

definitions.meaning: 没有人；一个也没有；没有任何东西

examples.english: I wish I could offer you some cake but there’s none left.
examples.chinese: 我真想能请你吃些蛋糕，但一点也没剩的了。

examples.english: Although these were good students, none had a score above 60.
examples.chinese: 虽然这些都是好学生，但是没有一个考到60分以上。

chineseDefinition: v. 需要；要求；命令

examples.english: Campbell’s broken leg will probably require surgery.
examples.chinese: 坎贝尔的一条腿骨折，可能需要手术。

examples.english: What’s required is a complete reorganization of the system.
examples.chinese: 需要做的是彻底整顿整个系统。

chineseDefinition: n. 饺子，汤团；面团布丁

examples.english: chicken and dumplings
examples.chinese: 鸡肉和汤团

chineseDefinition: v. 滴；使降低；使终止；随口漏出

definitions.meaning: 滴；使降低；使终止；随口漏出

examples.english: Temperatures can drop to freezing at night.
examples.chinese: 晚上气温能陡降到零度以下。

chineseDefinition: adv. 差不多，几乎

examples.english: Have you almost finished?
examples.chinese: 你差不多完成了吗？

examples.english: Supper’s almost ready.
examples.chinese: 晚饭就要做好了。

chineseDefinition: n. 秒；第二名；瞬间；二等品

examples.english: Hold your breath for six seconds.
examples.chinese: 请你屏气6秒钟。

examples.english: The operation takes only 30 seconds.
examples.chinese: 这个操作仅需要30秒钟。

chineseDefinition: n. 友谊；友爱；友善

examples.english: her close friendship with her aunt
examples.chinese: 她与姑母的亲密友谊

examples.english: a lifelong friendship
examples.chinese: 一生的友谊

chineseDefinition: adj. 传统的；惯例的

examples.english: traditional Italian cooking
examples.chinese: 传统的意大利烹饪

examples.english: a traditional Irish folk song
examples.chinese: 传统的爱尔兰民歌

chineseDefinition: v. 复制；复印；抄袭

examples.english: Could you copy this letter and send it out, please?
examples.chinese: 你能把这封信复印一份发出去吗？

examples.english: To copy a file, press F3.
examples.chinese: 拷贝文件按F3键。

chineseDefinition: v. 似乎；像是；装作

examples.english: Ann didn’t seem very sure.
examples.chinese: 安看来并不十分肯定。

examples.english: It seems a foolish decision now.
examples.chinese: 现在看来这是一个愚蠢的决定。

chineseDefinition: n. 历史，历史学；历史记录；来历

definitions.meaning: 历史，历史学；历史记录；来历

examples.english: Throughout history the achievements of women have been largely ignored.
examples.chinese: 从古至今，妇女的成就都被大大地忽视了。

examples.english: No man in recent history has done more to rebuild the Democratic Party.
examples.chinese: 他对重建民主党的贡献在近代史上无人能及。

chineseDefinition: n. [计] 列表；清单；目录

examples.english: We are making a list of the top ten men we would not want to be married to.
examples.chinese: 我们正在列一个我们最不想嫁的10种男人的名单。

examples.english: The pupils were asked to list the sports they loved most and hated most.
examples.chinese: 学生们被要求列出他们最喜欢的和最讨厌的运动。

chineseDefinition: prep. 超过；越过；那一边；在较远的一边

definitions.meaning: 超过；越过；那一边；在较远的一边

examples.english: More people are choosing to work beyond retirement age.
examples.chinese: 越来越多的人选择过了退休年龄继续工作。

examples.english: Inflation has risen beyond the 5% level.
examples.chinese: 通货膨胀已经超出了5%的水平。

chineseDefinition: n. 星期一

examples.english: The president announced Monday that he would cancel the debt.
examples.chinese: 总统周一宣布他会取消这笔债务。

chineseDefinition: n. 时期；季节；赛季

examples.english: the effect on plants as the seasons start to change
examples.chinese: 换季对植物的影响

chineseDefinition: v. 发音；宣判；断言

examples.english: The scheme was pronounced a failure.
examples.chinese: 该方案宣告失败。

chineseDefinition: adj. 很少的；几乎没有的

examples.english: ...spending her few waking hours in front of the TV.
examples.chinese: …把她清醒的个把钟头花在电视机前。

examples.english: This should not be an experience for the few.
examples.chinese: 这应该不只是少数人的经历。

chineseDefinition: prep. 在…中间；在…之中

examples.english: The girl quickly disappeared among the crowd.
examples.chinese: 女孩转眼消失在人群中。

examples.english: I could hear voices coming from somewhere among the bushes.
examples.chinese: 我能听到灌木丛中某个地方传来说话的声音。

chineseDefinition: adv. 又，此外；再一次；再说；增加

definitions.meaning: 又，此外；再一次；再说；增加

examples.english: Can you say that again? I didn’t hear.
examples.chinese: 你能再说一遍吗？ 我没听见。

examples.english: I’ll never go there again.
examples.chinese: 我再也不会去那儿了。

chineseDefinition: v. 达到；延伸；伸出手；传开

definitions.meaning: 范围；延伸；河段；横风行驶

examples.english: Chelsea could reach the final of the European Cup.
examples.chinese: 切尔西队会进入欧洲杯决赛。

chineseDefinition: n. 研究；调查

examples.english: Gould was helped in his researches by local naturalists.
examples.chinese: 古尔德在研究过程中得到了当地博物学家的帮助。

chineseDefinition: n. [计] 文本；课文；主题

examples.english: a chemistry text
examples.chinese: 化学课本

chineseDefinition: n. 秋天；成熟期；渐衰期，凋落期

definitions.meaning: 秋天；成熟期；渐衰期，凋落期

examples.english: autumn mists
examples.chinese: 秋天的雾霭

chineseDefinition: v. 安装；使……适应；使……合身；与……相符

definitions.meaning: 安装；使……适应；使……合身；与……相符
健康的；合适的；恰当的；准备好的

examples.english: The sash, kimono, and other garments were made to fit a child.
examples.chinese: 这些腰带、和服和其他衣服都做得适合孩子穿。

chineseDefinition: adv. 很；相当；完全

examples.english: I felt quite bitter about it at the time.
examples.chinese: 当时我对此感到相当痛苦。

examples.english: Well, actually it requires quite a bit of work and research.
examples.chinese: 呃，实际上这需要相当多的工作和研究。

chineseDefinition: adj. 高的；高级的；崇高的；高音调的

definitions.meaning: 高的；高级的；崇高的；高音调的
高水平；天空；由麻醉品引起的快感；高压地带

examples.english: This is the highest mountain in Japan.
examples.chinese: 这是日本最高的山。

examples.english: The camp was surrounded by a high fence.
examples.chinese: 营地四周围着高高的栅栏。

chineseDefinition: n. 陆军，军队

examples.english: The army are helping to clear up after the floods.
examples.chinese: 陆军部队正协助洪灾后的清理工作。

examples.english: an army officer
examples.chinese: 陆军军官

chineseDefinition: adj. 愚蠢的；不明事理的；没头脑的

definitions.meaning: 愚蠢的；不明事理的；没头脑的

examples.english: Stop asking silly questions.
examples.chinese: 别再问傻问题了。

examples.english: You made a lot of silly mistakes .
examples.chinese: 你犯了许多愚蠢的错误。

chineseDefinition: n. 航空公司；航线

examples.english: an airline pilot
examples.chinese: 航空公司飞行员

chineseDefinition: adj. 明亮的，鲜明的；聪明的；愉快的

definitions.meaning: 明亮的，鲜明的；聪明的；愉快的

examples.english: Her eyes were hurting from the bright lights.
examples.chinese: 明亮的光线刺痛了她的眼睛。

examples.english: bright sunshine
examples.chinese: 灿烂的阳光

chineseDefinition: conj. 比（用于形容词、副词的比较级之后）；除…外（用于other等之后）；与其…（用于 rather等之后）；一…就（用于 no sooner等之后）

definitions.meaning: 比（用于形容词、副词的比较级之后）；除…外（用于other等之后）；与其…（用于 rather等之后）；一…就（用于 no sooner等之后）

examples.english: Natalie was prettier than her sister.
examples.chinese: 纳塔莉比她姐姐漂亮。

examples.english: You need that money more than I do.
examples.chinese: 你比我更需要那笔钱。

chineseDefinition: n. 日本（东亚国家名）
n. 队长，首领；船长；上尉；海军上校

definitions.meaning: 队长，首领；船长；上尉；海军上校

examples.english: The captain and crew welcome you aboard.
examples.chinese: 机长和全体机组人员欢迎各位乘坐本次航班。

chineseDefinition: conj. 每当；无论何时

definitions.meaning: 不论何时；随便什么时候

examples.english: They were always there by you， whenever you needed them.
examples.chinese: 无论何时你需要他们，他们总是在你身边。

chineseDefinition: n. 公路，马路；道路；手段

examples.english: 65 Maple Road
examples.chinese: 枫树路65号

chineseDefinition: num. 十四；十四个；第十四

definitions.meaning: 十四的记号；十四岁；十四点钟；十五世纪

examples.english: He used to work fourteen hours a day.
examples.chinese: 他过去一天工作14个小时。

examples.english: I started playing the guitar when I was fourteen (= 14 years old ) .
examples.chinese: 我14岁开始弹吉他。

chineseDefinition: v. 绊倒；远足；犯错误；轻快地走

definitions.meaning: 绊倒；远足；犯错误；轻快地走

examples.english: He tripped and fell .
examples.chinese: 他绊了一下，摔倒了。

chineseDefinition: n. 自行车；脚踏车

examples.english: Let’s go for a bike ride .
examples.chinese: 我们去骑会儿自行车吧。

chineseDefinition: n. 机器人；遥控设备，自动机械；机械般工作的人

definitions.meaning: 机器人；遥控设备，自动机械；机械般工作的人

examples.english: cars built by robots
examples.chinese: 机器人制造的汽车

chineseDefinition: n. 销售；出售；拍卖；销售额；廉价出售

definitions.meaning: 销售；出售；拍卖；销售额；廉价出售

examples.english: Harvey gets a $50 commission every time he makes a sale (= sells something as part of his job ) .
examples.chinese: 哈维每做成一笔生意可得到50美元的佣金。

examples.english: Car salesmen will often bring down the price rather than lose a sale (= fail to sell something ) .
examples.chinese: 汽车推销员常常宁愿降价也不愿失去一笔生意。

chineseDefinition: n. 象征；符号；标志

examples.english: The symbol on the packet is a guarantee that the food has been produced organically.
examples.chinese: 包装盒上的这个标识保证这种食物是有机生产的。

chineseDefinition: n. 周末，周末休假；周末聚会

definitions.meaning: 周末，周末休假；周末聚会

examples.english: Are you doing anything nice this weekend?
examples.chinese: 这个周末你有什么好的安排？

examples.english: Tony has been unwell over the weekend (= during the weekend ).
examples.chinese: 托尼这个周末身体不舒服。

chineseDefinition: adj. 温暖的；热情的

examples.english: The house was lovely and warm.
examples.chinese: 那房子漂亮温暖。

examples.english: I hope we get some warm weather soon.
examples.chinese: 我希望天气很快就会回暖。

chineseDefinition: n. 美元

examples.english: It cost three dollars.
examples.chinese: 它要三美元。

examples.english: a ten-dollar bill
examples.chinese: 一张十元钞票

chineseDefinition: adj. 无用的；无效的

examples.english: The editor killed a few useless lines.
examples.chinese: 编辑删掉了几行无用的文字。

examples.english: Please cancel the words which are useless.
examples.chinese: 请把无用的词划掉。

chineseDefinition: n. 癌症；恶性肿瘤

examples.english: A lot of cancers can now be treated successfully.
examples.chinese: 现在许多癌症可以治愈。

examples.english: She was told last year that she had cancer .
examples.chinese: 去年她得知自己患了癌症。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在那里；在那边；在那点上

definitions.meaning: 在那里；在那边；在那点上

examples.english: We could go back to my cottage and have lunch there.
examples.chinese: 我们可以回到我的小屋去吃午饭。

examples.english: Scotland? I’ve always wanted to go there.
examples.chinese: 苏格兰？我一直想去那儿。

chineseDefinition: n. 血，血液；血统

examples.english: Her body was found in a pool of blood.
examples.chinese: 她的尸体被发现倒在血泊之中。

examples.english: Blood oozed from a cut on his forehead.
examples.chinese: 血从他额头的伤口里渗了出来。

chineseDefinition: v. 使分离；使分开；使分居

definitions.meaning: 单独的；分开的；不同的；各自的；

examples.english: This will keep your dressing from separating.
examples.chinese: 这样可以防止调味汁分层。

examples.english: First, separate the eggs (= divide the white part from the yellow part ) .
examples.chinese: 第一步，把蛋清和蛋黄分开。

chineseDefinition: n. 情况；形势；处境；位置

examples.english: I explained the situation to everyone.
examples.chinese: 我向大家介绍了一下情况。

chineseDefinition: pron. 你们自己；你们本人（yourself的复数）

definitions.meaning: 你们自己；你们本人（yourself的复数）

examples.english: Believe in yourselves.
examples.chinese: 相信你们自己。

examples.english: I need not press the urgency of the matter on you, as I konw you are fully aware of it yourselves.
examples.chinese: 我无需向你们强调此事的急迫性，因为我知道，你们自己对此完全了解。

chineseDefinition: pron. 无人，没有人；没有任何人

definitions.meaning: 无人，没有人；没有任何人

examples.english: I knocked on the door but nobody answered.
examples.chinese: 我敲了敲门，但没人应门。

examples.english: A man in my position has nothing to fear from a nobody like you.
examples.chinese: 在我这样职位的一个男人没什么好怕像你这样一个无名之辈的。

chineseDefinition: n. 马；骑兵；脚架；海洛因

examples.english: a horse and cart
examples.chinese: 一辆马车

examples.english: Lee had never ridden a horse before.
examples.chinese: 李以前从未骑过马。

chineseDefinition: adj. 令人愉快的，舒适的；讨人喜欢的，和蔼可亲的

definitions.meaning: 令人愉快的，舒适的；讨人喜欢的，和蔼可亲的

examples.english: It had been a pleasant evening.
examples.chinese: 那是个愉快的夜晚。

examples.english: the pleasant climate of Southern California
examples.chinese: 南加利福尼亚的宜人气候

chineseDefinition: v. 锁，锁上；隐藏

examples.english: Did you lock the car?
examples.chinese: 你把汽车锁好了吗？

examples.english: I can’t get this drawer to lock.
examples.chinese: 我没法把这个抽屉锁上。

chineseDefinition: n. 橡皮；擦除器；[计] 清除器

definitions.meaning: 橡皮；擦除器；[计] 清除器

chineseDefinition: n. 淋浴；（倾泻般出现的）一阵，一大批；阵雨

definitions.meaning: 淋浴；（倾泻般出现的）一阵，一大批；阵雨

examples.english: Why does the phone always ring when I’m in the shower?
examples.chinese: 为什么电话铃总是在我洗澡的时候响？

examples.english: I’d like to use the shower if that’s all right.
examples.chinese: 如果可以的话，我想用一下这里的淋浴。

chineseDefinition: v. 回答；[法] 答辩；回击

examples.english: I asked Clive where he was going, but he didn’t reply.
examples.chinese: 我问克莱夫到哪儿去，但他没有回答。

examples.english: Sorry it took me so long to reply.
examples.chinese: 抱歉，我过了这么久才回复。

chineseDefinition: n. （美）雨衣

examples.english: He dipped in his raincoat pocket.
examples.chinese: 他把手深深地伸进雨衣口袋里。

examples.english: The dark clouds remembered me to take my raincoat along.
examples.chinese: 乌云提醒我带上雨衣。

chineseDefinition: n. 月的第六日，（与the连用的）第六个；六分之一

definitions.meaning: 月的第六日，（与the连用的）第六个；六分之一
（与 the 连用）第六的，第六个的；六分之一的

examples.english: About one sixth of the children admitted to taking drugs.
examples.chinese: 大约六分之一的儿童承认吸毒。

chineseDefinition: n. 遗憾；抱歉；悲叹

examples.english: It is with great regret that I must decline your offer.
examples.chinese: 很遗憾，我不得不谢绝你的好意。

chineseDefinition: v. 给…穿衣

examples.english: Can you wait a minute? I’m just getting dressed .
examples.chinese: 稍等一会儿，我穿下衣服就好。

examples.english: She dressed quickly and went out of the house.
examples.chinese: 她很快穿好衣服，走到房子外面。

chineseDefinition: adj. 疯狂的；狂热的，着迷的

examples.english: The neighbours must think we’re crazy.
examples.chinese: 邻居一定会认为我们疯了。

examples.english: It’s an absolutely crazy idea .
examples.chinese: 那绝对是个荒唐的想法。

chineseDefinition: v. 学习；得知；认识到

examples.english: What’s the best way to learn a language?
examples.chinese: 学习语言的最佳方法是什么？

examples.english: The teacher’s task is to help the pupil learn.
examples.chinese: 老师的任务是帮助学生学习。

chineseDefinition: n. 冰；冰淇淋；矜持；（俚）钻石

examples.english: Would you like some ice in your drink?
examples.chinese: 你饮料中要放点冰块吗？

examples.english: Her hands were as cold as ice.
examples.chinese: 她双手冰冷。

chineseDefinition: n. 财富，财产；财宝；珍品

examples.english: The Book of Kells is Trinity College’s greatest treasure.
examples.chinese: 《凯尔经》是三一学院的镇院之宝。

chineseDefinition: n. 页；记录；大事件，时期；男侍者

definitions.meaning: 页；记录；大事件，时期；男侍者

examples.english: The full address is given on page 15.
examples.chinese: 详细地址见第15页。

examples.english: You will find the answers over the page .
examples.chinese: 答案见下页。

chineseDefinition: adj. 塑料的；（外科）造型的；可塑的

definitions.meaning: 塑料的；（外科）造型的；可塑的

examples.english: a plastic spoon
examples.chinese: 塑料汤匙

examples.english: plastic bags
examples.chinese: 塑料袋

chineseDefinition: n. 雨；下雨；雨天；雨季

examples.english: a night of wind and rain
examples.chinese: 风雨交加的夜晚

examples.english: There will be heavy rain in most parts of the country.
examples.chinese: 全国大部分地区将有大雨。

chineseDefinition: n. 旅馆，饭店；客栈

examples.english: I’ve booked the flights and the hotel.
examples.chinese: 我已订好机票和酒店。

examples.english: We’ll be staying at the Hotel Ibis.
examples.chinese: 我们将住在宜必思酒店。

chineseDefinition: n. 面条；笨蛋

examples.english: Serve the meat with rice or noodles.
examples.chinese: 肉配米饭或面条一起上。

chineseDefinition: v. 解谜；给出谜；充满于

definitions.meaning: 谜语；粗筛；谜一般的人、东西、事情等

examples.english: See if you can solve this riddle .
examples.chinese: 看看你能不能猜出这个谜语。

chineseDefinition: n. 十三；十三岁；十三个

examples.english: They’ve only sold thirteen tickets so far.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止他们仅仅售出13张票。

examples.english: When it happened, I was thirteen (= 13 years old ) .
examples.chinese: 那事发生时，我13岁。

chineseDefinition: adj. 最小的；最少的（little的最高级）

definitions.meaning: 最小的；最少的（little的最高级）

examples.english: I try to offend the least amount of people possible.
examples.chinese: 我尽可能少得罪人。

chineseDefinition: n. 守卫；警戒；护卫队；防护装置

definitions.meaning: 守卫；警戒；护卫队；防护装置

examples.english: The prisoners overpowered their guards and locked them in a cell.
examples.chinese: 囚犯们制服了卫兵，并把他们锁在一个牢房里。

chineseDefinition: n. 对；夫妇；数个

examples.english: a newly married couple
examples.chinese: 一对新婚夫妇

examples.english: the couple next door
examples.chinese: 隔壁的那对夫妇

chineseDefinition: v. 描述，形容；描绘

examples.english: The police asked her to describe the man.
examples.chinese: 警察叫她描述一下那名男子。

examples.english: Another approach to the problem is described in Chapter 3.
examples.chinese: 这个问题的另一种解决方法在第三章有所阐述。

chineseDefinition: n. 空气，大气；天空；样子；曲调

definitions.meaning: 空气，大气；天空；样子；曲调

examples.english: Let’s go outside and get some fresh air.
examples.chinese: 我们出去呼吸些新鲜空气吧。

examples.english: You need to put some air in the tyres.
examples.chinese: 你得给轮胎充气了。

chineseDefinition: v. 憎恨；厌恶；遗憾

examples.english: Why do you hate me so much?
examples.chinese: 你为什么那么恨我？

chineseDefinition: adj. 少的，小的；微弱的；几乎没有的；不重要的；幼小的

definitions.meaning: 少的，小的；微弱的；几乎没有的；不重要的；幼小的

examples.english: a small piece of paper
examples.chinese: 一小片纸

examples.english: a small car
examples.chinese: 一辆小汽车

chineseDefinition: n. 视力；景象；眼界；见解

examples.english: Anne’s sight is very good for someone of her age.
examples.chinese: 安妮的视力对于她这个年龄的人来说算是非常好的。

examples.english: He began to lose his sight six years ago.
examples.chinese: 六年前他开始视力衰退。

chineseDefinition: v. 避免；避开，躲避；消除

examples.english: Road safety is taught to young children to avoid road accidents.
examples.chinese: 小孩子受到道路安全知识的教育，以避免交通事故。

examples.english: It is important to take measures to avoid the risk of fire.
examples.chinese: 采取措施避免火灾风险很重要。

chineseDefinition: n. 科学；技术；学科；理科

examples.english: Many leading scientists do not consider that science can give absolutely reliable knowledge.
examples.chinese: 许多杰出科学家都不认为科学能够提供绝对可靠的知识。

examples.english: the founder of modern science, Isaac Newton
examples.chinese: 现代科学创始人艾萨克·牛顿

chineseDefinition: adj. 饥饿的；渴望的；荒年的；不毛的

definitions.meaning: 饥饿的；渴望的；荒年的；不毛的

examples.english: I was cold, tired, and hungry.
examples.chinese: 我又冷，又累，又饿。

examples.english: If you get hungry , there’s some cold chicken in the fridge.
examples.chinese: 你要是饿了，冰箱里有些冷鸡肉。

chineseDefinition: v. 提出；介绍；呈现；赠送

examples.english: She was presented with an award .
examples.chinese: 她被授予一个奖项。

chineseDefinition: n. 夫人；女士；鸨母

examples.english: Are you being served, Madam?
examples.chinese: 有人接待您吗，夫人？

chineseDefinition: n. 浴室；厕所；盥洗室

examples.english: Where’s the bathroom?
examples.chinese: 洗手间在哪里？

chineseDefinition: n. 山羊；替罪羊（美俚）；色鬼（美俚）

definitions.meaning: 山羊；替罪羊（美俚）；色鬼（美俚）

chineseDefinition: n. 及格；经过；护照；途径；传球

definitions.meaning: 及格；经过；护照；途径；传球

examples.english: You will need at least three passes to get onto the course.
examples.chinese: 你至少需要三门及格才能上这门课。

examples.english: The pass mark (= the mark you need to be successful ) is 55%.
examples.chinese: 及格分数是55分。

chineseDefinition: n. 男孩；男人

examples.english: The boys wanted to play football.
examples.chinese: 男孩子们想踢足球。

examples.english: boys and girls aged 11–18
examples.chinese: 11到18岁之间的男孩和女孩

chineseDefinition: adj. 年轻的；初期的；没有经验的

definitions.meaning: 年轻的；初期的；没有经验的

examples.english: a young child
examples.chinese: 幼儿

examples.english: He’s younger than me.
examples.chinese: 他比我小。

chineseDefinition: n. 牛仔裤；工装裤

examples.english: ...a young man in jeans and a worn T-shirt.
examples.chinese: …一个穿着牛仔裤和破旧T恤衫的年轻人。

chineseDefinition: n. 模型；典型；模范；模特儿；样式

definitions.meaning: 模型；典型；模范；模特儿；样式

examples.english: a working model (= one with parts which move ) of a steam engine
examples.chinese: 蒸汽机车的活动模型

examples.english: ...a model railway.
examples.chinese: …一个铁路模型。

chineseDefinition: v. 喜欢；想；愿意

examples.english: I like your jacket.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢你这件上衣。

examples.english: I don’t really like classical music.
examples.chinese: 我不是很喜欢古典音乐。

chineseDefinition: v. 推动，增加；对…施加压力，逼迫；按；说服

definitions.meaning: 推动，增加；对…施加压力，逼迫；按；说服
推，决心；大规模攻势；矢志的追求

examples.english: It didn’t move, so she pushed harder.
examples.chinese: 它一动不动，因此她加力去推。

examples.chinese: 我答应他想在秋千上荡多久我就推多久。

examples.chinese: 房子很漂亮，我们住在这里非常开心。

chineseDefinition: n. 厕所，盥洗室；梳妆，打扮

definitions.meaning: 她自己（she的反身代词）；她亲自

examples.chinese: 碎玻璃把她割伤了。

examples.english: She made herself a cup of coffee.
examples.chinese: 她给自己煮了杯咖啡。

chineseDefinition: n. 地球；地表，陆地；土地，土壤；尘事，俗事；兽穴

definitions.meaning: 地球；地表，陆地；土地，土壤；尘事，俗事；兽穴
把（电线）[电] 接地；盖（土）；追赶入洞穴

examples.english: the planet Earth
examples.chinese: 地球

chineseDefinition: n. 老人；长辈；年长者；父辈

definitions.meaning: 年长的；年龄较大的；资格老的

examples.chinese: 史蒂文患了流感，仍卧病在床。

examples.chinese: 她得了流感。

chineseDefinition: n. 卡片；纸牌；明信片

examples.chinese: 雇员在大门口必须出示自己的身份卡。

examples.english: I haven’t got my membership card yet.

examples.chinese: 我要感谢每一位鼓励和支持过我的人。

chineseDefinition: n. 酒，葡萄酒；紫红色

examples.chinese: 星期四下午有个会议。

examples.chinese: 下午很热。

examples.chinese: 和平不能通过武力来实现。

examples.chinese: 联合国将允许对侵犯这一地区的飞机采取军事行动。

examples.chinese: 哪边是东？

examples.chinese: 每日飞往迈阿密的航班

examples.chinese: 我这辈子从来没开过枪。

examples.chinese: 杰克用枪对着门口。

examples.english: Please remain seated until all the lights are on.
examples.chinese: 请留在座位上，直到灯全都亮起。

examples.chinese: 我们依然是朋友。

examples.chinese: 你能说几种语言？

examples.chinese: 最著名的英语诗歌之一

examples.chinese: 你随便坐吧。

examples.chinese: 这样的衣服到处都可以买到。

examples.chinese: 钢琴课

examples.chinese: 他想办法攒够钱买了一幢小房子。

examples.chinese: 我表弟马克帮我把包提了进来。

examples.chinese: …一幅我孙女阿梅莉亚的画像。

definitions.meaning: 分类；把…分等级；把…归入某等级，把…看作（或分类、归类）；把…编入某一班级
极好的；很好的，优秀的，出色的

examples.chinese: 他不得不在一个比他小的学生的班上呆了大约六个月。

pron. 我（宾格）

examples.chinese: 住手，你弄疼我了。

examples.chinese: 他给我买了一杯酒。

definitions.meaning: 听（诊）；测量，测…深；使发声；试探；宣告
声音，语音；噪音；海峡；吵闹；听力范围；[医] 探条
健全的，健康的；合理的；可靠的；有效彻底的

examples.chinese: 早先的几次研究也提出过类似的警告。

examples.chinese: 现在是一位美国的经济学家在提出警告。

examples.chinese: 烤牛肉

examples.chinese: 我们农场里奶牛和菜牛都有。

examples.chinese: 我们的主要海外市场是日本。

examples.chinese: 飞机降落在希思罗机场。

examples.chinese: 她的家人去机场送她。

examples.chinese: 他在1925年娶了贝亚。

examples.english: I’m going to ask her to marry me on St Valentine’s Day.
examples.chinese: 我打算在情人节向她求婚。

examples.chinese: 尖尖的铅笔

examples.english: a blue pencil
examples.chinese: 蓝色铅笔

examples.chinese: 我一会儿就来，但是我得先打个电话。

examples.chinese: 将近1,000英里的旅程

examples.chinese: 我再次见到她时，她压根儿没有理我。

examples.chinese: 我下周五就26岁了。

examples.chinese: 奇怪的噪声

examples.chinese: 他获刑12个月。

examples.chinese: 设x大于或等于零。

examples.chinese: 布里奇特不能来了，她生病了。

examples.chinese: 人体的化学组成

examples.chinese: 距内罗毕20英里的一个小村庄

examples.chinese: 我快20岁了。

examples.chinese: 任何建议都欢迎。

examples.chinese: 三艘大船驶了过去。

examples.chinese: 她一直想要乘船环游世界。

examples.chinese: 最后一集将于今晚播出。

examples.chinese: 正在准备期末考试的学生

examples.chinese: “我为什么不能去？”“因为你年纪太小。”

examples.chinese: 在面试时呈递的工作成果样本

examples.chinese: 她现在不能回家。看看她这副样子！

examples.chinese: 小汽车的车轮在路面的油迹上空转打了滑。

蒸馏；使…静止；使…平静下来

examples.chinese: 我还没粉刷完那间空房间。

examples.chinese: 你还留着朱莉的电话号码吗？

examples.chinese: 有些人认为宇宙是通过一次大爆炸创造出来的。

examples.chinese: 她的行为引起了很多问题。

进入；当选；（服装等）时髦；在屋里

examples.english: There’s some sugar in the cupboard.
examples.chinese: 碗橱里有一些糖。

examples.english: My mother was in the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 我母亲在厨房里。

examples.chinese: 工人阶级革命

examples.chinese: 在这些事情上我们都听她的。

examples.english: Are these all yours?
examples.chinese: 这些都是你的吗?

examples.chinese: 湖水冻得结结实实。

examples.english: It was good to be back on solid ground again.
examples.chinese: 又能踏上坚实的土地感觉真好。

examples.chinese: 那张桌子是什么形状的？

examples.chinese: 家庭作业是完成第14页的练习。

examples.chinese: …一首格列高利圣歌。

examples.chinese: 信上的日期是1962年8月30日。

examples.chinese: 许多年轻人上学时开始吸毒。

examples.chinese: 她总是看上去一副吸过毒的样子。

chineseDefinition: n. 碟；金属板；金属牌；感光底片

examples.english: The brass plate on the door said ‘Dr Rackman’.
examples.chinese: 黄铜门牌上写着“雷克曼博士”。

examples.chinese: 保险单

chineseDefinition: n. 海；海洋；许多；大量

examples.chinese: 杰伊脱光衣服奔入海里。

examples.chinese: 大部分出口商品都走海路。

examples.english: Is that the right time ?
examples.chinese: 那个时间对吗？

definitions.meaning: 百分比，百分率；部分；百分数

examples.chinese: 但是还有十亿多的人不在其中，他们不在其中的百分之一，也不再其中的两百分之一或者三百分之一的其中。

definitions.meaning: 角落，拐角处；地区，偏僻处；困境，窘境

examples.english: He pulled a dirty handkerchief out by its corner and waved it at me.
examples.chinese: 他拽出一块脏手帕，捏着一角向我挥动。

examples.chinese: 我喜欢查利，遗憾的是他得和那个糟糕的女人结婚。

chineseDefinition: n. 毛巾，手巾；[纸] 纸巾

examples.chinese: 你有没有干净毛巾给我用？

chineseDefinition: adj. [数] 偶数的；平坦的；相等的

definitions.meaning: [数] 偶数的；平坦的；相等的

examples.english: The floor must be completely even before we lay the tiles.
examples.chinese: 地面必须完全平整后才能铺地砖。

examples.english: You need a flat, even surface to work on.
examples.chinese: 你需要在一个平整的台面上干活。

chineseDefinition: n. 圣诞节；圣诞节期间

examples.english: Are you going home for Christmas?
examples.chinese: 你回家过圣诞节吗？

examples.english: a Christmas present
examples.chinese: 圣诞礼物

chineseDefinition: n. 平日，普通日；工作日

examples.english: If you want to avoid the crowds, it's best to come on a weekday.
examples.chinese: 如果你想避开人流，最好在工作日来。

chineseDefinition: adv. 如此，这么；确是如此

examples.english: The troops will not advance until ordered to do so .
examples.chinese: 在接到命令之前，部队不会前进。

examples.english: Did Luke sell them? And, if so , what happened to the money?
examples.chinese: 卢克把它们卖了吗？如果是这样的话，那钱到哪里去了？

chineseDefinition: adj. 难过的；悲哀的，令人悲痛的；凄惨的，阴郁的（形容颜色）

definitions.meaning: 难过的；悲哀的，令人悲痛的；凄惨的，阴郁的（形容颜色）

examples.english: Sorry to hear the sad news .
examples.chinese: 听到这令人伤心的消息我很难过。

chineseDefinition: adj. 干的；口渴的；枯燥无味的；禁酒的

definitions.meaning: 干的；口渴的；枯燥无味的；禁酒的

examples.english: I need to change into some dry clothes .
examples.chinese: 我要换上干衣服。

examples.english: Make sure that the surface is clean and dry before you start to paint.
examples.chinese: 油漆之前一定先要确保表面清洁干燥。

chineseDefinition: n. 花园；菜园

examples.english: He’s outside in the garden.
examples.chinese: 他在外面花园里。

examples.english: Grace brought us some flowers from her garden.
examples.chinese: 格雷丝给我们送来一些她花园里的花。

chineseDefinition: adj. 微小的；很少的

examples.english: a tiny community in the Midwest
examples.chinese: 中西部地区一个极小的社区

examples.english: The earrings were tiny.
examples.chinese: 耳环很小。

chineseDefinition: v. 将…装入密封罐中保存

definitions.meaning: 能； 能够； 可以； 可能
罐头； （用金属或塑料制作的）容器； （马口铁或其他金属制作的）食品罐头

examples.english: Here they are – I can see their car.
examples.chinese: 他们来了——我看到他们的汽车了。

examples.english: Can you smell something burning?
examples.chinese: 你闻到什么东西烧焦了吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 英里；一英里赛跑；较大的距离

definitions.meaning: 英里；一英里赛跑；较大的距离

examples.english: It’s 40 miles from here to the Polish border.
examples.chinese: 从这里到波兰边界有40英里。

examples.english: an area 50 miles wide and 150 miles long
examples.chinese: 一片50英里宽、150英里长的地区

chineseDefinition: n. 加拿大（北美洲国家）

examples.english: She was domiciliated in Canada.
examples.chinese: 她在加拿大定居。

examples.english: Canada produces high-guality wheat.
examples.chinese: 加拿大出产优质小麦。

chineseDefinition: prep. 离开；脱落

examples.english: How are you off for sports equipment? (= do you have enough? )
examples.chinese: 你的体育运动装备够不够？

chineseDefinition: v. 允许；给予；认可

examples.english: We don’t allow diving in the pool.
examples.chinese: 泳池内禁止跳水。

chineseDefinition: v. 邀请，招待；招致

examples.english: I’m afraid I wasn’t invited.
examples.chinese: 恐怕我没有受到邀请。

chineseDefinition: n. 思想；思考；想法；关心

definitions.meaning: 想，思考；认为（think的过去式和过去分词）

examples.english: It’s an interesting thought.
examples.chinese: 这想法很有趣。

examples.english: The thought that I might not have a job next year is a bit troubling.
examples.chinese: 想到明年可能失业我有点心烦。

chineseDefinition: adj. （男子）英俊的；可观的；大方的，慷慨的；健美而端庄的

definitions.meaning: （男子）英俊的；可观的；大方的，慷慨的；健美而端庄的

examples.english: He managed to make a handsome profit out of the deal.
examples.chinese: 他从这笔买卖中赚取了丰厚的利润。

examples.english: a handsome fee
examples.chinese: 一大笔费用

chineseDefinition: n. 家务事

examples.english: Men are doing more housework nowadays.
examples.chinese: 现今男人正在承担越来越多的家务。

chineseDefinition: pron. 我自己；我亲自；我的正常的健康状况和正常情绪

definitions.meaning: 我自己；我亲自；我的正常的健康状况和正常情绪

examples.english: I blame myself for what has happened.
examples.chinese: 发生这一切都怪我自己。

examples.english: I can look after myself.
examples.chinese: 我可以照顾好自己。

chineseDefinition: n. 四月

examples.english: The changes will be introduced in April.
examples.chinese: 这些变更将于4月实施。

chineseDefinition: v. 激增；膨胀如气球

examples.english: The company’s debt has ballooned in the past year.
examples.chinese: 在过去一年里，公司的债务激增。

chineseDefinition: n. 天空；顶点

definitions.meaning: 把…投向空中；把…挂得过高

examples.english: The sky grew dark, and a cold rain began to fall.
examples.chinese: 天色转暗，开始下起冰冷的雨来。

examples.english: A shooting star sped across the sky.
examples.chinese: 一颗流星划过天空。

chineseDefinition: n. 暴风雨；大动荡

definitions.meaning: 起风暴；横冲直撞；狂怒咆哮

examples.english: The weather forecast is for severe storms tonight.
examples.chinese: 天气预报说今晚有强暴风雨。

examples.english: Twenty people were killed when storms struck the Midwest.
examples.chinese: 暴风雨袭击中西部，造成20人死亡。

chineseDefinition: n. 小点心，饼干

examples.english: a packet of chocolate biscuits
examples.chinese: 一包巧克力饼干

examples.english: cheese and biscuits
examples.chinese: 奶酪和饼干

chineseDefinition: adv. 向下，下去；在下面

definitions.meaning: 软毛，绒毛；[地质] 开阔的高地

examples.english: David bent down to tie his shoelace.
examples.chinese: 戴维弯腰系鞋带。

examples.english: Get down off the table.
examples.chinese: 从桌子上下来。

chineseDefinition: n. 亚洲人

examples.english: Many of the shops were run by Asians.
examples.chinese: 这些商店中有许多是由亚洲人经营的。

chineseDefinition: n. [法] 法案；广告；账单；[金融] 票据；钞票；清单

definitions.meaning: [法] 法案；广告；账单；[金融] 票据；钞票；清单
宣布；开账单；用海报宣传

examples.english: Have you paid the phone bill?
examples.chinese: 电话费你付了吗？

chineseDefinition: v. 欣赏，享受；喜爱；使过得快活

definitions.meaning: 欣赏，享受；喜爱；使过得快活

examples.english: The average German will enjoy 40 days' paid holiday this year.
examples.chinese: 德国人今年平均将享有40天带薪假期。

chineseDefinition: n. 心脏；感情；勇气；心形；要点

definitions.meaning: 心脏；感情；勇气；心形；要点

examples.english: Regular exercise is good for the heart.
examples.chinese: 经常锻炼对心脏有好处。

examples.english: Can you hear my heart beating?
examples.chinese: 你能听见我的心跳吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 南方，南边；南部

examples.english: Which way is south?
examples.chinese: 哪面是南？

chineseDefinition: adj. 活泼的；生动的；真实的；生气勃勃的

definitions.meaning: 活泼的；生动的；真实的；生气勃勃的

examples.english: a lively child
examples.chinese: 精力充沛的孩子

chineseDefinition: adj. 迅速的，急促的；飞快的；险峻的

definitions.meaning: 迅速的，急促的；飞快的；险峻的
急流；高速交通工具，高速交通网

examples.english: The patient made a rapid recovery.
examples.chinese: 病人迅速康复。

examples.english: a period of rapid decline
examples.chinese: 迅速衰退期

chineseDefinition: n. 青蛙；[铁路] 辙叉；饰扣

definitions.meaning: 青蛙；[铁路] 辙叉；饰扣

examples.english: The tadpole has become a frog.
examples.chinese: 这个蝌蚪已长成青蛙。

examples.english: A tadpole metamorphoses into a frog.
examples.chinese: 蝌蚪会变成青蛙。

chineseDefinition: n. 控制；管理；抑制；操纵装置

definitions.meaning: 控制；管理；抑制；操纵装置

examples.english: The disease robs you of muscle control.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病会让你丧失肌肉控制力。

examples.english: ‘Do you need any help?’ ‘No. It’s under control , thanks.’
examples.chinese: “你需要帮忙吗？”“不用，已经搞定了。谢谢。”

chineseDefinition: n. [口腔] 牙痛

examples.english: I’ve got toothache .
examples.chinese: 我牙痛。

examples.english: I had terrible toothache all last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我一整夜牙疼得厉害。

chineseDefinition: adj. 聪明的；机灵的；熟练的

examples.english: a clever man
examples.chinese: 聪明的人

chineseDefinition: v. 提高；筹集；养育；升起

examples.english: Can you raise the lamp so I can see?
examples.chinese: 你能把灯举高点好让我看清吗？

examples.english: William raised his hat and smiled at her.
examples.chinese: 威廉抬一抬帽子，朝她笑了笑。

examples.chinese: 其他国家很可能会效法美国。

examples.english: The Government should give industry a lead in tackling racism (= show what other people should do ).
examples.chinese: 政府在处理种族歧视问题上应该为企业树立榜样。

chineseDefinition: v. 处理；给予；分配；发牌

examples.english: Whose turn is it to deal?
examples.chinese: 轮到谁发牌了？

chineseDefinition: n. 包，包裹；套装软件，[计] 程序包

definitions.meaning: 包，包裹；套装软件，[计] 程序包

examples.english: There’s a package here for a Miami Lakes address.
examples.chinese: 这里有一个寄往迈阿密湖的包裹。

chineseDefinition: pron. 什么；多么；多少

definitions.meaning: 到什么程度，在哪一方面

examples.english: What are you doing?
examples.chinese: 你在做什么？

examples.english: What subjects did you enjoy most?
examples.chinese: 你最喜欢什么学科？

chineseDefinition: n. 猪；猪肉

examples.english: He kept pigs and poultry.
examples.chinese: 他养过猪和家禽。

chineseDefinition: n. 头；头痛；上端；最前的部分；理解力

definitions.meaning: 头；头痛；上端；最前的部分；理解力
前进；用头顶；作为…的首领；站在…的前头；给…加标题

examples.english: He kissed the top of her head.
examples.chinese: 他吻了一下她的头顶。

examples.english: Alan fell asleep as soon as he put his head on the pillow.
examples.chinese: 艾伦头一挨枕头就睡着了。

examples.chinese: 小册子中的建议反映了我们所获得的实践经验。

examples.english: I had some experience in fashion design.
examples.chinese: 我有一些时装设计方面的经验。

examples.chinese: 要惩罚孩子，不应该用打的方式。

examples.chinese: 他承诺要严惩任何在选举中有欺诈行为的官员。

definitions.meaning: 开发；进步；使成长；使显影

examples.english: Knowledge in the field of genetics has been developing very rapidly.
examples.chinese: 遗传学领域的知识发展非常迅速。

examples.english: Corsica has developed its economy around the tourist industry.
examples.chinese: 科西嘉岛的经济是围绕旅游业发展起来的。

chineseDefinition: n. 生日，诞辰；诞生的日子

examples.chinese: 星期一是我的生日。

examples.english: My aunt called to wish me a happy birthday.
examples.chinese: 我姑妈打电话来祝我生日快乐。

examples.chinese: 科学家们说他们已经搜集到比预期更多的数据。

chineseDefinition: v. 失败，不及格；破产；缺乏；衰退

definitions.meaning: 失败，不及格；破产；缺乏；衰退

examples.english: It looks likely that the peace talks will fail.
examples.chinese: 看来和平谈判可能会失败。

examples.english: Millions of people have tried to quit smoking and failed miserably (= been completely unsuccessful ).
examples.chinese: 数百万人戒过烟，都以惨败告终。

chineseDefinition: n. 摇摆；摆动；秋千；音律；涨落

definitions.meaning: 摇摆；摆动；秋千；音律；涨落
摇摆；转向；悬挂；大摇大摆地行走
旋转的；悬挂的；强节奏爵士音乐的

examples.english: kids playing on the swings
examples.chinese: 荡秋千的孩子们

examples.english: a porch swing
examples.chinese: 门廊上的秋千

examples.english: If everyone is ready, I’ll begin.
examples.chinese: 如果大家都准备好了，我就开始。

examples.english: Send my best wishes to everyone in the family.
examples.chinese: 请向全家人致以最美好的祝愿。

chineseDefinition: pron. 这；这个；这里

examples.english: The table’s about this high and this wide.
examples.chinese: 那桌子大约有这么高，这么宽。

examples.english: You need to cut about this much off the end of the pipe.
examples.chinese: 你要从管子头上切下大约这么多。

chineseDefinition: n. 牛奶；乳状物

examples.english: a bottle of milk
examples.chinese: 一瓶奶

examples.english: Would you like some milk in your tea?
examples.chinese: 你茶里要加点奶吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 浪费；废物；荒地；损耗；地面风化物

definitions.meaning: 浪费；废物；荒地；损耗；地面风化物

examples.english: excessive waste in state spending
examples.chinese: 政府支出方面的过度浪费

chineseDefinition: adj. 缺席的；缺少的；心不在焉的；茫然的

definitions.meaning: 缺席的；缺少的；心不在焉的；茫然的

examples.english: The dull, absent look on her face implied boredom.
examples.chinese: 她脸上呆滞、茫然的神情说明她觉得无聊了。

chineseDefinition: n. 明天；未来

examples.chinese: 明天会上见。

chineseDefinition: n. 因特网

examples.english: Do you have access to the Internet?
examples.chinese: 你上得了网吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 牙刷

examples.english: How do you choose your toothbrush?
examples.chinese: 你是如何选择你的牙刷的？

examples.english: Do not bring flowers on your first date: bring your toothbrush and your cat.
examples.chinese: 第一次约会的时候不要带鲜花，请带上你的牙刷和你的猫。

chineseDefinition: adj. 近的；亲近的；近似的

examples.chinese: 房子很漂亮，但离最近的城镇也有20英里。

examples.english: We can meet at the pub or in the restaurant, whichever’s nearer for you.
examples.chinese: 我们可以在酒吧或餐馆见面，看哪个离你近一些。

chineseDefinition: n. 身体；主体；大量；团体；主要部分

definitions.meaning: 身体；主体；大量；团体；主要部分

examples.english: the human body
examples.chinese: 人体

examples.english: My fingers were numb and my whole body ached.
examples.chinese: 我手指麻木，浑身疼痛。

definitions.meaning: 纵容，娇纵；把……当婴儿般对待

examples.english: The baby is crying.
examples.chinese: 宝宝在哭。

examples.english: She gave birth to a baby on Thursday.
examples.chinese: 她于星期四产下一名婴儿。

chineseDefinition: n. 天花板；上限

examples.english: rooms with high ceilings
examples.chinese: 天花板很高的房间

examples.english: a light hanging from the ceiling
examples.chinese: 吊在天花板上的灯

chineseDefinition: adj. 诚实的，实在的；可靠的；坦率的

definitions.meaning: 诚实的，实在的；可靠的；坦率的

examples.english: He was a hard-working, honest man.
examples.chinese: 他勤奋老实。

examples.english: Ann had an honest face.
examples.chinese: 安有一张诚实的面孔。

chineseDefinition: adj. 中间的，中部的；中级的，中等的

definitions.meaning: 中间的，中部的；中级的，中等的

examples.english: driving in the middle lane of the motorway
examples.chinese: 在高速公路的中间车道上行驶

examples.english: the middle drawer of the filing cabinet
examples.chinese: 档案柜中间的抽屉

chineseDefinition: adv. 离去，离开；在远处

examples.english: Go away!
examples.chinese: 走开！

examples.english: Dinah was crying as she drove slowly away.
examples.chinese: 黛娜一边哭一边慢慢地开车走了。

examples.chinese: 珍妮特去世以后生活似乎失去了意义。

chineseDefinition: n. 晚上；傍晚；（联欢性的）晚会；后期

definitions.meaning: 晚上；傍晚；（联欢性的）晚会；后期
在晚上的；为晚上的；晚上用的

examples.english: I do most of my studying in the evening.
examples.chinese: 我学习大都在晚上。

examples.english: I’m usually out on Friday evenings.
examples.chinese: 周五晚上我通常都不在家。

chineseDefinition: adj. 美丽的

examples.english: She was even more beautiful than I had remembered.
examples.chinese: 她比我记忆中更美。

examples.english: a beautiful bunch of flowers
examples.chinese: 一束美丽的花

chineseDefinition: n. 礼物；天赋；赠品

examples.english: The earrings were a gift from my aunt.
examples.chinese: 这副耳环是我姑姑送给我的礼物。

examples.english: The clock was given as a retirement gift when he left the police.
examples.chinese: 这个钟表是他退休离开警局时收到的礼物。

chineseDefinition: n. 猪肉

examples.english: pork chops
examples.chinese: 猪排

chineseDefinition: v. 试图，努力；试验；审判；考验

definitions.meaning: 试图，努力；试验；审判；考验

examples.chinese: 我们休息一下，然后再试。

examples.english: I tried everything to lose weight with no success.
examples.chinese: 我试了各种方法减肥，但都没有成功。

chineseDefinition: n. 猴子；顽童

examples.chinese: 别这样，你这个小淘气鬼！

chineseDefinition: adj. 著名的；极好的，非常令人满意的

examples.english: a famous actor
examples.chinese: 著名演员

examples.english: Many famous people have stayed in the hotel.
examples.chinese: 许多名人都曾下榻这家酒店。

chineseDefinition: adj. 绿色的；青春的

examples.english: beautiful green eyes
examples.chinese: 漂亮的碧眼

examples.english: Raw coffee beans are green in colour.
examples.chinese: 生咖啡豆是绿色的。

chineseDefinition: n. 路线，航线；排；绳

definitions.meaning: 排成一行；划线于；以线条标示；使…起皱纹

examples.english: Draw a straight line across the top of the page.
examples.chinese: 在这一页的上方画一条直线。

examples.english: Sign your name on the dotted line (= line made up of a series of dots ).
examples.chinese: 在虚线上签名。

chineseDefinition: n. 工厂；制造厂；代理店

examples.english: a car factory
examples.chinese: 汽车制造厂

examples.english: factory workers
examples.chinese: 工厂工人

chineseDefinition: n. 星期六

examples.english: The festivities begin Saturday.
examples.chinese: 庆祝活动从星期六开始。

chineseDefinition: n. 麻烦；烦恼；故障；动乱

examples.english: Recent stock market losses point to trouble ahead.
examples.chinese: 最近股市的下跌预示着未来将有麻烦。

chineseDefinition: adj. 仔细的，小心的

examples.english: Be careful - the floor’s slippery.
examples.chinese: 小心——地板很滑。

chineseDefinition: n. 卷心菜，甘蓝菜，洋白菜；（俚)脑袋；（非正式、侮辱）植物人（常用于英式英语）；（俚）钱，尤指纸币（常用于美式俚语）

definitions.meaning: 卷心菜，甘蓝菜，洋白菜；（俚)脑袋；（非正式、侮辱）植物人（常用于英式英语）；（俚）钱，尤指纸币（常用于美式俚语）

chineseDefinition: n. 胜利者

examples.english: Five lucky winners will each receive a signed copy of the album.
examples.chinese: 五位幸运的获胜者每人将得到一张签名专辑。

examples.english: As a jockey he rode 10 winners.
examples.chinese: 作为骑师他曾十度驾驭获胜赛马。

chineseDefinition: v. 保护，防卫；警戒

examples.english: Are we doing enough to protect the environment?
examples.chinese: 我们在保护环境方面做得够吗？

chineseDefinition: v. 改正；告诫

examples.english: Correct my pronunciation if it’s wrong.
examples.chinese: 如果我的发音错了，请给我纠正。

examples.english: ‘She’s in Ireland now.’ ‘She was,’ Farrell corrected him.
examples.chinese: “她现在在爱尔兰。”“她之前在爱尔兰。”法雷尔纠正他道。

chineseDefinition: v. 需要；希望；应该；缺少

examples.english: I really want a drink.
examples.chinese: 我很想喝一杯。

examples.english: What do you want for your birthday?
examples.chinese: 你生日想要什么礼物？

chineseDefinition: v. 使休息，使轻松；把…寄托于

definitions.meaning: 使休息，使轻松；把…寄托于
休息，静止；休息时间；剩余部分；支架

examples.english: If you’re tired, we’ll stop and rest for a while.
examples.chinese: 如果你累了，我们就停下来歇一会儿。

chineseDefinition: adj. 困难的；不随和的；执拗的

definitions.meaning: 困难的；不随和的；执拗的

examples.english: a difficult question
examples.chinese: 难解的问题

examples.english: an immensely difficult task
examples.chinese: 极为艰巨的任务

chineseDefinition: n. 口音；重音；强调；特点；重音符号

definitions.meaning: 口音；重音；强调；特点；重音符号

examples.english: He had a strong Irish accent
examples.chinese: 他有浓重的爱尔兰口音。

chineseDefinition: pron. 自己；亲自

examples.english: It is only through study that one really begins to know oneself.
examples.chinese: 只有通过学习，一个人才能真正了解自己。

chineseDefinition: v. 上煤；加煤

examples.english: Put some coal on the fire.
examples.chinese: 往火里加点煤。

examples.english: the coal mining industry
examples.chinese: 采煤业

chineseDefinition: v. 铸造（货币）；杜撰，创造

examples.english: The word ‘aromatherapy’ was coined in the 1920s. aromatherapy
examples.chinese: （芳香疗法）这个词是在20世纪20年代创造出来的。

chineseDefinition: adj. 实际的；真实的；实在的

examples.english: There is a real danger that the disease might spread.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病确实有蔓延的危险。

examples.english: We need to tackle the real problems of unemployment and poverty.
examples.chinese: 我们需要解决失业和贫穷这两个实际问题。

chineseDefinition: adv. 可是，虽然；不过；然而

examples.english: Two heart attacks in a year. It hasn’t stopped him smoking, though.
examples.chinese: 一年里心脏病发作了两次，可是那也没让他把烟戒掉。

examples.english: It sounds like a lot of fun. Isn’t it rather risky though?
examples.chinese: 听上去很有趣。可是这不是也很危险吗？

chineseDefinition: v. 划分；除；分开；使产生分歧

definitions.meaning: 划分；除；分开；使产生分歧

examples.english: The physical benefits of exercise can be divided into three factors.
examples.chinese: 锻炼对身体的好处可以分成3个方面。

chineseDefinition: n. 叶子；（书籍等的）一张；扇页

definitions.meaning: 叶子；（书籍等的）一张；扇页

examples.english: a flowering bush with large shiny leaves
examples.chinese: 叶子大而油亮的开花灌木

chineseDefinition: adj. 第四的，第四个的；四分之一的

definitions.meaning: 第四的，第四个的；四分之一的
第四，月的第四日；四分之一

examples.english: in the fourth century
examples.chinese: 在四世纪

examples.english: her fourth birthday
examples.chinese: 她的四岁生日

chineseDefinition: n. 治疗，疗法；处理；对待

examples.english: Just lately, Kyra has been giving me the silent treatment (= refusing to speak to me because she is angry with me ) .
examples.chinese: 就在最近，凯拉一直对我不理不睬。

chineseDefinition: n. 技能，技巧；本领，技术

examples.english: Reading and writing are two different skills.
examples.chinese: 阅读和写作是两种不同的技能。

examples.english: Many jobs today require computer skills.
examples.chinese: 如今的许多工作都需要计算机技能。

chineseDefinition: pron. 他们的，她们的；它们的

examples.english: They talked her round to their position.
examples.chinese: 他们说服她同意他们的看法。

chineseDefinition: n. 危险；危险物，威胁

examples.english: Danger! No boats beyond this point.
examples.chinese: 危险！船只不可越过此处。

examples.english: The refugees believe that their lives are in danger .
examples.chinese: 难民认为他们有生命危险。

chineseDefinition: n. 交叉，十字；十字架，十字形物

definitions.meaning: 交叉，十字；十字架，十字形物
交叉的，相反的；乖戾的；生气的

examples.english: The by-pass crosses Wilton Lane shortly after a roundabout.
examples.chinese: 这条旁道绕过环岛后不久就和威尔顿巷相交。

chineseDefinition: n. 要点；得分；标点；[机] 尖端

definitions.meaning: 要点；得分；标点；[机] 尖端

examples.english: That’s a very interesting point.
examples.chinese: 那个观点很有趣。

examples.english: She made some extremely good points.
examples.chinese: 她提出了一些很不错的观点。

chineseDefinition: adv. 现在；如今；立刻

examples.english: She's a widow now.
examples.chinese: 她现在是一个寡妇。

examples.english: But we are now a much more fragmented society.
examples.chinese: 但是我们现在是一个更加四分五裂的社会。

chineseDefinition: n. 巫术；魔法；戏法

definitions.meaning: 不可思议的；有魔力的；魔术的

examples.english: Do you believe in magic?
examples.chinese: 你相信魔法吗？

chineseDefinition: aux. 将，将要；愿意

examples.english: Would you shut the window, please?
examples.chinese: 请把窗户关上，好吗？

examples.english: Would you mind waiting outside?
examples.chinese: 您在外面等好吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 电影；电影院；电影业，电影制作术

definitions.meaning: 电影；电影院；电影业，电影制作术

examples.english: It’s on at the local cinema.
examples.chinese: 此片正在当地影院上映。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在楼下

examples.english: Rosie ran downstairs to answer the door.
examples.chinese: 罗茜跑下楼去开门。

examples.english: Charles was downstairs in the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 查尔斯在楼下厨房里。

chineseDefinition: conj. 也不；既不

examples.english: Neither Oleg’s mother nor his father spoke English.
examples.chinese: 奥列格的父母都不会说英语。

examples.english: The equipment is neither accurate nor safe.
examples.chinese: 这台设备既不精确，也不安全。

chineseDefinition: adj. 下流的，卑鄙的；肮脏的；恶劣的；暗淡的

definitions.meaning: 下流的，卑鄙的；肮脏的；恶劣的；暗淡的

examples.english: a stack of dirty dishes in the sink
examples.chinese: 洗涤槽里的一堆脏碟子

examples.english: How did you get so dirty?
examples.chinese: 你怎么会弄得这么脏？

chineseDefinition: v. 呼吸；低语；松口气；（风）轻拂

definitions.meaning: 呼吸；低语；松口气；（风）轻拂

examples.english: The room filled with smoke, and it was becoming difficult to breathe.
examples.chinese: 房间里全是烟，呼吸越来越困难。

examples.english: People are concerned about the quality of the air they breathe.
examples.chinese: 人们关心他们所呼吸的空气的质量。

chineseDefinition: n. 脖子；衣领；海峡

examples.english: Mike rubbed the back of his neck.
examples.chinese: 迈克揉了揉后颈。

examples.english: You have a lot of tension in your neck muscles.
examples.chinese: 你的颈部肌肉很紧张。

chineseDefinition: n. 影响；势力；感化；有影响的人或事

definitions.meaning: 影响；势力；感化；有影响的人或事

examples.english: As a scientist, his influence was immense.
examples.chinese: 身为一名科学家，他的影响力极大。

chineseDefinition: adj. 贫穷的；可怜的；贫乏的；卑鄙的

definitions.meaning: 贫穷的；可怜的；贫乏的；卑鄙的

examples.english: Poor kid, he’s had a rough day.
examples.chinese: 可怜的孩子，今天他真倒霉。

examples.english: You poor thing , you’ve had a hard time of it, haven’t you?
examples.chinese: 可怜的东西，你过得很苦，是不是？

chineseDefinition: n. 星期日；礼拜日

examples.english: What are you doing Sunday?
examples.chinese: 你星期天做什么？

chineseDefinition: n. [计] 比特（二进位制信息单位）；少量；马嚼子；辅币；老一套；一点，一块

definitions.meaning: [计] 比特（二进位制信息单位）；少量；马嚼子；辅币；老一套；一点，一块

examples.english: He’s taken the engine to bits .
examples.chinese: 他把发动机拆开了。

chineseDefinition: n. 鸟；家伙；羽毛球

examples.english: wild birds
examples.chinese: 野鸟

examples.english: The dawn was filled with the sound of birds.
examples.chinese: 黎明时分，鸟鸣声不绝于耳。

chineseDefinition: v. 发生；碰巧；偶然遇到

examples.english: When did the accident happen?
examples.chinese: 事故什么时候发生的？

examples.english: It’s impossible to predict what will happen next.
examples.chinese: 不可能预测接下来会发生什么。

chineseDefinition: adj. 美味的；可口的

examples.english: ‘The meal was absolutely delicious,’ she said politely.
examples.chinese: “这顿饭味道好极了。” 她礼貌地说道。

examples.english: the delicious smell of new-mown grass
examples.chinese: 新修剪的草坪的芳香

chineseDefinition: n. 操作；经营；[外科] 手术；[数][计] 运算

definitions.meaning: 操作；经营；[外科] 手术；[数][计] 运算

examples.english: Many small businesses fail in the first year of operation.
examples.chinese: 许多小企业在经营的第一年就倒闭了。

chineseDefinition: n. 联营；撞球；水塘；共同资金

definitions.meaning: 联营；撞球；水塘；共同资金

examples.english: pools of water with tiny fish in them
examples.chinese: 有小鱼的一个个水池

examples.english: Mosquitoes breed in stagnant pools of water.
examples.chinese: 蚊子在死水塘中繁殖。

chineseDefinition: v. 滑冰；滑过

examples.english: The children skated on the frozen pond.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在结冰的池塘上滑冰。

chineseDefinition: adv. 错误地；邪恶地，不正当地

definitions.meaning: 错误地；邪恶地，不正当地
错误的；失常的；不适当的

examples.english: You’ve spelt my name wrong.
examples.chinese: 你把我的名字拼错了。

examples.english: What? Have I done it wrong ?
examples.chinese: 什么？我做得不对吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 一天；时期；白昼

examples.english: We spent three days in Paris.
examples.chinese: 我们在巴黎度过了三天。

examples.english: ‘What day is it today?’ ‘Friday.’
examples.chinese: “今天星期几？” “星期五。”

chineseDefinition: adj. 金色的，黄金般的；珍贵的；金制的

definitions.meaning: 金色的，黄金般的；珍贵的；金制的

examples.english: golden hair
examples.chinese: 金发

examples.english: golden sand
examples.chinese: 金色的沙

chineseDefinition: n. 借口；理由

examples.english: I’m tired of listening to his excuses.
examples.chinese: 我听厌了他的种种理由。

chineseDefinition: adj. 寂寞的；偏僻的

examples.english: a lonely old man
examples.chinese: 一个孤单的老人

examples.english: Don’t you get lonely being on your own all day?
examples.chinese: 你整天独自一人不感到寂寞吗？

chineseDefinition: adj. 沉默的；寂静的；无记载的

definitions.meaning: 沉默的；寂静的；无记载的

examples.english: The large house was silent and lonely.
examples.chinese: 这幢大房子寂静荒凉。

examples.english: At last the guns fell silent .
examples.chinese: 枪声终于沉寂了下来。

chineseDefinition: n. 诗

examples.english: ...a book of love poems.
examples.chinese: …一本爱情诗集。

chineseDefinition: adj. 晚的；迟的；已故的；最近的

definitions.meaning: 晚的；迟的；已故的；最近的

examples.english: Sorry I’m late – I overslept.
examples.chinese: 对不起，来晚了——我睡过头了。

examples.english: The train was even later than usual.
examples.chinese: 火车到得甚至比平时还晚。

chineseDefinition: n. 病，[医] 疾病；弊病

examples.english: His father died of heart disease.
examples.chinese: 他父亲死于心脏病。

examples.english: She contracted the disease while she was abroad on holiday.
examples.chinese: 她在国外度假时染上了这种疾病。

chineseDefinition: n. 铃，钟；钟声，铃声；钟状物

examples.english: church bells
examples.chinese: 教堂的钟

chineseDefinition: n. 实验室，研究室

examples.english: the school science lab
examples.chinese: 学校的科学实验室

chineseDefinition: n. 孙子；外孙

examples.english: My grandson's birthday was on Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 我孙子的生日是星期二。

chineseDefinition: adj. 受欢迎的

examples.english: I had the feeling I wasn’t really welcome.
examples.chinese: 我感觉到我其实不受欢迎。

examples.english: I didn’t feel welcome in the club.
examples.chinese: 我觉得我在俱乐部里不受欢迎。

chineseDefinition: n. 女儿；[遗][农学] 子代

examples.english: She’s got two daughters and one son.
examples.chinese: 她有两个女儿和一个儿子。

examples.english: our eldest daughter
examples.chinese: 我们的长女

chineseDefinition: n. 肉，肉类（食用）

examples.english: I gave up eating meat a few months ago.
examples.chinese: 我几个月以前开始不吃肉了。

examples.english: raw meat
examples.chinese: 生肉

chineseDefinition: n. 道路；小路；轨道

examples.english: I walked nervously up the garden path towards the front door.
examples.chinese: 我提心吊胆地沿着花园的小道向前门走去。

examples.english: a well-worn path across the grass
examples.chinese: 草地上被踏出的小径

chineseDefinition: adj. 两个的；两者的

examples.english: To help the talks along, both of us should make some concessions.
examples.chinese: 为了会谈有所进展，我们双方都得做出一些让步。

chineseDefinition: adv. 起来；上涨；向上

examples.english: We walked slowly up the hill.
examples.chinese: 我们慢慢地爬上山。

examples.english: She picked her jacket up off the floor.
examples.chinese: 她从地板上捡起外套。

chineseDefinition: adj. 可能的；合理的；合适的

definitions.meaning: 可能性；合适的人；可能的事物

examples.english: Is it possible toget tickets for the game?
examples.chinese: 有没有可能弄到比赛的门票？

examples.english: It might be possible for the documents to be sent over.
examples.chinese: 这些文件也许可以发送过去。

chineseDefinition: n. 事情；东西；事物；情况

examples.english: People say things they don’t mean when they are angry.
examples.chinese: 人生气时就会口不择言。

examples.english: It was a horrible thing to happen.
examples.chinese: 发生这样的事情太糟糕了。

chineseDefinition: n. 印度（南亚国家）

examples.english: Burma borders on India.
examples.chinese: 缅甸与印度毗邻。

examples.english: This book treats of the caste system in India.
examples.chinese: 这本书论述了印度的种姓制度。

chineseDefinition: v. 挑选；采摘；挖

examples.english: Students have to pick three courses from a list of 15.
examples.chinese: 学生必须从15门课中选修3门。

examples.english: I don’t know which colour to pick.
examples.chinese: 我不知道要选哪个颜色。

chineseDefinition: n. 区域，地区；面积；范围

examples.english: Only cheeses made in this area may be labelled ‘Roquefort.’
examples.chinese: 只有这个地区出产的干酪才能被称作“罗克福尔干酪”。

examples.english: Crime rates are much higher in urban areas.
examples.chinese: 城镇地区的犯罪率要高很多。

chineseDefinition: v. 说明；解释

examples.english: He carefully explained the procedure.
examples.chinese: 他仔细解释了程序。

chineseDefinition: adj. 社会的，社交的；群居的

examples.english: social issues, such as unemployment and education
examples.chinese: 失业和教育之类的社会问题

examples.english: the country’s serious social problems
examples.chinese: 该国严重的社会问题

chineseDefinition: v. 权衡；考虑；称…重量

examples.english: The young birds weigh only a few grams.
examples.chinese: 雏鸟重量只有几克。

examples.english: Do you know how much it weighs?
examples.chinese: 你知道它的重量吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 九，九个

examples.english: He’s only been in this job for nine months.
examples.chinese: 他干这份工作才九个月。

examples.english: We open at nine (= nine o’clock ).
examples.chinese: 我们9点开始营业。

chineseDefinition: neg. 没什么；毫不

examples.english: I owe him nothing.
examples.chinese: 我不欠他什么。

chineseDefinition: n. 工作；职业

examples.english: Do you enjoy your job?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢自己的工作吗？

examples.english: It was the first paid job I ever had.
examples.chinese: 这是我第一份拿工资的工作。

chineseDefinition: n. 博物馆

examples.english: the Museum of Modern Art
examples.chinese: 现代艺术博物馆

examples.english: The museum has an extensive collection of early photographs.
examples.chinese: 这座博物馆藏有大量早期的照片。

chineseDefinition: n. 里面；内部；内情；内脏

examples.english: The door had been locked from the inside.
examples.chinese: 门从里面锁上了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 有耐心的，能容忍的

examples.english: You’ll just have to be patient and wait till I’m off the phone.
examples.chinese: 你只能耐心点，等我打完电话。

chineseDefinition: n. 番茄，西红柿

examples.english: He staked his tomato vines with bamboo.
examples.chinese: 他用竹竿支撑起西红柿秧。

examples.english: The salmon was brought to the table whole, garnished with parsley and slices of tomato and cucumber.
examples.chinese: 整条大麻哈鱼被端上了桌，并用欧芹、西红柿片和黄瓜片作为花色配菜。

chineseDefinition: adj. 不同的；个别的，与众不同的

definitions.meaning: 不同的；个别的，与众不同的

examples.english: The place looks completely different now.
examples.chinese: 这地方现在完全变了。

examples.english: They decided to try a radically different approach.
examples.chinese: 他们决定尝试一种全然不同的办法。

chineseDefinition: n. [语] 单词；话语；消息；诺言；命令

definitions.meaning: [语] 单词；话语；消息；诺言；命令

examples.english: Write an essay of about five hundred words.
examples.chinese: 写一篇约500字的文章。

examples.english: What does that word mean?
examples.chinese: 那个单词是什么意思？

chineseDefinition: n. 女士，夫人；小姐；妻子

examples.english: Lady Spencer
examples.chinese: 斯宾塞夫人

chineseDefinition: n. 风筝

definitions.meaning: 使用空头支票；像风筝一样飞；轻快地移动

examples.english: She has a blue and green kite.
examples.chinese: 她有一只蓝色和绿色的风筝。

examples.english: The child tailed his kite.
examples.chinese: 小孩儿给自己的风筝装了尾巴。

chineseDefinition: n. 外地人，外国人

examples.chinese: 有些当地人不信任外国人。

chineseDefinition: adv. 从未；决不

examples.english: He’s never been to Australia.
examples.chinese: 他从未去过澳大利亚。

examples.english: I’m never going back there again, not as long as I live.
examples.chinese: 只要我活着，我再也不会回到那儿去。

chineseDefinition: n. 垃圾；废物

examples.english: a refuse dump
examples.chinese: 垃圾场

examples.english: refuse collection
examples.chinese: 垃圾收集

chineseDefinition: n. 高温；压力；热度；热烈

examples.english: Ice needs heat to melt.
examples.chinese: 冰需要热才能融化。

examples.english: Insulating the attic is a good way to reduce heat loss.
examples.chinese: 为阁楼安装隔热层是减少热量流失的好方法。

chineseDefinition: n. 火；火灾；炮火；炉火；热情；激情；磨难

definitions.meaning: 火；火灾；炮火；炉火；热情；激情；磨难
点燃；解雇；开除；使发光；烧制；激动；放枪

examples.english: The warehouse was completely destroyed by fire.
examples.chinese: 仓库全给烧毁了。

examples.english: Thirty people died in a fire in downtown Chicago.
examples.chinese: 30人死于芝加哥市中心的一场火灾。

chineseDefinition: adv. 或许；（表示不确定）也许；（用于粗略的估计）或许；（表示勉强同意或其实不赞成）也许；可能

definitions.meaning: 或许；（表示不确定）也许；（用于粗略的估计）或许；（表示勉强同意或其实不赞成）也许；可能

examples.english: Perhaps she’s next door.
examples.chinese: 她也许在隔壁。

examples.english: Perhaps it will snow tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 明天可能会下雪。

chineseDefinition: n. 老板；首领；工头

examples.english: I’ll have to ask my boss for a day off.
examples.chinese: 我得向老板请一天假。

examples.english: Since I’m my own boss (=  I work for myself, rather than for an employer  ) , my hours are flexible.
examples.chinese: 我自己当老板，所以我的时间很灵活。

chineseDefinition: n. 供给，补给；供应品

examples.english: The nation’s fuel supplies will not last forever.
examples.chinese: 这个国家的燃料供应不会无穷无尽。

examples.english: To protect the food supply , the government ordered the slaughter of affected cattle.
examples.chinese: 为保护食品供应，政府下令宰杀被感染的牛。

chineseDefinition: n. 袜子（sock的复数）

examples.english: ...a pair of knee-high socks.
examples.chinese: …一双齐膝的短袜。

chineseDefinition: n. 昨天；往昔

examples.english: yesterday’s meeting
examples.chinese: 昨天的会议

examples.english: They arrived the day before yesterday.
examples.chinese: 他们前天到的。

chineseDefinition: adj. 那些的

examples.english: He dotted down those notes.
examples.chinese: 他匆匆记下了那些注解。

examples.english: She ganged up on me with those rough boys.
examples.chinese: 她伙同那些粗野的男孩对付我。

chineseDefinition: n. 成功，成就；胜利；大获成功的人或事物

definitions.meaning: 成功，成就；胜利；大获成功的人或事物

examples.english: The experiment was a big success.
examples.chinese: 实验非常成功。

chineseDefinition: n. 网站（全球资讯网的主机站）

definitions.meaning: 网站（全球资讯网的主机站）

examples.english: For more information on weight loss and healthy eating, visit our website.
examples.chinese: 有关减肥和健康饮食的更多信息，请访问我们的网站。

chineseDefinition: adj. 相似的

examples.english: We have similar tastes in music.
examples.chinese: 我们对音乐的品位相近。

examples.english: Both approaches seem to achieve similar results.
examples.chinese: 两种方法都得出了相似的结果。

chineseDefinition: n. 钢铁；钢制品；坚固

definitions.meaning: 钢制的；钢铁业的；坚强的

examples.english: a steel bridge
examples.chinese: 钢铁大桥

examples.english: (= steel that does not change colour ) knives
examples.chinese: 不锈钢小刀

chineseDefinition: adv. 此外；而且

examples.english: I need the money. And besides, when I agree to do something, I do it.
examples.chinese: 我需要这笔钱，而且，我一旦答应做什么事情就会做到。

chineseDefinition: adj. 全部的

examples.english: You shouldn’t be sitting here by yourself, all alone.
examples.chinese: 你不应该一个人孤零零地坐在这儿。

examples.english: a strange woman, dressed all in black
examples.chinese: 一袭黑衣的奇怪女子

chineseDefinition: n. 建议；忠告；劝告；通知

examples.chinese: 你真该听我的建议。

chineseDefinition: n. 音乐，乐曲

examples.english: I often listen to classic music when I’m in the car.
examples.chinese: 我在车上经常听古典音乐。

examples.english: A new piece of music was specially written for the occasion.
examples.chinese: 为了这个活动专门写了一首新曲子。

chineseDefinition: n. 实践；练习；惯例

examples.english: It takes hours of practice to learn to play the guitar.
examples.chinese: 学习弹吉他需要长时间的练习。

examples.english: With a little more practice you should be able to pass your test.
examples.chinese: 稍微再练一练，你应该能通过考试了。

chineseDefinition: num. 八；八个；第八

examples.english: It’s only eight days till Christmas.
examples.chinese: 还有8天就到圣诞节了。

examples.english: They woke at eight (= eight o’clock ).
examples.chinese: 他们是8点钟醒的。

chineseDefinition: n. 七十；七十个；七十岁；七十年代

definitions.meaning: 七十；七十个；七十岁；七十年代
七十的；七十个的；七十岁的

examples.english: We lost touch during the seventies.
examples.chinese: 我们在70年代失去了联系。

chineseDefinition: n. 担心；烦恼；撕咬

examples.english: He’s been a constant source of worry .
examples.chinese: 他总是让人担心。

chineseDefinition: n. 惊奇；奇迹；惊愕

examples.english: It’s a wonder no one got hurt.
examples.chinese: 竟然没有人受伤，真是奇迹。

examples.english: Mickelson was hailed as the wonder boy of American golf.
examples.chinese: 米克尔森被称颂为美国高尔夫球界的神奇男孩。

chineseDefinition: adj. 每一的，每个的；每隔…的

examples.english: His every utterance will be scrutinized.
examples.chinese: 他说的每句话都会被细查。

chineseDefinition: n. 屏，幕；屏风

examples.english: a computer with an 18-inch colour screen
examples.chinese: 带18英寸彩色屏幕的电脑

examples.english: He went on staring at the TV screen .
examples.chinese: 他继续盯着电视屏幕看。

chineseDefinition: n. 母鸡；女人；雌禽

examples.english: The hen sits in the hencoop [henroost].
examples.chinese: 母鸡卧窝。

chineseDefinition: n. 面包；生计

examples.english: Would you like some bread with your soup?
examples.chinese: 你喝汤时要吃点面包吗？

examples.english: a loaf of brown bread
examples.chinese: 一条黑面包

examples.chinese: 他是个很好的人，始终彬彬有礼。

examples.english: The only person who really said anything helpful was Jack.
examples.chinese: 只有一个人真正说了些有用的话，就是杰克。

examples.chinese: 教师们别无选择，只能采取措施来保护自己。

examples.english: Our neighbours have just bought themselves a jacuzzi.
examples.chinese: 我们邻居刚刚买了一个按摩浴缸。

粉笔；白垩；用粉笔划的记号

examples.english: He chalked the message on the blackboard.
examples.chinese: 他用粉笔把这条消息写在黑板上。

examples.english: half a kilo of cheese
examples.chinese: 半公斤干酪

examples.english: a cheese sandwich
examples.chinese: 干酪三明治

definitions.meaning: 欲睡的；困乏的；不活跃的

examples.english: The warmth from the fire made her feel sleepy.
examples.chinese: 暖洋洋的炉火使她昏昏欲睡。

examples.chinese: 但是，这份报告里有一项非常耐人寻味的数据：在2008年，金融保险业出现近十六年来的首次萎缩。

definitions.meaning: 薄烤饼；粉饼；平降（全称pancake landing）

examples.chinese: 我有很多工作要做。

chineseDefinition: n. 头发；毛发；些微

definitions.meaning: 生长毛发；形成毛状纤维
毛发的；护理毛发的；用毛发制成的

examples.english: Her hair was short and dark.
examples.chinese: 她的头发又短又黑。

examples.english: a short fat man with no hair on his head
examples.chinese: 光头的矮胖男人

chineseDefinition: n. 奶奶；外婆；婆婆妈妈的人

definitions.meaning: 奶奶；外婆；婆婆妈妈的人

examples.english: ...my old granny.
examples.chinese: …我的老奶奶。

chineseDefinition: n. 云；阴云；云状物；一大群；黑斑

使混乱；以云遮敝；使忧郁；玷污

examples.english: Fears of renewed terrorist attacks cast a cloud over the event (= spoilt the happy situation ) .
examples.chinese: 对恐怖分子再次发动袭击的担心给这次活动蒙上了一层阴影。

examples.chinese: 卡伦很少见他这么生气过。

examples.chinese: 我正要走，电话铃响了。

使参加比赛；和…竞赛；使急走，使全速行进

examples.english: The school welcomes children of all races .
examples.chinese: 该校欢迎各种族的学生就读。

examples.english: a person of mixed race
examples.chinese: 混血儿

chineseDefinition: n. 计算机；电脑；电子计算机

definitions.meaning: 计算机；电脑；电子计算机

examples.english: a huge global computer network
examples.chinese: 巨大的全球计算机网络

examples.english: the latest computer software
examples.chinese: 最新的计算机软件

examples.chinese: 听！引擎发出奇怪的声音。

examples.chinese: 国际贸易协定

examples.english: unfair trade practices
examples.chinese: 不公平的贸易行为

definitions.meaning: 可以，能够；可能，也许；祝，愿；会，能

definitions.meaning: 每件事物；最重要的东西；（有关的）一切；万事

examples.english: Everything was covered in a thick layer of dust.
examples.chinese: 所有东西上面都蒙着厚厚一层灰。

examples.english: I decided to tell her everything.
examples.chinese: 我决定把一切都告诉她。

examples.chinese: 你可能没拿你的钥匙而错拿了我的。

examples.english: Could I have tuna instead of ham?
examples.chinese: 我可否要金枪鱼来代替火腿？

examples.english: I’ll show you to your room. Ours is next door.
examples.chinese: 我带你去你的房间，我们的房间在你的隔壁。

examples.english: The main difference between our brains and those of monkeys is that ours are bigger.
examples.chinese: 我们的大脑和猴子的大脑之间的主要差别在于我们的要大些。

examples.chinese: 检查你的拼写和语法。

examples.english: the rules of English grammar
examples.chinese: 英语的语法规则

chineseDefinition: adv. 如何；多少；多么

examples.english: How do you spell your name?
examples.chinese: 你的名字怎么拼写？

examples.english: How can I help you?
examples.chinese: 我怎么帮你？

chineseDefinition: pron. 她（主格）；它（用来指雌性动物或国家、船舶、地球、月亮等）

definitions.meaning: 她（主格）；它（用来指雌性动物或国家、船舶、地球、月亮等）

examples.english: You could always ask Beth – she’s got plenty of money.
examples.chinese: 你总是可以去问贝丝——她有很多钱。

examples.english: I saw you talking to that girl. Who is she?
examples.chinese: 我看见你和那个女孩子说话。 她是谁？

chineseDefinition: n. 篮子；（篮球比赛的）得分；一篮之量；篮筐

definitions.meaning: 篮子；（篮球比赛的）得分；一篮之量；篮筐

examples.english: a shopping basket
examples.chinese: 购物篮

examples.english: a basket full of vegetables
examples.chinese: 装满蔬菜的篮子

chineseDefinition: conj. 和，与；就；而且；但是；然后

examples.english: He’s gone to get some fish and chips.
examples.chinese: 他去买炸鱼薯条了。

examples.english: The film starred Jack Lemmon and Shirley Maclaine.
examples.chinese: 这部电影由杰克·莱蒙和雪莉·麦克莱恩主演。

chineseDefinition: v. 使比赛；使相配；敌得过，比得上；相配；与…竞争

definitions.meaning: 使比赛；使相配；敌得过，比得上；相配；与…竞争
比赛，竞赛；匹配；对手；火柴

examples.english: We painted the cabinets green to match the rug.
examples.chinese: 我们把柜子刷成绿色，和地毯相配。

examples.english: Do you think this outfit matches?
examples.chinese: 你认为这套衣服配吗？

chineseDefinition: adj. 完美的；最好的；精通的

examples.english: His English was perfect.
examples.chinese: 他的英语很地道。

examples.english: The car was in perfect condition.
examples.chinese: 这辆车的车况极佳。

chineseDefinition: n. 发烧，发热；狂热

definitions.meaning: 使发烧；使狂热；使患热病

examples.english: Andy has a fever and won’t be coming into work today.
examples.chinese: 安迪发烧了，今天不来上班。

examples.english: I woke up this morning with a fever and an upset stomach.
examples.chinese: 今天早上醒来时我发烧了，胃也不舒服。

chineseDefinition: adv. 特别；尤其；格外

examples.english: I never liked long walks, especially in winter.
examples.chinese: 我向来不喜欢长距离散步，尤其在冬天。

examples.english: Art books are expensive to produce, especially if they contain colour illustrations.
examples.chinese: 美术类书籍制作成本很高，尤其是那些带彩色插图的。

chineseDefinition: n. 难题；引起麻烦的人

examples.english: She was older than me, but that wasn’t really a problem.
examples.chinese: 她比我年长，不过那不算什么问题。

chineseDefinition: int. 再见

examples.english: Bye, Dave.
examples.chinese: 再见，戴夫。

chineseDefinition: n. 物理学；物理现象

examples.english: ...the laws of physics.
examples.chinese: …物理学定律。

chineseDefinition: prep. 在…之间

examples.english: He supplements his regular meals by eating between meals.
examples.chinese: 他在两餐之间吃点东西来补充正餐。

examples.english: Mother interposed in the dispute between my brother and me.
examples.chinese: 母亲干预了我和哥哥之间的争论。

chineseDefinition: n. 灯；照射器

examples.english: She switched on the bedside lamp.
examples.chinese: 她打开了床头灯。

chineseDefinition: n. （水果）汁，液；果汁

examples.english: a carton of orange juice
examples.chinese: 一纸盒橙汁

examples.english: A Coke and a tomato juice, please.
examples.chinese: 请来一杯可乐和一杯番茄汁。

chineseDefinition: n. 动物

examples.english: furry little animals
examples.chinese: 毛茸茸的小动物

examples.english: The cosmetics have not been tested on animals.
examples.chinese: 这些化妆品没有进行过动物试验。

chineseDefinition: n. 成员；会员；议员

examples.english: The majority of union members voted in favour of a strike.
examples.chinese: 大多数工会成员投票赞成罢工。

chineseDefinition: n. 胶带；磁带；带子；卷尺

definitions.meaning: 录音；用带子捆扎；用胶布把…封住

examples.english: a photo stuck to the wall with tape
examples.chinese: 用胶布贴在墙上的照片

definitions.meaning: 羞耻，羞愧；憾事，带来耻辱的人

examples.english: He felt a deep sense of shame.
examples.chinese: 他深深地感到羞愧。

examples.english: Maria blushed with shame.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚羞得脸都红了。

chineseDefinition: adj. 黑色的；黑人的；邪恶的

definitions.meaning: 使变黑；把鞋油等涂在…上；把（眼眶）打成青肿

examples.english: a black evening dress
examples.chinese: 黑色晚礼服

chineseDefinition: n. 天堂；天空；极乐

examples.english: He looked up towards the heavens.
examples.chinese: 他仰望苍穹。

chineseDefinition: prep. 低于，少于；在之下

examples.english: These toys are not suitable for children under five.
examples.chinese: 这些玩具不适合五岁以下的儿童玩。

examples.english: Most of the events listed cost under £60.
examples.chinese: 所列活动项目的花费大多低于 60 英镑。

chineseDefinition: pron. 我们的

examples.chinese: 他们分享我们的胜利。

examples.english: She spread our lunch on the grass.
examples.chinese: 她在草地上摆好了我们的午饭。

definitions.meaning: 国家的；国民的；民族的；国立的

examples.english: Religion matters very much at a national level.
examples.chinese: 宗教事务在全国都非常重要。

examples.english: Between 1929 and 1933 America’s national income fell by more than half.
examples.chinese: 1929至1933年间，美国的国民收入下降过半。

chineseDefinition: n. 金属；合金

examples.english: The gate is made of metal.
examples.chinese: 这扇大门是用金属做成的。

chineseDefinition: adv. 向前；（门等）关上

examples.chinese: 风把门吹上了。

examples.chinese: 默里拿枪指着他的头并威胁要杀了他。

chineseDefinition: num. 七个，七

examples.chinese: 这些女性访问了七个州的城市。

examples.chinese: 这树篱占了太多的地方。

examples.chinese: 然后你们三个人要都在协议上签名，并把它贴在冰箱上。

examples.chinese: 我想要啤酒变凉，因此我把它放在冰箱里一小时。

examples.chinese: 你去那里是坐火车还是坐飞机？

definitions.meaning: 问，询问；要求；需要；邀请；讨价

examples.english: ‘What’s your name?’ she asked.
examples.chinese: “你叫什么名字？”她问道 。

examples.english: Don’t ask him – he won’t know.
examples.chinese: 别问他，他不知道。

examples.chinese: 她手中拿着的是一张破旧的老照片。

逐渐变平；[音乐]以降调唱（或奏）

examples.chinese: 这家宾馆糟糕透了。

examples.chinese: 她扫了一眼杂志架。

examples.chinese: 班上最懒的男孩

开着的；发生着的，正在进行中

(Just)人名；(英)贾斯特；(法)朱斯特；(德、匈、波、捷、挪)尤斯特；(西)胡斯特

definitions.meaning: 工作；[物] 功；产品；操作；职业；行为；事业；工厂；著作；文学、音乐或艺术作品

examples.chinese: 每年这个时候工作机会都不多。

examples.chinese: 我们主要是用电子邮件沟通。
