definitions.meaning: 院子；码（英制中丈量长度单位，1码=3英尺）；庭院；帆桁

examples.english: a hundred yards away
examples.chinese: 100码外

examples.english: an area of 9,000 square yards
examples.chinese: 面积为9,000平方码的一片区域

chineseDefinition: n. 秘密；秘诀；机密

examples.english: I can’t tell you. It’s a secret .
examples.chinese: 我不能告诉你，这是个秘密。

examples.english: It was no secret that the two men hated each other.
examples.chinese: 这两个男人相互仇视，这算不得什么秘密。

chineseDefinition: n. 跳跃；暴涨；惊跳

examples.english: the best jump of the competition
examples.chinese: 这次比赛中的最佳一跳

examples.english: a dancer famous for his impressive jumps
examples.chinese: 一位以其出色的跳跃闻名的舞蹈家

chineseDefinition: pron. 我

examples.english: I moved to this city six years ago.
examples.chinese: 六年前我搬到了这个城市。

examples.english: I’m not late again, am I?
examples.chinese: 我没有又迟到吧？

chineseDefinition: n. 蚂蚁

examples.english: Ants swarmed up out of the ground and covered her shoes and legs.
examples.chinese: 蚂蚁从地里成群地爬出来，爬满了她的鞋和腿。

chineseDefinition: n. 产业；工业；勤勉

examples.english: I work in the oil industry.
examples.chinese: 我在石油行业工作。

examples.english: Italy’s thriving tourist industry
examples.chinese: 意大利蓬勃发展的旅游业

chineseDefinition: prep. 到…里；深入…之中；成为…状况；进入到…之内

definitions.meaning: 到…里；深入…之中；成为…状况；进入到…之内

examples.english: Come into the office.
examples.chinese: 到办公室里来。

examples.english: He thrust his hand into his coat pocket.
examples.chinese: 他把手插进大衣口袋里。

chineseDefinition: conj. 虽然；然而；当……的时候

examples.english: They arrived while we were having dinner.
examples.chinese: 他们来时我们正在吃饭。

examples.english: While she was asleep, thieves broke in and stole her handbag.
examples.chinese: 她睡着的时候，小偷闯进来偷走了她的手提包。

chineseDefinition: n. 木材；木制品；树林

examples.english: Put some more wood on the fire.
examples.chinese: 往火上再添些木柴。

examples.english: a polished wood floor
examples.chinese: 擦得锃亮的木地板

chineseDefinition: prep. 落后于；支持；晚于

examples.english: Mark’s always behind the rest of his class in mathematics.
examples.chinese: 马克的数学成绩总是落在班上其他同学后面。

examples.english: This victory lifts Ferguson’s team into fifth place, nine points behind leaders Norwich.
examples.chinese: 这场胜利使弗格森的球队升到了第五名，落后领先的诺里奇队九分。

chineseDefinition: n. 教师；导师

examples.english: a primary school teacher
examples.chinese: 小学教师

chineseDefinition: n. 美国人，美洲人；美国英语

definitions.meaning: 美国人，美洲人；美国英语
美国的，美洲的；地道美国式的

examples.english: The 1990 Nobel Prize for medicine was won by two Americans.
examples.chinese: 两名美国人获得了1990年度诺贝尔医学奖。

chineseDefinition: pron. 那；那个

examples.english: He deliberated with them over that question.
examples.chinese: 他和他们商量了那个问题。

chineseDefinition: n. 广告，宣传

examples.english: They put an advertisement in ‘The Morning News’, offering a high salary for the right person.
examples.chinese: 他们在《晨报》上刊登了一则启事，出高薪寻找合适的人选。

examples.english: The organizers of the concert had taken out a full page advertisement in ‘The New York Times’.
examples.chinese: 音乐会筹办者在《纽约时报》上刊登了整版广告。

chineseDefinition: v. 分派任务

examples.english: Jen was tasked with running a charity basketball tournament.
examples.chinese: 珍被委以举办一场慈善篮球赛的任务。

chineseDefinition: n. 董事会；木板；甲板；膳食

definitions.meaning: 上（飞机、车、船等）；用板盖上；给提供膳宿

examples.english: Martha was chopping vegetables on a wooden board.
examples.chinese: 玛莎正在用一块木砧板切蔬菜。

examples.english: a chess board
examples.chinese: 棋盘

chineseDefinition: n. 柠檬水

examples.english: a glass of lemonade
examples.chinese: 一杯柠檬汽水

examples.english: Would you like a lemonade?
examples.chinese: 你要来一杯柠檬汽水吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 宠物；生气；受宠爱的人

examples.english: They have two pets – a cat and a dog.
examples.chinese: 他们有两只宠物，一只猫和一只狗。

examples.english: We weren’t allowed to keep pets at school.
examples.chinese: 学校里不许我们养宠物。

chineseDefinition: adj. 一些；某个；大约；相当多的

definitions.meaning: 一些；某个；大约；相当多的
一些；若干；其中的一部分；（数量不确切时用）有些人

examples.english: I’ve just made a pot of coffee. Would you like some?
examples.chinese: 我刚煮了一壶咖啡，你想喝点吗？

examples.english: ‘Do you know where the screws are?’ ‘There are some in the garage.’
examples.chinese: “你知道螺丝钉在哪儿吗？”“车库里有一些。”

chineseDefinition: n. 大人物；重要人物

examples.english: There’s somebody waiting to see you.
examples.chinese: 有人等着要见你。

examples.english: Somebody’s car alarm kept me awake all night.
examples.chinese: 不知谁的汽车警报器吵得我整晚都无法入睡。

chineseDefinition: v. 停止；堵塞；断绝

examples.english: Stop throwing those stones!
examples.chinese: 别再扔那些石头了！

chineseDefinition: v. 跟随；遵循；追求；密切注意，注视；注意；倾听

definitions.meaning: 跟随；遵循；追求；密切注意，注视；注意；倾听

examples.english: Are those men following us?
examples.chinese: 那些人在跟着我们吗？

examples.english: The patrol car followed the BMW for a few miles and then lost it.
examples.chinese: 巡逻车跟了那辆宝马几英里，后来就跟丢了。

chineseDefinition: prep. 穿过；横穿

examples.english: We can gain some time if we cut across this field.
examples.chinese: 我们如果抄近路穿过这片田野可以省下一些时间。

chineseDefinition: v. 尝试；进行实验

examples.english: The teacher provided some different materials and left the children to experiment.
examples.chinese: 老师提供了几种不同的材料让孩子们试验。

chineseDefinition: n. 味道；品味；审美

examples.english: The medicine had a slightly bitter taste.
examples.chinese: 这药略带苦味。

chineseDefinition: v. 到达；成功；达成；出生

examples.english: Give me a call to let me know you’ve arrived safely.
examples.chinese: 打个电话给我，告诉我你已平安到达。

examples.english: By the time the police arrived on the scene, the burglars had fled.
examples.chinese: 警方赶到现场时，窃贼已经逃跑了。

chineseDefinition: n. 塔；高楼；堡垒

examples.english: the Eiffel Tower
examples.chinese: 埃菲尔铁塔

examples.english: a castle with tall towers
examples.chinese: 有高高的塔楼的城堡

chineseDefinition: v. 改变；交换

examples.english: Susan has changed a lot since I last saw her.
examples.chinese: 自从我上次见到苏珊之后，她变了许多。

examples.english: Changing your eating habits is the best way to lose weight.
examples.chinese: 改变饮食习惯是减肥的最佳方法。

chineseDefinition: n. 一段（文章）；走廊；通路

examples.english: My office is just along the passage.
examples.chinese: 我的办公室就在过道旁边。

examples.english: We walked down a narrow passage to the back of the building.
examples.chinese: 我们沿着一条狭窄的通道来到大楼的后面。

chineseDefinition: n. 公司；陪伴，同伴；连队

examples.english: Which company do you work for?
examples.chinese: 你在哪家公司上班？

examples.english: I called the phone company about the bill.
examples.chinese: 我就电话账单的事给电话公司打了电话。

chineseDefinition: n. 城市，都市

examples.english: The nearest big city was St. Louis.
examples.chinese: 最近的大城市是圣路易斯。

chineseDefinition: n. 票；入场券，标签；（美）候选人名单；证明书；交通罚款单

definitions.meaning: 票；入场券，标签；（美）候选人名单；证明书；交通罚款单
加标签于；指派；对…开出交通违规罚单

examples.english: How much does it say on the price ticket ?
examples.chinese: 价签上标明的价格是多少？

chineseDefinition: v. 疼痛；渴望

examples.english: His feet were aching from standing so long.
examples.chinese: 他站了那么久，双脚隐隐作痛。

chineseDefinition: n. 知识，学问；知道，认识；学科

definitions.meaning: 知识，学问；知道，认识；学科

examples.english: He did not have much knowledge of American history.
examples.chinese: 他对美国历史所知不多。

chineseDefinition: n. 帽子

examples.english: Maria was wearing a beautiful new hat.
examples.chinese: 玛丽亚戴着一顶漂亮的新帽子。

chineseDefinition: pron. 谁；什么人

examples.english: Who locked the door?
examples.chinese: 谁锁的门？

examples.english: Who do you work for?
examples.chinese: 你为谁工作？

chineseDefinition: n. 决定，决心；决议

examples.english: Do you ever wonder if you made the right decision?
examples.chinese: 你怀疑过自己所作的决定是否正确吗？

examples.english: The judges’ decision is final (= it will not be changed ) .
examples.chinese: 法官的裁决是最终判决。

chineseDefinition: adv. 大约；到处；在附近

examples.english: He wandered around the streets, looking in shop windows.
examples.chinese: 他在街上闲逛，看看商店橱窗。

examples.english: There are over 40 radio stations dotted around the country.
examples.chinese: 有40多家广播电台分布在全国各地。

chineseDefinition: n. 标志；马克；符号；痕迹；分数

definitions.meaning: 标志；马克；符号；痕迹；分数

examples.english: I can’t get these marks out of my T-shirt.
examples.chinese: 我无法把我T恤衫上的这些污迹去掉。

chineseDefinition: n. 行，排；划船；街道；吵闹

examples.english: (= many rows ) of shelves stacked with books
examples.chinese: 一排又一排堆满书的架子

chineseDefinition: adj. 第五的；五分之一的

examples.english: in the fifth century
examples.chinese: 在五世纪

examples.english: her fifth birthday
examples.chinese: 她的五岁生日

chineseDefinition: n. 经理；管理人员

examples.english: one of our regional managers
examples.chinese: 我们的一位地区经理

examples.english: a middle manager in a computer company
examples.chinese: 一家计算机公司的中层管理人员

chineseDefinition: n. 腿；支柱

examples.english: a young boy with skinny legs
examples.chinese: 双腿干瘦的小男孩

examples.english: She fell and broke her leg.
examples.chinese: 她摔断了腿。

chineseDefinition: adj. 陈旧的，古老的；年老的

examples.english: a pair of old shoes
examples.chinese: 一双旧鞋

examples.english: Some of the houses around here are very old.
examples.chinese: 这里有些房子年代已经很久远了。

chineseDefinition: n. 床；基础；河底， 海底

examples.english: You should go to bed early.
examples.chinese: 你应该早点上床。

examples.english: She got into bed and turned out the light.
examples.chinese: 她上了床，关掉灯。

chineseDefinition: n. 安全；保险；安全设备；保险装置；安打

definitions.meaning: 安全；保险；安全设备；保险装置；安打

examples.english: You shouldn’t travel alone, for safety’s sake .
examples.chinese: 为安全起见，不要独自一人旅行。

examples.english: For your own safety , please do not smoke inside the plane.
examples.chinese: 为了您自身的安全，请不要在飞机上吸烟。

chineseDefinition: n. 图书馆，藏书室；文库

examples.english: a public library
examples.chinese: 公共图书馆

examples.english: a library book
examples.chinese: 图书馆的书

chineseDefinition: pron. 你自己

examples.english: Look at yourself in the mirror.
examples.chinese: 照照镜子吧。

examples.english: Come and warm yourselves by the fire.
examples.chinese: 到火边来暖暖身子。

chineseDefinition: n. 宫殿；宅邸；豪华住宅

examples.english: Buckingham Palace
examples.chinese: 白金汉宫

chineseDefinition: n. 月，一个月的时间

examples.english: I hope I’ll have finished the work by the end of the month .
examples.chinese: 我希望我这个月底能完成工作。

examples.english: She earns about £350 a month (= each month ) .
examples.chinese: 她每月约挣350英镑。

chineseDefinition: n. 国土；陆地；地面

examples.english: They own a lot of land.
examples.chinese: 他们拥有许多土地。

examples.english: He bought a piece of land.
examples.chinese: 他买了一块地。

definitions.meaning: 末尾，最后；上个；鞋楦（做鞋的模型）
最后的；最近的，最新的；仅剩的；最不可能…的
最后地；上次，最近；最后一点

examples.english: I didn’t read the last chapter of the book.
examples.chinese: 我没有看这本书的最后一章。

examples.english: The next meeting will be held in the last week in June.
examples.chinese: 下次会议将于6月的最后一个星期举行。

chineseDefinition: adj. 亲爱的；尊敬的；昂贵的

examples.english: Dear Sir or Madam, ...
examples.chinese: 尊敬的先生或女士，…

examples.english: Dear Mrs. Wilson, ...
examples.chinese: 尊敬的威尔逊夫人，…

chineseDefinition: adj. 西方的，西部的；有西方特征的

definitions.meaning: 西方的，西部的；有西方特征的
西方人；西部片，西部小说

examples.english: the western end of the bay
examples.chinese: 海湾的西端

examples.english: Western Australia
examples.chinese: 西澳大利亚

chineseDefinition: n. 演讲；讲话；[语] 语音；演说

definitions.meaning: 演讲；讲话；[语] 语音；演说

examples.english: He has to make a lot of after-dinner speeches .
examples.chinese: 他经常要发表席后演说。

examples.english: Collins gave the keynote speech (= most important speech ) .
examples.chinese: 科林斯作了主题发言。

chineseDefinition: n. 出生；血统，出身；起源

examples.english: Congratulations on the birth of your daughter!
examples.chinese: 恭喜你生了个女儿！

examples.english: He only weighed 2 kilos at birth .
examples.chinese: 他出生时体重只有两公斤。

chineseDefinition: adj. 薄的；瘦的；稀薄的；微弱的

definitions.meaning: 薄的；瘦的；稀薄的；微弱的

examples.english: a thin gold chain
examples.chinese: 一条细细的金链

examples.english: She’s only wearing a thin summer jacket (= a jacket made of light material ) .
examples.chinese: 她只穿了一件薄薄的夏装外套。

chineseDefinition: adj. 卓越的；极好的；杰出的

examples.english: an excellent suggestion
examples.chinese: 极好的建议

examples.english: His car is in excellent condition.
examples.chinese: 他的汽车状况极佳。

chineseDefinition: adj. 苦的；痛苦的；尖刻的；充满仇恨的

definitions.meaning: 苦的；痛苦的；尖刻的；充满仇恨的

examples.english: a bitter old man
examples.chinese: 一个满腹怨恨的老人

chineseDefinition: pron. 他自己；他亲自，他本人
v. 期望；指望；认为；预料

examples.english: He will be hard to beat. I fully expect (= am completely sure about ) that and I’m ready.
examples.chinese: 他很难击败。我确信这一点，不过我准备好了。

examples.english: ‘Who are you?’ he murmured, only half expecting (= thinking it was possible, but not likely ) her to answer.
examples.chinese: “你是谁？”他低声问道，预计她可能不会回答。

chineseDefinition: n. 俱乐部，社团；夜总会；棍棒；（扑克牌中的）梅花

definitions.meaning: 俱乐部，社团；夜总会；棍棒；（扑克牌中的）梅花

examples.english: Manchester United Football Club
examples.chinese: 曼联（队）足球俱乐部

chineseDefinition: n. 雪，积雪；下雪

examples.english: Snow was falling heavily as we entered the village.
examples.chinese: 我们进村的时候雪下得正大。

examples.english: I could see footprints in the snow.
examples.chinese: 我看到雪地里有脚印。

chineseDefinition: v. 收到；接待；接纳

examples.english: All the children will receive a small gift.
examples.chinese: 每个孩子都会收到一份小礼物。

examples.english: Lee received 324 votes (= 324 people voted for him ) .
examples.chinese: 李得到324票。

chineseDefinition: n. 山；山脉

examples.english: the highest mountain in Austria
examples.chinese: 奥地利最高的山

examples.english: the Rocky Mountains
examples.chinese: 落基山脉

chineseDefinition: adj. 严肃的，严重的；认真的；庄重的；危急的

definitions.meaning: 严肃的，严重的；认真的；庄重的；危急的

examples.english: the serious problem of unemployment
examples.chinese: 严重的失业问题

examples.english: Luckily, the damage was not serious.
examples.chinese: 还好，损坏不算严重。

chineseDefinition: n. 两个

examples.english: I’d like you to line up in twos, please.
examples.chinese: 请你们两个一组排好队。

chineseDefinition: adj. 正常的；正规的，标准的

examples.english: A normal working week is 40 hours.
examples.chinese: 一个正常的工作周是40小时。

examples.english: She was assessed in the normal way, and placed on the waiting list.
examples.chinese: 她接受了正常的评估后被列入等候名单。

chineseDefinition: conj. 除非，如果不

examples.english: Unless some extra money is found, the theatre will close.
examples.chinese: 要是不能找到更多资金，剧院将要关闭。

examples.english: I think you should complain – unless, of course, you are happy with the way things are.
examples.chinese: 我觉得你应该发发牢骚——当然，除非你对现状很满意。

chineseDefinition: num. 第三；三分之一

examples.english: Divide it into thirds.
examples.chinese: 把它分成三等份。

chineseDefinition: n. 盖；帽子

examples.english: Make sure you put the cap back on the pen.
examples.chinese: 一定要把笔帽套上。

examples.english: a bottle cap
examples.chinese: 瓶盖

chineseDefinition: n. 法律；规律；法治；法学；诉讼；司法界

definitions.meaning: 法律；规律；法治；法学；诉讼；司法界

examples.english: Elected officials ought to obey the law.
examples.chinese: 民选官员理应遵守法律。

chineseDefinition: n. 运动场，操场；游乐场

examples.english: children shouting and running in the playground
examples.chinese: 在操场上叫嚷奔跑的孩子们

chineseDefinition: adj. 寒冷的；冷淡的，不热情的；失去知觉的

definitions.meaning: 寒冷的；冷淡的，不热情的；失去知觉的

examples.english: She splashed her face with cold water.
examples.chinese: 她往脸上泼冷水。

examples.english: a blast of cold air
examples.chinese: 一股冷空气

chineseDefinition: n. 线；螺纹；思路；衣服；线状物；玻璃纤维；路线

definitions.meaning: 线；螺纹；思路；衣服；线状物；玻璃纤维；路线

examples.english: I’m looking for a needle and thread.
examples.chinese: 我在找针线。

examples.english: hand-sewn with gold and silver thread
examples.chinese: 用金线和银线手工缝制的

chineseDefinition: n. 熨斗；烙铁；坚强

examples.english: the iron and steel industry
examples.chinese: 钢铁工业

examples.english: a driveway with large iron gates
examples.chinese: 安装了大铁门的私家车道

chineseDefinition: num. 六，六个

examples.english: six months ago
examples.chinese: 六个月前

examples.english: She arrived just after six (= six o’clock ) .
examples.chinese: 她六点刚过就到了。

chineseDefinition: v. 敲；打；敲击

examples.english: I knocked and knocked but nobody answered.
examples.chinese: 我把门敲了又敲，但无人回应。

chineseDefinition: n. 艺术；美术；艺术品

examples.english: the Museum of Modern Art in New York
examples.chinese: 纽约现代艺术博物馆

examples.english: an example of early Indian art
examples.chinese: 印度早期艺术的范例

chineseDefinition: n. 匆忙，急忙

definitions.meaning: 仓促（做某事）；催促；（朝某方向）迅速移动；迅速处理

examples.english: Sorry, I can’t stop, I’m in a hurry.
examples.chinese: 对不起，我不能停下，我赶时间。

examples.english: You’ll make mistakes if you do things in too much of a hurry.
examples.chinese: 做事太仓促会出错。

chineseDefinition: adj. 人的；人类的

examples.english: There are many different cell types in the human body .
examples.chinese: 人体中有许多种不同的细胞类型。

examples.english: the power of the human mind
examples.chinese: 人脑的威力

chineseDefinition: n. 岩石；摇滚乐；暗礁

examples.english: the late rock star, Freddie Mercury
examples.chinese: 已故摇滚乐明星弗雷迪·默丘利

examples.english: The stadium has hosted numerous rock concerts .
examples.chinese: 这个体育场举行过许多场摇滚乐音乐会。

chineseDefinition: adj. 又一，另一；另外的；不同的

definitions.meaning: 又一，另一；另外的；不同的

examples.english: Can you cite another case like this one?
examples.chinese: 你能举出另一个像这样的例子吗?

examples.english: The conversation drifted from one subject to another.
examples.chinese: 谈话从一个话题转到另一个话题。

chineseDefinition: n. 录音机；记录器；记录员；八孔直笛

definitions.meaning: 录音机；记录器；记录员；八孔直笛

examples.english: Rodney put the recorder on the desk top and pushed the play button.
examples.chinese: 罗德尼把录音机放在桌面上，按下了播放键。

chineseDefinition: n. 十八，十八个

examples.english: At least eighteen bullets were fired.
examples.chinese: 至少射出了18颗子弹。

examples.english: Jim was eighteen (= 18 years old ).
examples.chinese: 吉姆18岁。

chineseDefinition: v. 背诵；叙述；列举

examples.english: She recited a poem that she had learnt at school.
examples.chinese: 她背诵了一首学校里学的诗。

chineseDefinition: n. 种类；性质

definitions.meaning: 和蔼的；宽容的；令人感激的

examples.english: Get me a sandwich – any kind will do.
examples.chinese: 给我一份三明治，随便哪种都可以。

chineseDefinition: adj. 多云的；阴天的；愁容满面的

definitions.meaning: 多云的；阴天的；愁容满面的

examples.english: a cloudy night with some light rain
examples.chinese: 伴有些许小雨的多云的夜晚

examples.english: Tomorrow, it will be cloudy and cool.
examples.chinese: 明天多云，天气凉爽。

chineseDefinition: n. 背景；隐蔽的位置

definitions.meaning: 背景的；发布背景材料的

examples.english: Students with a background in chemistry will probably find the course easier.
examples.chinese: 学过化学的学生可能会觉得这门课程容易些。

examples.english: It’s important to understand other people, people from different backgrounds .
examples.chinese: 要理解别人，理解那些来自不同背景的人，这是很重要的。

chineseDefinition: n. 年龄；时代；寿命，使用年限；阶段

definitions.meaning: 年龄；时代；寿命，使用年限；阶段

examples.english: Francis is the same age as me.
examples.chinese: 弗朗西斯和我同年岁。

examples.english: Experts disagree over the age of the drawings.
examples.chinese: 专家对这些画作的年代意见不统一。

chineseDefinition: n. 名称，名字；姓名；名誉

definitions.meaning: 命名，任命；指定；称呼；提名；叫出

examples.english: Her name is Mandy Wilson.
examples.chinese: 她的名字是曼迪•威尔逊。

examples.english: What’s your name?
examples.chinese: 你叫什么名字？

chineseDefinition: v. 加；增加；加起来；做加法

examples.english: If the mixture seems dry, add water.
examples.chinese: 如果混合物看上去干，加点水。

chineseDefinition: n. 年；年度；历年；年纪；一年的期间；某年级的学生

definitions.meaning: 年；年度；历年；年纪；一年的期间；某年级的学生

examples.english: I arrived here two years ago.
examples.chinese: 我两年前来到这里。

examples.english: We’ve known each other for over a year.
examples.chinese: 我们相识一年多了。

chineseDefinition: n. 监狱；监禁；拘留所

examples.english: He visits his dad in prison every week.
examples.chinese: 他每周都去探望狱中的父亲。

examples.english: Ricky has been out of prison for three years now.
examples.chinese: 里基现已出狱三年。

chineseDefinition: n. [语][计] 句子，命题；宣判，判决

definitions.meaning: [语][计] 句子，命题；宣判，判决

examples.english: His voice dropped at the end of the sentence.
examples.chinese: 到句子结尾处，他压低了嗓音。

chineseDefinition: n. 裤子，长裤

examples.english: His trousers were slightly too short.
examples.chinese: 他的裤子有点短。

examples.english: I need a new pair of trousers for work.
examples.chinese: 我需要一条上班穿的新裤子。

chineseDefinition: adv. 无论如何，不管怎样；总之

definitions.meaning: 无论如何，不管怎样；总之

examples.english: Catherine wasn’t sure the book was the right one, but she bought it anyway.
examples.chinese: 凯瑟琳不能确定就是这本书，但她还是买了。

examples.english: This idea probably won’t work, but let’s try it anyway.
examples.chinese: 这个办法可能行不通，不过我们还是试试吧。

chineseDefinition: n. 光；光线；灯；打火机；领悟；浅色；天窗

definitions.meaning: 光；光线；灯；打火机；领悟；浅色；天窗
轻的；浅色的；明亮的；轻松的；容易的；清淡的

examples.english: We waited for the lights to change.
examples.chinese: 我们等着红绿灯转换。

examples.english: Eventually the lights turned green.
examples.chinese: 绿灯终于亮了。

chineseDefinition: v. 提供；出价；试图

definitions.meaning: 提议；出价；意图；录取通知书

examples.english: A number of groups offer their services free of charge.
examples.chinese: 一些团体免费提供服务。

chineseDefinition: adj. 危险的

examples.english: laws about dangerous dogs
examples.chinese: 有关危险犬类的法律

examples.english: Some of these prisoners are extremely dangerous.
examples.chinese: 这些囚犯中有些极为危险。

chineseDefinition: n. 红色，红颜料；赤字

examples.english: I like the way the artist uses red in this painting.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢画家在这幅作品中对红色的运用。

examples.english: the reds and yellows of the trees
examples.chinese: 红黄斑斓，层林尽染

chineseDefinition: n. [计量] 公里；[计量] 千米（等于kilometre）

definitions.meaning: [计量] 公里；[计量] 千米（等于kilometre）

examples.english: She had to battle snowstorms, landslides, snakes and loneliness on her 350 kilometer journey.
examples.chinese: 在350公里的行程中，她要克服暴风雪、滑坡、蛇和孤独寂寞。

examples.english: But it says food grown and harvested in the 30-kilometer exclusion zone after the emergency might be contaminated and should be avoided.
examples.chinese: 但是，该组织说，事故发生后，在30公里禁区内种植和收获的食物可能受到污染，应该避免食用。

chineseDefinition: n. 亚洲

examples.english: The European powers extended their authority in Asia.
examples.chinese: 欧洲列强在亚洲扩大他们的管辖权。

examples.english: The teacher chalked out a map of Asia on the blackboard.
examples.chinese: 老师用粉笔在黑板上画了一张亚洲地图。

chineseDefinition: n. 窗；窗口；窗户

examples.english: Television provides us with a useful window on the world.
examples.chinese: 电视为我们提供了了解世界的有用渠道。

chineseDefinition: n. 温度；体温；气温；发烧

examples.english: The temperature of the water was just right for swimming.
examples.chinese: 这水温游泳正好。

examples.english: Water boils at a temperature of 100˚C.
examples.chinese: 水在100摄氏度沸腾。

chineseDefinition: adj. 医学的；药的；内科的

examples.english: medical research
examples.chinese: 医学研究

examples.english: medical staff
examples.chinese: 医务人员

chineseDefinition: n. 自然；性质；本性；种类

examples.english: We grew up in the countryside, surrounded by the beauties of nature.
examples.chinese: 我们在乡村长大，周围是美丽的大自然。

examples.english: nature conservation
examples.chinese: 自然保护

chineseDefinition: n. 筷子

examples.english: We still lack a pair of chopsticks.
examples.chinese: 还少一双筷子。

examples.english: Before lunch he learned the foreigner how to use chopsticks.
examples.chinese: 午饭前他教那个外国人怎样使筷子。

chineseDefinition: n. 增加，增长；提高

examples.english: Recent tax increases have affected the poor more than the rich.
examples.chinese: 新近的增税对穷人的影响比对富人的大。

examples.english: the dramatic increase in the population aged over 65
examples.chinese: 65岁以上人口的急剧增加

chineseDefinition: n. 会议；讨论；协商；联盟；（正式）讨论会；[工会、工党用语]（每年的）大会

definitions.meaning: 会议；讨论；协商；联盟；（正式）讨论会；[工会、工党用语]（每年的）大会

examples.english: Representatives from over 100 countries attended the International Peace Conference in Geneva.
examples.chinese: 来自一百多个国家的代表出席了在日内瓦举行的国际和平大会。

chineseDefinition: n. 赞扬；称赞；荣耀；崇拜

examples.english: It’s important to give children plenty of praise and encouragement.
examples.chinese: 对小孩子多加表扬和鼓励是很重要的。

examples.english: Her teacher was full of praise for her work.
examples.chinese: 老师对她的作业赞不绝口。

chineseDefinition: adv. 在国外；到海外

examples.english: I’ve never lived abroad before.
examples.chinese: 我以前从未在国外生活过。

examples.english: She often goes abroad on business.
examples.chinese: 她经常出国公干。

chineseDefinition: conj. 也不；也不是

definitions.meaning: (Nor)人名；(中)挪(广东话·威妥玛)；(马来、俄)诺尔；(柬)诺

examples.english: He can neither read nor write (= he cannot read or write ).
examples.chinese: 他既不会读也不会写。

examples.english: Hilary was neither shocked nor surprised by the news.
examples.chinese: 希拉里对这个消息既没有感到震惊，也没有觉得意外。

chineseDefinition: n. 健身房；体育；体育馆

examples.english: I go to the gym as often as I can.
examples.chinese: 我一有空就去健身房健身。

chineseDefinition: n. 创伤，伤口

examples.english: A nurse cleaned and bandaged the wound.
examples.chinese: 护士把伤口清洗包扎好。

examples.english: It took several months for his wounds to heal .
examples.chinese: 他的伤口几个月后才愈合。

chineseDefinition: pron. 你的，你们的

examples.english: You should keep in with your colleagues.
examples.chinese: 你应当与你的同事友好相处。

examples.english: You should not deprecate your own worth.
examples.chinese: 你不应该贬低你自己的价值。

chineseDefinition: v. 同意，赞成；承认；约定，商定

definitions.meaning: 同意，赞成；承认；约定，商定

examples.english: Teenagers and their parents rarely agree.
examples.chinese: 十几岁的孩子跟父母意见很少一致。

chineseDefinition: n. 问题，疑问；询问；疑问句

examples.english: Can I ask you a question?
examples.chinese: 我能问你个问题吗？

examples.english: I’m afraid I can’t answer that question.
examples.chinese: 我恐怕无法回答那个问题。

chineseDefinition: n. 飞行员；领航员

examples.english: an airline pilot
examples.chinese: 航空公司飞行员

examples.english: a fighter pilot
examples.chinese: 战斗机驾驶员

chineseDefinition: adv. 大声地；出声地

examples.english: When we were children, our father read aloud to us.
examples.chinese: 当我们是孩子时，我们的父亲大声地朗读给我们听。

chineseDefinition: n. 十一；十一个

examples.english: She was sent to jail for eleven months.
examples.chinese: 她被判入狱11个月。

examples.english: I never go to bed before eleven (= 11 o’clock ).
examples.chinese: 我从不在11点钟以前上床睡觉。

chineseDefinition: adj. 无聊的；令人厌烦的

definitions.meaning: 钻孔；使厌烦；挖空（bore的ing形式）

examples.english: Her husband is about the most boring person I’ve ever met.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫可以说是我见过的最无聊的人。

examples.english: The job was dull and boring.
examples.chinese: 这份工作枯燥乏味。

chineseDefinition: adj. 残酷的，残忍的；使人痛苦的，让人受难的；无情的，严酷的

definitions.meaning: 残酷的，残忍的；使人痛苦的，让人受难的；无情的，严酷的

examples.english: His death was a cruel blow .
examples.chinese: 他的死是个无情的打击。

examples.english: Sometimes life seems unbearably cruel.
examples.chinese: 有时候生活残酷得让人无法承受。

chineseDefinition: adj. 神经的；紧张不安的；强健有力的

definitions.meaning: 神经的；紧张不安的；强健有力的

examples.english: I wish you’d stop looking at me like that. You’re making me nervous.
examples.chinese: 我希望你不要再那样看着我了，你让我紧张。

examples.english: By the time I got into the interview I was a nervous wreck (= was extremely nervous ).
examples.chinese: 到了面试的时候，我紧张得要命。

chineseDefinition: adv. 是, 是的

examples.english: ‘Would you like a sandwich?’ ‘Yes, please.’
examples.chinese: “你想来个三明治吗？”“好的，谢谢。”

examples.english: ‘Would you like to come with us?’ ‘Yes, I’d love to.’
examples.chinese: “你想和我们一起去吗？”“好的，我很乐意。”

chineseDefinition: n. 河，江

examples.english: the Mississippi River
examples.chinese: 密西西比河

examples.english: the River Thames
examples.chinese: 泰晤士河

chineseDefinition: n. 澳大利亚，澳洲

examples.english: He transplanted his family to Australia.
examples.chinese: 他把家迁到澳大利亚。

examples.english: He went out to Australia about five years ago.
examples.chinese: 他大约在五年前移居澳大利亚。

chineseDefinition: n. 医院

examples.english: They are building a new hospital.
examples.chinese: 他们正在建一家新医院。

chineseDefinition: n. 训练；培养；瞄准；整枝

examples.english: Police drivers have to undergo intensive training .
examples.chinese: 警察驾驶员都得接受强化训练。

examples.english: a rigorous training session
examples.chinese: 一节严格的训练课

chineseDefinition: n. 克隆；无性系；无性繁殖；靠营养生殖而由母体分离繁殖的植物

definitions.meaning: 克隆；无性系；无性繁殖；靠营养生殖而由母体分离繁殖的植物

chineseDefinition: n. 消息；差使；启示；预言；广告词

definitions.meaning: 消息；差使；启示；预言；广告词
报信，报告；[通信] 报文

examples.english: He left a message saying he would probably be a little late.
examples.chinese: 他留言说可能会晚一点来。

chineseDefinition: num. 六十；六十个

examples.english: sixty years ago
examples.chinese: 六十年前

chineseDefinition: n. 运动；练习；运用；操练；礼拜；典礼

definitions.meaning: 运动；练习；运用；操练；礼拜；典礼
锻炼；练习；使用；使忙碌；使惊恐

examples.english: Try to fit some regular exercise into your daily routine.
examples.chinese: 尽量在日常生活中安排一些经常性的锻炼。

examples.english: Working in an office, I don’t get much exercise.
examples.chinese: 由于在办公室工作，我很少运动。

chineseDefinition: n. 村庄；村民；（动物的）群落

examples.english: a little fishing village
examples.chinese: 一座小渔村

chineseDefinition: adj. 安全的；可靠的；平安的

examples.english: She doesn’t feel safe in the house on her own.
examples.chinese: 她独自一人在家感到不安全。

examples.english: Make sure you keep these documents safe .
examples.chinese: 你一定要妥善保管这些文件。

chineseDefinition: v. 结果实，开花（正式）

examples.english: As the plants grow and start to bear fruit they will need a lot of water.
examples.chinese: 随着植物的生长及开始结果，它们将需要大量的水分。

chineseDefinition: n. 毛线衣，运动衫；大量出汗的人，发汗剂

definitions.meaning: 毛线衣，运动衫；大量出汗的人，发汗剂

examples.english: Somebody pinched my sweater.
examples.chinese: 有人偷了我的运动衫。

chineseDefinition: n. 游戏；比赛

examples.english: The boys were playing a game in the backyard.
examples.chinese: 男孩们在后院里玩游戏。

examples.english: He said he's game for a similar challenge next year.
examples.chinese: 他说明年他敢尝试一次类似的挑战。

chineseDefinition: n. 价格；价值；代价

examples.english: They may pay a high price for their few years of glory.
examples.chinese: 为了短短几年的辉煌，他们也许要付出高昂的代价。

chineseDefinition: n. 星期四

examples.english: She was working Thursday.
examples.chinese: 她星期四在工作。

chineseDefinition: n. 肥皂

definitions.meaning: 将肥皂涂在……上；对……拍马屁（俚语）

examples.english: Wash thoroughly with soap and water .
examples.chinese: 用肥皂和水彻底洗一洗。

examples.english: a bar of soap
examples.chinese: 一块肥皂

chineseDefinition: n. 意图；目的；意向；愈合

examples.english: They went into town with the intention of visiting the library.
examples.chinese: 他们进了城，打算参观图书馆。

chineseDefinition: n. 行动；活动；功能；战斗；情节

definitions.meaning: 行动；活动；功能；战斗；情节

examples.english: The government must take action (=  do something  ) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
examples.chinese: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

examples.english: She was looking forward to putting her ideas into action (=  doing the things she had planned  ) .
examples.chinese: 她盼望着将自己的想法付诸实施。

chineseDefinition: n. 理智，精神；意见；智力；记忆力

definitions.meaning: 理智，精神；意见；智力；记忆力

examples.english: The Internet, to my mind, represents information exchange at its best.
examples.chinese: 因特网在我看来是最好的信息交换方式。

chineseDefinition: n. 食物；养料

examples.english: The restaurant serves good food at affordable prices.
examples.chinese: 那家餐厅物美价廉。

examples.english: I love Italian food, especially pasta.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢意大利食物，尤其是面食。

chineseDefinition: v. 坚持，强调

examples.english: Stay for supper – I insist!
examples.chinese: 留下来吃晚餐——一定的！

chineseDefinition: n. 计划；平面图

examples.english: His plan is to get a degree in economics and then work abroad for a year.
examples.chinese: 他计划先取得经济学学位，然后去国外工作一年。

examples.english: Do you have any plans for the weekend?
examples.chinese: 你周末有什么打算？

chineseDefinition: n. 农夫，农民

examples.english: She dickered with the farmer for the best fruit.
examples.chinese: 她要买最好的水果而跟农民讨价还价。

examples.english: The farmer peddled his fruit from house to house.
examples.chinese: 那个农民挨家挨户兜售他的水果。

chineseDefinition: v. 修理，修补；改善；修改

examples.english: My father used to mend our shoes.
examples.chinese: 我父亲过去常为我们修补鞋子。

chineseDefinition: n. 胸，胸部；衣柜；箱子；金库

examples.english: Her heart was pounding in her chest.
examples.chinese: 她的心在胸口怦怦直跳。

examples.english: a hairy chest
examples.chinese: 毛茸茸的胸部

chineseDefinition: v. 警告，提醒；通知

examples.english: ‘Be careful, the rocks are slippery,’ Alex warned.
examples.chinese: “小心，岩石很滑。”亚历克斯提醒说。

chineseDefinition: n. 眼睛；视力；眼光；见解，观点

definitions.meaning: 眼睛；视力；眼光；见解，观点

examples.english: He’s got beautiful eyes.
examples.chinese: 他有一双漂亮的眼睛。

examples.english: There were tears in her eyes as she listened to the story.
examples.chinese: 她听故事时眼里噙着泪水。

chineseDefinition: n. 演讲者；扬声器；说话者；说某种语言的人

definitions.meaning: 演讲者；扬声器；说话者；说某种语言的人

examples.english: The keynote speaker (= main or most important speaker ) was Robert Venturi, the architect.
examples.chinese: 主要发言人是建筑师罗伯特·文图里。

chineseDefinition: n. 钢琴

examples.english: Jean accompanied her on the piano .
examples.chinese: 琼为她钢琴伴奏。

chineseDefinition: n. 药；医学；内科；巫术

examples.english: Medicines should be kept out of the reach of children.
examples.chinese: 药应放在孩子够不到的地方。

examples.english: Have you been taking your medicine ?
examples.chinese: 你一直在服药吗？

chineseDefinition: n. 军人；[昆] 兵蚁；懒汉；一片烤面包

definitions.meaning: 军人；[昆] 兵蚁；懒汉；一片烤面包
当兵；磨洋工；坚持干；假称害病

examples.english: A British soldier was wounded in the fighting.
examples.chinese: 战斗中，有一名英国士兵受了伤。

examples.english: an enemy soldier
examples.chinese: 敌兵

chineseDefinition: n. 野餐

examples.english: We decided to have a picnic down by the lake.
examples.chinese: 我们决定在湖边野餐。

examples.english: a picnic table
examples.chinese: 野餐桌

chineseDefinition: v. 控制；精通；征服

examples.english: the skills needed to master a new language
examples.chinese: 掌握一门新语言所需的技能

examples.english: I never quite mastered the art of walking in high heels.
examples.chinese: 我一直学不会穿高跟鞋走路。

chineseDefinition: n. 盐；风趣，刺激性

definitions.meaning: 咸水的；含盐的，咸味的；盐腌的；猥亵的
用盐腌；给…加盐；将盐撒在道路上使冰或雪融化

examples.english: This might need some salt and pepper.
examples.chinese: 这里面也许要加点盐和胡椒粉。

examples.english: a pinch of salt
examples.chinese: 一撮盐

chineseDefinition: adj. 澳大利亚的，澳大利亚人的

definitions.meaning: 澳大利亚的，澳大利亚人的

examples.english: She went solo backpacking for eight months in the Australian outback.
examples.chinese: 她在澳大利亚内陆独自背包旅行了八个月。

chineseDefinition: n. 分数；二十；配乐；刻痕

definitions.meaning: 获得；评价；划线，刻划；把…记下

examples.english: a musical score
examples.chinese: 乐谱

examples.english: Who wrote the score for the movie?
examples.chinese: 这部电影的配乐是谁谱写的？

chineseDefinition: num. 第十；十分之一

examples.english: in the tenth century
examples.chinese: 在10世纪

examples.english: her tenth birthday
examples.chinese: 她的10岁生日

chineseDefinition: v. 发明；创造；虚构

examples.english: Alexander Graham Bell invented the telephone in 1876.
examples.chinese: 亚历山大 · 格雷厄姆 · 贝尔于1876年发明了电话。

chineseDefinition: adv. 其他；否则；另外

definitions.meaning: (Else)人名；(英)埃尔斯；(德)埃尔泽；(芬、丹)埃尔塞

examples.english: There’s something else I’d like to talk about as well.
examples.chinese: 我还有其他事情要谈一谈。

examples.english: I’d like you to come, and anyone else who’s free.
examples.chinese: 我想请你过来，其他人有空也可以来。

chineseDefinition: adj. 简单的；单纯的；天真的

definitions.meaning: 笨蛋；愚蠢的行为；出身低微者

examples.english: a simple but effective solution to the problem
examples.chinese: 对这个问题简单而有效的解决办法

examples.english: There is no simple answer to this question.
examples.chinese: 这个问题没有简单的答案。

chineseDefinition: v. 依赖，依靠；取决于；相信，信赖

definitions.meaning: 依赖，依靠；取决于；相信，信赖

examples.english: He depended on his writing for his income.
examples.chinese: 他靠写作谋生。

chineseDefinition: n. 真理；事实；诚实；实质

examples.english: How do we know you’re telling us the truth?
examples.chinese: 我们怎么知道你告诉我们的是真话？

chineseDefinition: v. 进入；开始；参加

examples.english: Both the boys entered the army.
examples.chinese: 两个男孩都参了军。

examples.english: She entered politics in 1996.
examples.chinese: 她于1996年进入政界。

chineseDefinition: conj. 考虑到；既然；当…时；在…时；如果

definitions.meaning: 考虑到；既然；当…时；在…时；如果
什么时候，何时；（用于时间的表达方式之后）在那时；其时；当时

examples.english: When are we leaving?
examples.chinese: 我们什么时候走？

examples.english: When did you first meet Dr Darnall?
examples.chinese: 你是什么时候认识达纳尔博士的？

chineseDefinition: adj. 和平的；温和的；平静的

examples.english: a normally pacific community
examples.chinese: 平日里静悄悄的社区

chineseDefinition: n. 方面；侧面；旁边

examples.english: Fuel is cheaper on the French side of the border.
examples.chinese: 燃料在边境那边的法国要便宜些。

examples.english: A man stood watching me from the other side of the road.
examples.chinese: 有个男人站在马路的对面看着我。

chineseDefinition: n. 姐妹；（称志同道合者）姐妹；修女；护士

definitions.meaning: 姐妹；（称志同道合者）姐妹；修女；护士

examples.english: Janet and Abby are sisters.
examples.chinese: 珍妮特和阿比是两姐妹。

examples.english: He has two sisters and a brother.
examples.chinese: 他有两个姊妹和一个弟弟。

chineseDefinition: n. 护照，通行证；手段

examples.english: I have an Irish passport.
examples.chinese: 我持爱尔兰护照。

examples.english: They need to check that your passport is in order.
examples.chinese: 他们要检查一下你的护照是否有效。

chineseDefinition: n. 伦敦

examples.english: He was nursed in London.
examples.chinese: 他是在伦敦长大的。

examples.english: I trained to London.
examples.chinese: 我乘火车到伦敦。

chineseDefinition: prep. 为，为了；因为；给；对于；至于；适合于

definitions.meaning: 为，为了；因为；给；对于；至于；适合于

examples.english: I’ve got a present for you.
examples.chinese: 我有件礼物送给你。

examples.english: Someone left a message for Vicky.
examples.chinese: 有人给维基留了言。

chineseDefinition: adj. 大的；多数的；广博的

examples.english: Los Angeles is the second largest city in the US.
examples.chinese: 洛杉矶是美国的第二大城市。

examples.english: The T-shirt comes in Small, Medium and Large.
examples.chinese: 这种T恤有小号、中号和大号。

chineseDefinition: n. 使用；用途；发挥

examples.english: an exit for use in emergencies
examples.chinese: 紧急出口

chineseDefinition: adj. 好的；优良的；细小的，精美的；健康的；晴朗的

definitions.meaning: 好的；优良的；细小的，精美的；健康的；晴朗的

examples.english: ‘How are you?’ ‘Fine, thanks, how are you?’
examples.chinese: “你好吗？”“很好，谢谢，你呢？”

examples.english: I feel fine , really.
examples.chinese: 我感觉很好，真的。
